body:

We can’t believe this.

We watched House Republicans plot to CUT Social Security.

We watched them threaten a full government SHUTDOWN to do it.

And now, we just watched them put politics over people and threaten to SHUT DOWN our government AGAIN because they couldn’t agree on a spending plan.

We’ll cut right to the chase: This is horrifying. Our government is already in turmoil and Trump hasn’t even entered office yet. So we’re calling on a MASSIVE surge of Democratic support – 6,400 gifts before midnight TONIGHT – to start the new year off in the STRONGEST financial position Democrats have ever seen, and make Republicans rue the day they ever came after our freedoms and democracy. The election may be over, but too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines now. Every last one of us needs to step up if we’re going to win back our well-deserved majority next cycle. So top Democrats just activated their 500% MATCH to help us reach our End of Year Goal – will you chip in a MATCHED $15 before this opportunity expires at midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-match-2024?amount=15]

name: Democrats.org
subject: A note about the importance of making a $3 contribution to the Democratic Party today
body:
---
Derek, As we wrap up the year, we wanted to send you a note about the contributions we've received at the Democratic Party this cycle, share a bit about how that money has been spent, and ask you to add your first contribution today, before our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2024. From data, tech, and cybersecurity to human resources and operations, the DNC methodically invested early in state party infrastructure this year. These investments helped lay the groundwork for critical Senate wins in states like Wisconsin, Arizona, Michigan, and Nevada. It helped make key local, congressional, and ballot measure wins possible across the country. In states where Democrats came up short, Trump and his allies had some of the narrowest wins EVER recorded. As we reflect on our work and the lessons to learn heading into 2025, we know that Republicans did not secure a mandate in this election. Now, Trump and his allies are hoping we won’t have the energy to fight back. We have to prove them wrong. **That's how we'll use that $3 contribution we're asking you to make today. What do you say?** [**Can you chip in now, ahead of our very last end-of-quarter deadline of 2024?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241228_2410_fr&refcode2=2410_22930333_H_Nnlh&akid=2410%2E22930333%2EH_Nnlh) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241228_2410_fr&refcode2=2410_22930333_H_Nnlh&akid=2410%2E22930333%2EH_Nnlh)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241228_2410_fr&refcode2=2410_22930333_H_Nnlh&akid=2410%2E22930333%2EH_Nnlh)**
---
****
Thank you for everything,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Are you ready to join us?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=UHNnIUAcc%2FCCsJokRof9RpbvkBOwZm%2FzY5p0svD5O8G6DDxcHiDWE2covBYPOvnnHC6bzuImMbU277lZe3%2Bo9nQDOQrizuApf8xqiD8peA6oJuo7PKIKfzprDbcT500kuc6SAaE81u7UqmNCp3TRTGYcePe849S93E3f77%2BXjUCf1ayY0kAcLhtKbsCN1%2BT9CXp5X8IO%2FhA2%2FJHGrRdQ8BywkKKwnTZ63Hkb%2BP0ib%2FnJRJcnibhRPCbWD8HM74perQfogDhExTXY3la%2Bgb2on2lxLRY4M5AkuyX4XI4EXv9iNM4uyZByalywokihJpOmq%2FQV9uivsZL5yfNqAJ5xD0Ggx%2BKloWR7hilN0QOg9Zv%2BQHi6Is0%2BC71MiqsvGjrODtbKWapX4ZFAADjsJbUkkMoXV8wc%2F3zhs9P9QuE35YM%3D]

# [#]
!!️ Hey, it’s TOP PAC! We reached out a couple of days ago about our end-of-year fundraising deadline that ends on December 31st at midnight. If you haven’t had a chance, can you donate just $3 right now to help us fund our year-round organizing efforts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-dec24?amount=3]

Peter, this is our LAST fundraising deadline before 2025, and with the upcoming legislative session, we need all hands on deck to reach our goal so we can fight back against MAGA extremism in the new year.

Our work to push Texas toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of everyday Texans – regardless of our age, race, gender, or ZIP Code – is FAR from over.

If we want to:

🔸Build relationships with Texas voters through on-the-ground issue organizing

🔸 Engage with Texans on the issues that matter most to them

🔸 AND link those issues to voting when future elections come around...

We have to start NOW. That’s why we’re reaching out to you, Peter.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] !!️ Hey, it’s TOP PAC! We reached out a couple of days ago about our end-of-year fundraising deadline that ends on December 31st at midnight. If you haven’t had a chance, can you donate just $3 right now to help us fund our year-round organizing efforts? [] Peter, this is our LAST fundraising deadline before 2025, and with the upcoming legislative session, we need all hands on deck to reach our goal so we can fight back against MAGA extremism in the new year. Our work to push Texas toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of everyday Texans – regardless of our age, race, gender, or ZIP Code – is FAR from over. If we want to: 🔸Build relationships with Texas voters through on-the-ground issue organizing 🔸 Engage with Texans on the issues that matter most to them 🔸 AND link those issues to voting when future elections come around... We have to start NOW. That’s why we’re reaching out to you, Peter. Every dollar donated by grassroots supporters like you goes directly toward transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. So, are you ready to join us? If you’re all in to join us in the fight for a progressive Texas against MAGA extremist attacks on our fundamental rights, can you chip in $3 or any amount right now? name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: So much ahead for all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
It's not just elections, Team. There are state legislative sessions starting in a few weeks and continuing all year across the country. We're fighting to expand the right to vote, increase ballot access, make voting more accessible, and much more.
There's so much still to do and so much to fight for. Please, RUSH $25 before the end of the year to help us defend the right to vote nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122824_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122824_3&amount=25]
2025 is just a handful of days away, folks.
There will be elections in states like Virginia, New York, New Jersey, Wisconsin, Florida, and more next year.
We must do the work to connect with voters every day, not just during the time people consider to be “election season.” There are no “off years” in our fight for voting rights.
While we work tirelessly to provide voters with resources to access a sample ballot, find their polling locations, and learn what they need to vote, we’re counting on your help.
Team, will you pitch in $22 (our average donation) to help our team reach our important $50,000 end-of-year fundraising goal? With your support, we’ll kick off 2025 with the resources we need to inform and turn out voters across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122824_3&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122824_3&amount=25]

clean_body: It's not just elections, Team. There are state legislative sessions starting in a few weeks and continuing all year across the country. We're fighting to expand the right to vote, increase ballot access, make voting more accessible, and much more. There's so much still to do and so much to fight for. Please, RUSH $25 before the end of the year to help us defend the right to vote nationwide >> [] Voter Action Project Logo [] 2025 is just a handful of days away, folks. There will be elections in states like Virginia, New York, New Jersey, Wisconsin, Florida, and more next year. We must do the work to connect with voters every day, not just during the time people consider to be “election season.” There are no “off years” in our fight for voting rights. While we work tirelessly to provide voters with resources to access a sample ballot, find their polling locations, and learn what they need to vote, we’re counting on your help. Team, will you pitch in $22 (our average donation) to help our team reach our important $50,000 end-of-year fundraising goal? subject: Donald Trump wants to PARDON January 6th insurrectionists?!?!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
We’re nauseous with anger:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22695%2E4449941%2Ec5r_Ov)
---
**We’re nauseous with anger:** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241228_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22695%2E4449941%2Ec5r_Ov) Americans are FURIOUS with Trump for scheming to pardon January 6th insurrectionists despite the fact that they tried to overthrow our government.

If we can show MASSIVE public outrage over this move, we can force Trump to walk back his promise.

**So we need input from all Democrats ASAP:**
* * *
**[_Do you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241228_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22695%2E4449941%2Ec5r_Ov)** | [NO, I DO NOT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241228_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=22695%2E4449941%2Ec5r_Ov)
---
[YES, I ABSOLUTELY DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241228_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=22695%2E4449941%2Ec5r_Ov)
[I’M UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241228_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=22695%2E4449941%2Ec5r_Ov)
***YOU MUST RESPOND WITHIN 5 MINUTES AFTER OPENING THIS MESSAGE***
* * *
We look forward to reading your responses,

_\- Fight For Reform_

---
Sorry to email you on a Saturday night, but I wanted to remind you of something important.
While we're all getting ready to celebrate the new year, deployed service members spending the holiday season far from home are missing their loved ones, making immense sacrifices to serve our country and facing unknown threats and challenges in the year ahead.
When my brother was deployed in the Navy, I missed him dearly -- especially around the holidays. As those of us back home return to our normal lives refreshed after the holidays, our heroes in uniform must continue to serve, having missed a special time of year with their families.
I know you care about supporting our heroes in uniform, so I wanted to make sure you saw this special opportunity to DOUBLE the value of your gift for them.
**With our critical year-end deadline coming up fast, you can maximize your support for service members and their families with a MATCHED gift.**
**[Don't miss this incredible opportunity. Rush a tax-deductible gift of $29 or more now that will be DOUBLED in value, up to a total of $35,000, to provide critical support to service members in 2025.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[Rush $29 (becomes $58)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-)
---
[Rush $58 (becomes $116)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[Rush $116 (becomes $232)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT TO HAVE IT MATCHED](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/wdbzhr~Ar6SL/cllpSTdIZkcxRDBMd2pKUG1NczFHT25WSSt6dldCSWtzLytaeFpzRFB3YXlkZnNOSWovVmcvMEhMemhwbEN3bTBRWG4yYlREVzBMVzhBUkpZSXJhVDIwMDFxUmVORWJjUmlrYTN5Vno2a1U9S0/eFI4dzYvaFdsbFNKcjZxcWdBRnpKaWJiMnIvM2J0aGFpMkYvTVd2c2t1MDk1S3dxMXdydkV5bnAzN1NTd0wzTmRLeHl2bkZRaWQ0RTZnRE1oZElvbUUveTVyVDVUYXkrS0)
---
It's so important that we stand with our heroes and prepare to support them through whatever they'll be called to do next year -- and Leonardo DRS is matching gifts to help make that possible. **The best way to show our service members deployed around the world that we 'll be with them in 2025 is to take advantage of this incredible match offer now.**
**[So please, make a donation to the USO right now that will be DOUBLED to support our service members as they selflessly serve our country in 2025.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/wdbzhr~Ar6SZL/cllpSTdIZkcxRDBMd2pKUG1NczFHT25WSSt6dldCSWtzLytaeFpzRFB3YXlkZnNOSWovVmcvMEhMemhwbEN3bTBRWG4yYlREVzBMVzhBUkpZSXJhVDIwMDFxUmVORWJjUmlrYTN5Vno2a1U9S0/eFI4dzYvaFdsbFNKcjZxcWdBRnpKaWJiMnIvM2J0aGFpMkYvTVd2c2t1MDk1S3dxMXdydkV5bnAzN1NTd0wzTmRLeHl2bkZRaWQ0RTZnRE1oZElvbUUveTVyVDVUYXkrS0)**
[RUSH A MATCHED GIFT NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-0e-VM6V/cllpSTdIZkcxRDBMd2pKUG1NczFHT25WSSt6dldCSWtzLytaeFpzRFB3YXlkZnNOSWovVmcvMEhMemhwbEN3bTBRWG4yYlREVzBMVzhBUkpZSXJhVDIwMDFxUmVORWJjUmlrYTN5Vno2a1U9S0/eFI4dzYvaFdsbFNKcjZxcWdBRnpKaWJiMnIvM2J0aGFpMkYvTVd2c2t1MDk1S3dxMXdydkV5bnAzN1NTd0wzTmRLeHl2bkZRaWQ0RTZnRE1oZElvbUUveTVyVDVUYXkrS0)
---
Thank you for your urgent support.
Tabitha Glenn
Vice President, USO

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsm4tf25cm73qiqo4lja1o304mn9dg2imp2usuko_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm4o72c1h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrcef7supalh9cr5frmvi865p8rdh2fg72tc25g0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm4o72c1h2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk24boq6jdemld02o3app4bb3a10k366akbp4on0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm4o72c1h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z13samo8apsng0d1qacrjmor2hodv4v8v8dh0j10_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm4o72c1h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6f59blsu2vapu2ih0i8ig4jlrj3kvvbv2u638og_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm4o72c1h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z405dr9tvprk8vd5uj4d4vouv9o0sb3sj6dttjcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm2or1c5h2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4q6akf8kba37q07vhcn51flpoa24u559p7qk7fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm2or1c5h2bs)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zasj8qhdhpvnbrsetqe6rkkumbrndfccapjrmb9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm2or1c5h2bs)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z036d9mo718ferb8o23o8vitkvpt78apsjlt0mr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm2or1c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36c3h6apb3c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5uku7sb4ncis1dmjsr91qd9010l68ho8hqh0170_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm2or1c5h2bs)_

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: I tried to do everything in my power to avoid this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Brace yourself because 2025 will be a WHOLE new ballgame!

| |
---
| | | I tried to do everything in my power to avoid this...

This is the last message I wanted to send you today but our backs are up against the wall. We're about to fall 10-15% SHORT of our final fundraising goal of the year!

**[So if you're able, I'm humbly asking you to contribute ten or twenty bucks before our final deadline of 2024.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkkhj0kfujb45tvfe8hdjhnumch8rf1rmfn87ut0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm6ob6cph2bs "So if you’re able, I’m humbly asking you to contribute ten or twenty bucks before our final deadline of 2024.") After that, our numbers go public - and the Radical Democrats are chomping at the bit for any sign of weakness so they can swoop in and DESTROY our House Majority.**

To put it plainly, if we come up even 1% short of our goal, they'll claim House Republicans are doomed, twist the narrative, and try to kneecap our Majority before we even get off the ground.

If we don't catch up now, I'm afraid it'll only get worse... _So if you thought 2024 was bad when they tried to:_

- Imprison President Trump
- Censor Conservative voices
- Weaponize the government against Americans
- Allow non-citizens to vote in our elections
- Pack the Supreme Court

**... Brace yourself because 2025 will be a whole new ballgame!**

This fight won't be easy - it never is. House Democrats have already plotted their plan to take back the Speaker's gavel AND we're going toe-to-toe with Liberal dark money groups that have ALREADY mobilized to flip key battleground districts.

**_[But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country- just a few bucks make a world of a difference.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7cbednbovb1spcvljhggpkcllvdqi22oc50jn3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm6ob6cph2bs "But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country – just a few bucks makes a world of a difference.")_ **And if you don't have anything to spare right now, know you are still a valued member of this team.

I couldn't be more grateful or more honored to fight alongside you.

Thank you for everything you do.

For America,

Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfvl6h6to8rft39aqdkm7ldj8valj3a1b00ep24g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm6ob6cph2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2mjbrr7ik4jka07ud9b84irdr99n4bb1573rjk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm6ob6cph2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zps7gg9i1evmp4uk5huq6a2e8mqkt2525hua6p6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm6ob6cph2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

name: ELECTION ALERT
subject: Florida Special Elections:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If Democrats get their way, they’ll sabotage our vision for America

|
---
| | |
**ATTN: Friend **

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

Democrats are lining up their most radical candidates to seize control of these critical House seats and stall the America First agenda in Congress. **If we fail to act, the floodgates of dark money will open, and the Left will pour in thousands of dollars to sabotage our vision for America.**

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhu4ko7e9b8td3qnnfgd4nd7q8qvsje81q49noc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hmepj2c1h2bs "Generic Button")

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9j32kii3p4jkvnd6e3vqj3fqtunk5n9pmtutefg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm9p36cth2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za63h4d2ieug1rqpjddvga1kfm1tjmlsk388mdso_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm9p36cth2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z70cijog7o68k465r30o4mi50646aqn6porum20o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm9p36cth2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2pb1uoqf0988b7c1meo9qb11gd0dbh4o5vga33g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm9p36cth2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7fk398ic9hemj3overq7jcml5ab03rvdqofmhoo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0s9im6pr246h22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm9p36cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaaejm0mhobpscmjeamhqveu4gush2af24l3oisg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm9p36cth2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvdkltjqg8ftvddlr68q9q7vrpr81ou8j60ccu20_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6clgm6p74cpjm49fg)

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy have been handpicked for a monumental task: **To shrink the size of the federal government and reduce wasteful spending and excess.**

But House Republicans are on board, but we can't do it without you. **[Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf0b5iuvjk225pj7iu6ctg209lldoeojsd1pq8p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5hm9p36cph2bs "Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?")**

DOGE has a LOT of work to do to drain the swamp and get the government working for the people of this great country, and that starts now.

House Republicans

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhtdiauu4tal9e3llsvsdrqqq5qdjavtq0l50240_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm0o32cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl1lvcnua5ukug5j9rvv2rub56ghofs859b4h8g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm0o32cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0kgs1ojmjnbmrsgbq94rghe9dimk7atf7htrcu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm0o32cph2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1da28801i95tqtt8s84kgscnhdllgupqlbpitm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm0p72cjh2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvkvrip1igsk04a7h5hlkqr87r5l9jq61o28gb70_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm0p72cjh2bs)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrjppjvicr1cvde7jm67qt9m4dap4ijd538ai628_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm0p72cjh2bs)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm5i7v3rflkgia3s377osub9nndjd1e91grcopv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm0p72cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpge4pb7cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2q26unmh0qaqd725vupdkhmcqjejrdaqo1d5280_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm0p72cjh2bs)_

name: ELECTION ALERT
subject: Florida Special Elections:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If Democrats get their way, they’ll sabotage our vision for America

|
---
| | |
**ATTN: Friend **

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

Democrats are lining up their most radical candidates to seize control of these critical House seats and stall the America First agenda in Congress. **If we fail to act, the floodgates of dark money will open, and the Left will pour in thousands of dollars to sabotage our vision for America.**

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn9sk1216crr5tao8tr430bjnaif57v0caui1228_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jmcor4chh2bs "Generic Button")

---

We must act NOW to protect these seats and ensure the continued success of our America First movement. That's why we need your immediate support to stop the Democrats' scheme in its tracks.

**[Your contribution of $35, $47, or $100 will be crucial in helping House Republicans push forward our America First agenda.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zauvqopj6r8tl0g36pimpddbej3ks1gjd580m8so_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jmcor4chh2bs "Your contribution of $35, $47, or $100 will be crucial in helping House Republicans push forward our America First agenda.")** We can't afford to lose these seats, and we can't do it without your help.

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9l2tqrmlfhg3n6s03b96kupcbi7ckdb3ef57le8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jmcor4chh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z368373aru4oi08p8lb8qosf5s9mj4c1chp26k18_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jmcor4chh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsri868ofpk883h3q9ia8sivtgrncjghfibpmle0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jmcor4chh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zim9cdcej9ac8rscog04l4f6g7i81m6guiff5ds0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jmcor4chh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znntgh0epq4gcgddecpe8mc3mqbhbdjankpmjf7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jmcor4chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq6d5iepon3dtnmqpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj61oj5c3j649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zko4f8d8m11r0l1jbb1hh4d53254djkjnnnhnj2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jmcor4chh2bs)_

[](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znu7d0mq867jc9medg9ijbp4semg3f70spjsq7pg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6clgmepj3chi649fg)

name: ELECTION ALERT
subject: Florida Special Elections:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If Democrats get their way, they’ll sabotage our vision for America

|
---
| | |
**ATTN: Friend **

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

Democrats are lining up their most radical candidates to seize control of these critical House seats and stall the America First agenda in Congress. **If we fail to act, the floodgates of dark money will open, and the Left will pour in thousands of dollars to sabotage our vision for America.**

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3vh0dj15d76df027170ji4e3ojluisr6js6v3e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm2pb2c1h2bs "Generic Button")
---

---

We must act NOW to protect these seats and ensure the continued success of our America First movement. That's why we need your immediate support to stop the Democrats' scheme in its tracks.

**[Your contribution of $35, $47, or $100 will be crucial in helping House Republicans push forward our America First agenda.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zf37sct5vft5fm2gvpf4nm4p5m05i1cktji13vo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm2pb2c1h2bs "Your contribution of $35, $47, or $100 will be crucial in helping House Republicans push forward our America First agenda.")** We can't afford to lose these seats, and we can't do it without your help.

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znl9reapce2e3jmcpu3kbof4j7i84ipbtgohppd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm2pb4cdh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsl93gtnpagpq56c70elk95a69ffs72quuthvu1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm2pb4cdh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpe0816f1odac3627nkuaoheb916jdekbhhnc4m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm2pb4cdh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1edi27vign05gqq589j7o2bpof80ccmeevum2k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c5jm2pb4cdh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Troy Downing
subject: I'm less than a week away!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need your support before the 119th Congress starts

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI0MTIyOV9ROS1ZUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE1OTExNzktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDEyMjlfUTktWVIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNTkxMTc5LTI4OTkifQ/c_6pGne1G2dAHrKmpasd4A)
---
Peter,

In less than a week, I’ll be taking my seat in Congress, and I couldn’t be more honored to serve you!

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: You think this is the end of an era?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsPc5HSWNN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osPc5HSWNN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend, how are you today? I'm reaching out with a bold
prediction-what do you think about this...

Big media is over.

It's the end of an era. And I can't say I'm sad to see it go.

But the death spiral of the legacy news media means that I need
YOUR urgent help to be forward-thinking during this news
revolution.

I'll tell you more about how you can help in just a moment, but
first, let me tell you why we need to act right away.

Next year, there's one thing we can absolutely expect…

Big media will continue to call for censorship of new media.
And honestly, is that any surprise to you?

The ladies on The View are already blaming the election results
on X (formerly Twitter) and "misinformation." The New York Times
claims we're experiencing a "dark turn in democracy." Rachel
Maddow cried on MSNBC about the dangers of Elon Musk and new
media. Here's the thing-so-called "Big Media" has been corrupt
and one-sided for a long, long time. In fact...

Hillsdale has led the fight against "Big media" for
decades-with YOUR help!

Imprimis-an important alternative to pervasive and pernicious
far-Left narratives-first reached the mailboxes of a few thousand
readers in 1972. Now, we fight against dangerous ideologies
through our free online courses, Hillsdale College Podcast
Network, and all our outreach on social media.

And our outreach numbers in the millions-a far cry from the few
thousand folks that received the first issue of Imprimis back in
'72!

We've also partnered for decades with talk-radio shows and
podcast hosts like Mark Levin, Tucker Carlson, and Charlie Kirk.
We've also had the blessing to work with some of the best radio
hosts in history-Rush Limbaugh and Paul Harvey-to promote the
principles of liberty that Hillsdale staunchly defends.

This has been some of our most important work. And it's work we
couldn't do without YOU. You've especially been a big help to us
during attacks from legacy media and censorship from Big Tech
companies like Facebook.

Thank you so much!

Next year-as Big Media clings desperately to remain relevant-we
can expect more attacks, so I pray you'll continue to stand with
us for TRUTH against Leftist dogmas.

An important part of our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty
through Education will be confronting Big Media head-on. As more
Americans begin turning off MSNBC and canceling their New York
Times subscriptions, with your generous gift today, you will
provide…

Free subscriptions to Imprimis-our digest of
liberty-featuring constitutional perspectives on contemporary
problems, including immigration, the weaponization of government,
and education.

Podcasts including "The Larry Arnn Show," "Hillsdale
Dialogues," and "Liberty and Learning with Mark Levin," all on
our Hillsdale College Podcast Network, part of the "New Media"
that more and more people-especially and including young
people-are tuning in to.

Free online courses on the Constitution, American history,
Christianity, and Marxism-especially important as our audience
for these courses begins to become younger and younger. We've got
a great lineup of courses planned for 2025, by the way...

Massive outreach on social media-including X (formerly
known as Twitter)-where we often share our educational content,
such as lectures from Hillsdale events, free online courses,
informative surveys, and our learning videos.

I hope you know we can only accomplish all of this with your
help.

Are you with us?

This is an exciting time when we can do so much to restore
liberty. Together, we will STOP Big Media LIES and propaganda and
TEACH the American people the TRUTH about the principles
underlying our Constitution.

To do so, we must expand these programs further than we ever
have before-and that brings me to my last point...

I'm asking for your most generous year-end support for next
year's Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education.

If you haven't renewed your support yet, can I count on you to
please give your best tax-deductible year-end gift right away?

You can make your gift online, safely and securely, at this
link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64127236:sPc5HSWNN:m:3:2627245898:13BC1D832E8C19BBF3C86978B64FD940:r

And because we can count on the support of informed patriots
like you, we'll continue to accomplish our goals without taking
ONE PENNY of government funding-even indirectly in the form of
student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY-to remain INDEPENDENT.

So please help us reach our $6,000,000 year-end online goal by
December 31 (that's only a few days away!).

Your gift of any size will help us restore liberty today, and
secure liberty for the long term. After all, there is only one
way to save liberty in America-EDUCATION.

Thank you for helping us meet this historic moment head-on-and
for reading all the way to the end of this email! Really
appreciate you,

Bill Gray, '01

Vice President

Institutional Advancement

Hillsdale College

P.S. The era of Big Media is over. But next year, as legacy
media attempts to cling to relevance, we can expect even more
attacks. So I need your help to provide all our outreach,
including Imprimis, the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and
free online courses, to millions for FREE. Next year, we plan to
expand our outreach to newer and younger audiences.

Thanks to the help of informed patriots like you, we remain on
the vanguard of new media-standing up to the lies and propaganda
of the legacy media with the TRUTH about the principles
underlying our Constitution. This work will be even more
important in 2025.

That's why I hope I can count on you today for a generous,
tax-deductible gift to help us meet our $6,000,000 online funding
goal-before December 31. I've included your secure link to give
right now here:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64127236:sPc5HSWNN:m:3:2627245898:13BC1D832E8C19BBF3C86978B64FD940:r

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isPc5HSWNN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osPc5HSWNN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-77024154322-echo3-07F2822A86EA9C32DC18C6EBF9045B8A@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7a01ea9b1a4145849b01453d29a197ed&_e=L3lXJ8coOe57VTBv1q_ejitp0Q5hXLa0Iww9hTshlBkfTKJG6ifG2sD0JrhwG1NOH7df3EDYx19LLKCwkSsgupGFSvE6Y9wXkhNB81bOVMjUq38E-p_7E9VfgGdsaFPeHP-_rEhXzBY5KuCqvmzheASM3YE1ZawOabYHjo4a7-Egg79v0Hda8oty_iEftp2o7a1ZrtfgVAT2Vnn9RfhbZdYJBaD3BAHngeJAZtvnWnMExBRvVYcyT6C4sC0kv50nRycrJT9eDPwedjOWpzBPK1VAxt-rlANs3BsQWKuaEUTNCEzSWKaOasPglt6cO8CiwejIwuU3Mli4PfDjpG7EnHjJIFWAaezm43N6bPimFrUTPTsf22bdVAU7Uamnxjr5eRvoJ5RD38FSsfwVYZMgsQ%3D%3D)

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7a01ea9b1a4145849b01453d29a197ed&_e=L3lXJ8coOe57VTBv1q_ejitp0Q5hXLa0Iww9hTshlBkfTKJG6ifG2sD0JrhwG1NOH7df3EDYx19LLKCwkSsgupGFSvE6Y9wXkhNB81bOVMjUq38E-p_7E9VfgGdsaFPeHP-_rEhXzBY5KuCqvmzheASM3YE1ZawOabYHjo4a7-Egg79v0Hda8oty_iEftp2o7a1ZrtfgVAT2Vnn9RfhbZdYJBaD3BAHngeJAZtvnWnMExBRvVYcyT6C4sC0kv50nZWe-fxfbSPpogsQXVYfqJbDG2XtWIMPsCuuC7PyVpvb8nwTIG36KP7J0Hsq0oEPGfiQcWCWtgqQD3eHnODaYq5srPHUQ3eaK4Qf4m1uMUXnzRIipAmUNRDyaGlY4ezTijodSDH53jbbBGhXJfk7IgA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7a01ea9b1a4145849b01453d29a197ed&_e=L3lXJ8coOe57VTBv1q_ejitp0Q5hXLa0Iww9hTshlBkfTKJG6ifG2sD0JrhwG1NOH7df3EDYx19LLKCwkSsgupGFSvE6Y9wXkhNB81bOVMjUq38E-p_7E9VfgGdsaFPeHP-_rEhXzBY5KuCqvmzheASM3YE1ZawOabYHjo4a7-Egg79v0Hda8oty_iEftp2o7a1ZrtfgVAT2Vnn9RfhbZdYJBaD3BAHngeJAZtvnWnMExBRvVYcyT6C4sC0kv50ns6rJKkQSrEW5UEy_z0CB8XF9u60nXPkTAp6oFlAyU_WvvBZZXV5-gLc0x2ZCn6Yu51waJnBOgZHiu-uQ4c4arPQaxm8pR5-BwGUfjzMKa87ZDettwOAa1G87TYFYbiv6p495ecKRPrKr9_sxm4si5A%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: Share the Timeless Lessons of Dickens’ A Christmas Carol
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17dc01061a594c49b6fb423036897d4f&_e=XWxAz1qXOqteeFQqnHFYf617IEZaTEmjzs17bb1aIR3nNVln06l65Q2Ip0ifBZOuTOKtSo61ceQqqKocSTKrOv9BTC5fEOV9YEFpm9YobhqMQGmYK6HNp-DPfwu9Q3-CWggrlWT3bSUzS2hUmR8v83ScrNYJBhJyzj-eiAN1cmhqCmisw_uHvxOkqcYAEpzrm6aHU8PbN1JIvUh7aCUcKyKTkkftI0xJhmurrS8rWrGKBFxZJ-r3uP_MjF9mzfnMaHxnOG1bQV42FBh_CJcepVxfTX-OOXGcxRePT1RwKnwgYPvuN5y2rTBeiRGeKLxpLf-bsRV9iNaDHjwRFU7hWdf5bfUEcJXsQi3TwYcKtbgOKF7MhgmB4aceaJTAgMxHLcYcM_6h0vKzfD8NnTbQ5Ysu8RviWkoG5-eMu25H4T8%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17dc01061a594c49b6fb423036897d4f&_e=XWxAz1qXOqteeFQqnHFYf617IEZaTEmjzs17bb1aIR3nNVln06l65Q2Ip0ifBZOuTOKtSo61ceQqqKocSTKrOv9BTC5fEOV9YEFpm9YobhqMQGmYK6HNp-DPfwu9Q3-CWggrlWT3bSUzS2hUmR8v83ScrNYJBhJyzj-eiAN1cmhqCmisw_uHvxOkqcYAEpzrm6aHU8PbN1JIvUh7aCUcKyKTkkftI0xJhmurrS8rWrGKBFxZJ-r3uP_MjF9mzfnMaHxnOG1bQV42FBh_CJcepXSFpy8bSZ2Zsfi-2MY5vlrCAzzuhh2fwoh17BVsNXvF8nMZYZtbNwGF_e_8d2Qnmtq7i-60MMU5vcbeBWSRO4MaiLiWb4cMWjAcv22MN3UfUz_TXlFfSbv6-Vsz_HwOwvBoFtc4TpiWXZOeOmjHIuo%3D)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17dc01061a594c49b6fb423036897d4f&_e=XWxAz1qXOqteeFQqnHFYf617IEZaTEmjzs17bb1aIR3nNVln06l65Q2Ip0ifBZOuTOKtSo61ceQqqKocSTKrOv9BTC5fEOV9YEFpm9YobhqMQGmYK6HNp-DPfwu9Q3-CWggrlWT3bSUzS2hUmR8v83ScrNYJBhJyzj-eiAN1cmhqCmisw_uHvxOkqcYAEpzrm6aHU8PbN1JIvUh7aCUcKyKTkkftI0xJhmurrS8rWrGKBFxZJ-r3uP_MjF9mzfnMaHxnOG1bQV42FBh_CJcepWy_ZNObA50rMGmsgO65lmebBAEO-A0beCxoWbMObj8A79leqoeUUrbs15Y13YZRpGzljhblcWLvKc9gAPf7-iIJfsAB68JgljHj3i1qadaxXOevSHaTqqYRr3LTtr2k7LZNs2y01KbSrshBrpGvBB0%3D)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

body:

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

Democrats are lining up their most radical candidates to seize control of these critical House seats and stall the America First agenda in Congress. **If we fail to act, the floodgates of dark money will open, and the Left will pour in thousands of dollars to sabotage our vision for America.**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: The last, best hope on earth
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWA29DSW0N

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWA29DSW0N

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

It's cold and quiet in Hillsdale, Michigan today. I hope you're
staying warm, and that you and your family are doing well. Our
students have headed home for a much-needed break, and I wanted
to send you a quick note as we approach the close of 2024.

The end of one year and the beginning of another is a natural
time to reflect. When I think back over the year that was, I
never could've predicted we'd be where we are today. Did you
think we'd see...

Campus protests, legacy media censorship, wars in Europe and
the Middle East, and multiple assassination attempts of a
presidential candidate?

I certainly didn't!

At the same time...

This year ended with so many Americans showing they haven't
given up on this country. A renewed hope is in the air. There is
a feeling that we can and will accomplish great things again.

I don't know about you, but when I remember America and its
leaders in my prayers, I am so grateful to God to live in a
country where the people can still choose those leaders and where
we can enjoy so much personal freedom.

Even with the events of the last few years, our country remains
"the last, best hope on earth," to quote one of our country's
greatest presidents-Abraham Lincoln.

Like America in Lincoln's time, our country is once again going
through a time of crisis and division. That's why next year if
we're going to restore liberty, we must educate all who wish to
learn. We must make it possible for them to do so for FREE if it
is within our power.

And that means that you and I must do all we can to teach the
next generation the principles of liberty, something that
Hillsdale does better than any other college in America.

We're committed to doing this no matter the cost because it's
part of our 180-year-old mission to preserve "the blessings of
liberty" we enjoy in America.

Our extensive Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through
Education is one of the most effective ways to engage the
far-Left on the battlefield of education.

Through Imprimis, free online courses, the Hillsdale College
Podcast Network, and classical K-12 educational outreach, we are
"developing minds and improving hearts," one community, one
school, one classroom, one student at a time.

And this is multiplied by thousands and thousands...

If possible, could you consider making a generous
tax-deductible gift before December 31? Hillsdale's mission is so
important, and I know you stand with us. Your timely donation
will help us continue to expand these programs in this critical
time for our nation while helping us reach our ambitious year-end
fundraising goal.

If you're able, please make your best tax-deductible gift of
$50, $100, or even $250 before midnight on December 31.

We still have not reached our $6,000,000 goal, and time is
running out.

I've included a secure link for you to see our progress and to
make your gift safely:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64127353:WA29DSW0N:m:3:2532013465:8FF9EEB4BE1E649BB022919D0DDDA176:r

Please know how thankful I am to have you as a friend.
Together, we can educate for liberty in America. Enjoy the rest
of your day!

Looking forward to hearing from you,

Bill Gray, '01

Vice President

Institutional Advancement

Hillsdale College

P.S. There's more that we have to do to secure liberty in
America in 2025. That's why we have an ambitious $6,000,000
online fundraising goal. So, would you be willing to make a gift
to help reach and teach even more people? Here's a secure link
for you to chip in a $50, $100, or even $250 gift:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64127353:WA29DSW0N:m:3:2532013465:8FF9EEB4BE1E649BB022919D0DDDA176:r

Thank you!

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWA29DSW0N

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWA29DSW0N

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

body:

Dear Patriot, The assassination attempt against president Trump sent shockwaves through this country. **[All I can say is, thank God he survived.](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19514/6374453/d2e2ba48cffe676d2262e03787c1e702196bf77a/b7403420ca09c8b90fd093c8faecbe93de1eaa08)** But if you’re like me, you’re wondering how this could have happened. Was it just incompetence? Or is there something more sinister going on? Can president Trump even _trust_ the Secret Service anymore? These are questions we may never get straight answers to. But one thing is for sure... The global elites CANNOT let Trump win. So the question is... Why? Why are they SO desperate to keep Trump out of the White House? And more importantly... the forces behind the assassination attempt... whoever they are... will they try again? **[Watch this video to find out...](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19514/6374453/d2e2ba48cffe676d2262e03787c1e702196bf77a/b7403420ca09c8b90fd093c8faecbe93de1eaa08)**
