subject: TikTok Controversy, Mega Millions, and 16th Century Cannons in Arizona
body:
Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito told lawmakers Wednesday that he wouldn’t recuse himself from cases involving the 2020 election after it was reported that an upside-down flag was flown at his house.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1ugzAURp_GbEH2tcFh8FCJsqVDl47I4Iu5lX8QOKny9hVV1q5H-o4-na_beLMUKPkPG9GUJY_AQV0EXKAbnaXwHFXlzIIIKCs0QstGaeBcV6sB4M4hKpgXaPkk1NJNXHHNbXttlbYVmdMmADohoGuaurGTvWoxKTVx7porUxwdlbzX35lSWXEJz_zAvZ5zrIJZS9kOJt8YDAwGTw9Kvs4J17xhnbAwGDbrkcGQyONONs07HXSAYnK4lzge-b7PyGT_8jJoTxzR0T0y2WO0FF5wtnGz5BOTfT98gpLyPYZqN277oRDoaDVT3J-Dv3flv1oPA78BAAD__92_bLU) | |
# Sunday, December 29, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1845, [Texas joined the United States](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQRb8GOlswHkJcULzGXV67pTUJ43hWGCKM4uTvV9l-yyvdc6TzdZkvJEny_T9tHNpSZjCAnYUOxjmSpPeMOoaFGXjQHKwfHHowxus14GIXM8IQPXnLJ28BCU4YoxkRzcBawsdmAUZrYXSud3Sls7dXxKsx0Z0VGo7SSu2_i-S28pLe5cm1v5VNp7C29tjV8E_BpGA6jqOnjavcKK-yt1LfN86tUvrcFUyfIbwrmBq_aO8oZ35Rk5I7e0anYNI1xMchKcl-8grNfSP5pXX7K_4Z4CcAAP__QGlb8g) as the 28th state in the Union when Congress approved the new Texas constitution. With New Year's Day on the horizon, it's a good opportunity to commit to making positive changes. Rather than the common resolutions, consider [trying something different this year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAUAL8GNkfwAgEGhi5s6drRegkvNhUGC2gi_32V7p1PutN9XecrppzK8okb-fGoMwhQk4QJ3Bwx5WNWPPoHEdCZk5fmrJUBIQxfvbF35ZSwFykRQQpNjqJAewe0UgPx5N82CeCkBKf1SeMNrZE3pW5CRG2ZEhTTqO30XVMZKz3yUZ_UTve68ezXMfbOzh8MAoOwY8NIb8QguIuTTjMIGy1YloZlMAiFXtNB2PrUqNf8M1ItfUqRsDMIvPm4v1LOqV8MU2LZMOW_1Phv_enhNwAA___i_loJ). We hope you succeed! Today, we're sponsored by [OneHope](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu6zAQBb-G6iyQS8qyChb3QlHnFGlSCnysqA34ECTagf8-cJAmRerBGRzM-3W-GoqUw6tJqOtSZuCgTgJOMMzeUHzMqvF6QQSUDWrRy071wHnfrNp5qxah-t4O3PDLsFjpFie8kW4ZBmsb0k-bABiEgKHr2s5Yc-mFVcpy7rsLUxw91bK3H4VyXXGJj3LHvXUlNVGvtW4Hk_8YTAymQHfKoS0Z17Jhm7EymDYTkMGUKeBOJrudDjpAMTndapqPctsdMjn-eBmcTdqY_P-ECT3dEpMjJkPxF3ImbYZCZnIcpzdQUr6k2Ozab58UIx3nnikenrPvp_WvcncNXwEAAP__Pihxlg), helping Christians in dangerous regions of Nigeria.
|
---
## Trump Asks Supreme Court to Pause TikTok Ruling
President-elect Donald Trump has asked the U.S. Supreme Court to [delay a legislative deadline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7ohgAAMFxWvS5bVbWoMZEjbYWJgkyt-vsv2WV1c6Rzpfl_mCueTt-h9X8j3VGTgoJoCBmyPm8p7VGH0iApIjeWGkVgY4N-PNRxG0cBYjBKUdN8kSgEgwSQwaaBmz_9AEgBMCnNYnjQGtEUGpwHnUdlCcYu61nb5r3vqNUnnXJ7XTUtex-Fvv-zHIfwOcBzjjvtHr-Fyf0XpeCg1w7vne650F3Njx2ButxJb6aJ319lh3FtzEhUSrlCEXYtCaWwqk5IQYk8Ox-bi_cin5mMyg-HXFXH79_a8eTw8_AQAA__88BWE8) that would force a sale or ban of TikTok to allow for a “political resolution” once he is sworn in as president next month. Congress approved a bill in April that would force Chinese parent company ByteDance to divest TikTok by January 19—one day before Trump's inauguration — or face a countrywide ban. The government believes the statute is needed to eliminate a national security risk. Trump wants to find a way to ["save" the popular video platform](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQRp_GdCB7MDEULm7jLrfdEvlnknhjMDJDEG-_8vbbneLo09H3dZ_vNqa4Pv_bBTU98gwcZCughWkONqZrlk3QD0TAvkEtVD9IBZyr5qUV9II75Z0f7ehQTE7ynqthCl4Ia_sm6romACYhYBqGbrDOjko4KR3nYRiZ5Bgi5dJ957jSCx_pyh8snc9Lk_SLaNtZ_4-BYWDO8-yO3VIO9qoCA7NTLhcDs-K5MzBbTpGir4gJPcW8Vq4RDIyAyoqBoXIsW0vxTfnd7sdWcMHW56MQA6MU3MZplJxXtSk6bGdMKe43xSR_Ljam3zz6666Php8AAAD__0aPafo) without compromising national security or Americans' free speech rights. The legislation came after U.S. officials warned that the platform [posed national security risks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbEbnw8Zh8NCFLV07ogMfwa3ByHYS5e-rdO_-9J70vq7TlUIMx-2TdnZ1TRMCaqlQ4jB5CvE16ca7lRm5a9gp2xltEcA2m-uVufhZ95ZJsbK8Lhq85lUroNkMtgnubVOIg1I4GNMamuli1az1DODNRWhgH2rK7XcKR914ja_04NwuaW-i22o9i-g-BI4CxzUcdCzcvmhL6U0IHA9-FoGjTwdFL2u-76ek8lNkuZ-Zd5ZLuucqsesAoOuh3eoem-z8-QwxhtJboeG2U4h_yfrfgofD3wAAAP__rhddvA), partly because ByteDance could be compelled to share the personal information of 170 million Americans with Beijing under Chinese law.
## Oldest Pearl Harbor Survivor Dies
Warren Upton, the oldest living survivor of the 1941 Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor and the last remaining survivor of the USS Utah, [died from pneumonia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEb22sRQuPgbuvztlWjBS7Inx46MAeXtT1x_3YxGmk_6vu7THTlyevzHF_m65gkUWKlBwjAF5PiZbBP8SgRkGvLamc46UMo1T--MNt16syuiuynosbfB6WUwizJoBmjYX28aYNAahq5rO5yxd3q2dlYqdL2wigLXXNrvzKk-aY2ffFBpl_xqon_W-t6E-SdgFDCe59mmeUl0btcuYLyigDHPXHcsTFc5sRRKcn_XnGSOgbYqIx-cHnLby8FHLhJrxab48D45Rt5uTlj1eCHHX279y8Ph4ScAAP__iRlhFA) on Friday at 105. The Utah was moored at Pearl Harbor when Japanese planes began bombing the naval base in the early hours of Dec. 7, 1941, in an attack that propelled the U.S. into World War II. The then-22-year-old swam ashore, [helping a fellow sailor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPpCAYxvFPgx0GXkGwoLjGbq690sDwOnBBMYCa-fab2WK7rZ_kyS__f4_lYWOK--uv3dC0NS_AQFAOFKbF25jei-i8WREBhw4NV4MUChhTXTBcs2Hl8jloJ0epFEwDMlArCCW80q6L5vPGASbOYZKyl9ZZrbgTwjHmpSaCoY8tl_5_jnsLuKZ3vrD0z7x1yYTWjkqGPwRmAvN9331tJR5YPzuB-cKGxe6VwPzDHgnMZ630bDbQA21JNNjicqH1LFe8cqHn0fJO-QhaMyX60LbUFeOPO6YU66iIYK_NxvStaL9VuQx8BQAA__-FuGJE) reach safety. Once Upton reached Ford Island, he jumped in a trench to avoid [Japanese planes strafing the area](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PozAQQH8NdIPswXwVLq6hy7VXogEPYS4GR7YTln-_yvZbP-np6f27TTcSL8f9L-1s8xomVGhAI-AwORJ_TaZ0dmVGrku2uqsb06FSXblZ7TpnqOVZU6upcaYd5rlf9KpaQwb7UuzHphEHrXFomqqhmfpOz8bMSrmmL4xiJznE6n-QI2-8-iu8OVZL2Etvt5yfqaj_FDgWOJ7nWa3h6-AzfXiBo5eVU748FzjmTRI4umCTlEO8wPECHejBaHgyRQ8bxTlEoJxpecBDvE-ARtVAO0dZ6Ejg6XUsGyd4JThD9A5OiiBSRuuep3gvqe0Ko-47if-JzL9Ne1v8DgAA__96KHBg). He stayed for about 30 minutes until a truck came and took him to shelter. Upton said he didn't mind talking about what happened during the attack, but he was upset by the memory of losing shipmates.
## One Winner Claims $1.22 Billion Mega Millions Jackpot
A Mega Millions player in California won [the estimated $1.22 billion jackpot](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfYzYj-7BjGDx0YUvXjugMR-LU-BC4ofz7Ku3c7Q2f3pPex3W4Ykwx395xIV9mHkCBkRokdMOEMZ2DqSY_EwE1FXntGmscKOWquw_Ojo5M0GFUbYtzaByoDi8dXtC2uq2if7VpgE5r6KytLQZsnQ7GBKUm2wqjaIqFt_rBMZc7zenkJ231yEuV_L2UdRfNm4BeQH8cRz3zd_jaY6Z9fxkBPY2ceTkF9AvdUC4xpch5l1qGvygfOH6uXOTBWa4JT9rkiCnOvOWI1ean9XjJ_eKEUbcFY_qdL__d8fTwEwAA___fH2Qj) Friday night. The lottery ticket was sold in Cottonwood, in the northern part of the state, and matched the winning numbers of 3, 7, 37, 49, 55, along with the gold Mega ball of 6. The lucky ticket holder overcame the 1-in-302 million odds of winning the grand prize. The winner can claim the money in annual payouts or [a one-time cash payout](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOtCAUBeCnwY6J94oDFhR_Yzd_u6VBuTjMIhhgxvj2G7ff7iQn-XJyvh7Tw_jg4_rfbKSrSxO2KDggx2GyxodzEo3Vjgipa0iD7HohsW1l89RKursEtTgCANUtsxO9ElJYIjk4oMbrSwPEAQCHvr_1ZjZKwizE3La2V0y0ZH1N-fZKPtYnuXCmD-XbkrYm6Gete2HdP4YjwzGeeyr1qhiOF8xwBLyyYji-C490FIbjRqvhmw_Bp1j4HsxJmR8-Fg4cceYvs3zvqXKbzeHjyuN7mykXnqm8Q72EJmu7H5dQ7pKJdt2MD7-b6l8ffTT-BAAA__-rT2gC) of approximately $549.7 million. The grand prize in Friday's drawing was the fifth-largest prize in the game's history.

clean_body: Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito told lawmakers Wednesday that he wouldn’t recuse himself from cases involving the 2020 election after it was reported that an upside-down flag was flown at his house. | | | | | | Sunday, December 29, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1845, as the 28th state in the Union when Congress approved the new Texas constitution. With New Year's Day on the horizon, it's a good opportunity to commit to making positive changes. Rather than the common resolutions, consider . We hope you succeed! Today, we're sponsored by , helping Christians in dangerous regions of Nigeria. | Trump Asks Supreme Court to Pause TikTok Ruling President-elect Donald Trump has asked the U.S. Supreme Court to that would force a sale or ban of TikTok to allow for a “political resolution” once he is sworn in as president next month. Congress approved a bill in April that would force Chinese parent company ByteDance to divest TikTok by January 19—one day before Trump's inauguration — or face a countrywide ban. The government believes the statute is needed to eliminate a national security risk. Trump wants to find a way to without compromising national security or Americans' free speech rights. The legislation came after U.S. officials warned that the platform , partly because ByteDance could be compelled to share the personal information of 170 million Americans with Beijing under Chinese law. Oldest Pearl Harbor Survivor Dies Warren Upton, the oldest living survivor of the 1941 Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor and the last remaining survivor of the USS Utah, on Friday at 105. The Utah was moored at Pearl Harbor when Japanese planes began bombing the naval base in the early hours of Dec. 7, 1941, in an attack that propelled the U.S. into World War II. The then-22-year-old swam ashore, reach safety. Once Upton reached Ford Island, he jumped in a trench to avoid . He stayed for about 30 minutes until a truck came and took him to shelter. Upton said he didn't mind talking about what happened during the attack, but he was upset by the memory of losing shipmates. One Winner Claims $1.22 Billion Mega Millions Jackpot A Mega Millions player in California won Friday night. The lottery ticket was sold in Cottonwood, in the northern part of the state, and matched the winning numbers of 3, 7, 37, 49, 55, along with the gold Mega ball of 6. The lucky ticket holder overcame the 1-in-302 million odds of winning the grand prize. The winner can claim the money in annual payouts or of approximately $549.7 million. The grand prize in Friday's drawing was the fifth-largest prize in the game's history. Targeted by extremist groups, they live under constant threat of violence, displacement, and persecution. The Open Doors World Watch List reveals Nigeria as the sixth most dangerous place to be a Christian. Recently, 95 Christians were killed. Yet, hope persists. OneHope and local churches are committed to delivering the life-changing power of God’s Word and the transformative message of His love and redemption to children at the greatest risk. In these dark moments, the Scripture becomes a beacon of courage, comfort, and hope. Right now, a special matching challenge means every dollar you give goes twice as far. Because of the challenge, —turning fear into faith, one child at a time. | ➤**Greg Gumbel, who broadcast the NCAA men's basketball tournament and the NFL during a 50-year career, died of cancer on Friday at age 78.() ➤ Corbin Burnes, the 2021 National League Cy Young Award winner, has agreed to a six-year, $210 million contract with the Arizona Diamondbacks.() ➤ The Los Angeles Chargers punched their ticket to the NFL playoffs yesterday with a dominant 40-7 win over the New England Patriots, while the Cincinnati Bengals kept their postseason hopes alive after Tee Higgins caught a clutch touchdown in the closing minutes of overtime against the Broncos. () ➤ The Los Angeles Rams also moved closer to a playoff berth of their own after a crucial win over the Arizona Cardinals, thanks to a late interception in the red zone from Ahekllo Witherspoon. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33e0acb18d5e4510ae8f078395ccfdd2&_e=1P8jZBRG50NqXQBaBoTHEDJYuZp_l9yDAQLviCdj8AWK_0aO6qJbyu_F5Sl6-6iEbqNbSp9X8Zoi0fvCES8uhe0fgwr9sugRhE7mGlEDShN67nPNiyUNTlWqt5ErplLvCzLBbB-L5bb5xCDgon-luj_NH33PwIQ7EMumCA6yImAIM6dcFMjKhrVCXFGiPpooHr2APMM2qePUgFxPF_2yOfAz5DdCGy4OtSBX64jj714xc1zxwrYo92o3CencO3f6BDnCcu6Q38V0t594nEbB2TpEjuYD9XlFw1rnZEH-gCRVzz3mV2JH5LZn0d6ZUcoYuLpJj5Hh8aqNfcsz2DApEeYDDvLOsm9dRUR421w2JphWyoQ0Ug6jDRzwfprz60roL9u865efYOnHSolcpRd_9-8XfmVnr_nsIBkRIWMTeDY%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33e0acb18d5e4510ae8f078395ccfdd2&_e=1P8jZBRG50NqXQBaBoTHEDJYuZp_l9yDAQLviCdj8AWK_0aO6qJbyu_F5Sl6-6iEbqNbSp9X8Zoi0fvCES8uhe0fgwr9sugRhE7mGlEDShN67nPNiyUNTlWqt5ErplLvCzLBbB-L5bb5xCDgon-luj_NH33PwIQ7EMumCA6yImAIM6dcFMjKhrVCXFGiPpooHr2APMM2qePUgFxPF_2yOfAz5DdCGy4OtSBX64jj714xc1zxwrYo92o3CencO3f6BDnCcu6Q38V0t594nEbB2cMTGb-BIArFTmaculz3HXV_c6eVJql6ddUbuwmZGVH0uGDgiIqNvUhUIadTNPfdG4Lk8R2eG6zK4Xwo7LI6vMsLe_wL4EI2GBA_C7jdtNjQxL0l6cu3D81LDsHvslWwswfDlAh3Q1rDAPkAoSnbLyQ%3D)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33e0acb18d5e4510ae8f078395ccfdd2&_e=1P8jZBRG50NqXQBaBoTHEDJYuZp_l9yDAQLviCdj8AWK_0aO6qJbyu_F5Sl6-6iEbqNbSp9X8Zoi0fvCES8uhe0fgwr9sugRhE7mGlEDShN67nPNiyUNTlWqt5ErplLvCzLBbB-L5bb5xCDgon-luj_NH33PwIQ7EMumCA6yImAIM6dcFMjKhrVCXFGiPpooHr2APMM2qePUgFxPF_2yOfAz5DdCGy4OtSBX64jj714xc1zxwrYo92o3CencO3f6BDnCcu6Q38V0t594nEbB2X8Y0-eU6KXaFVqbMxrW1jxD9nkSyZfHoKqacVwkoMZ6fulwkEqTUPxmP9MQ1DNlU4GjmuuUkq7Z2f-OiLlLYjEpoFnGMCDqOQuybGIIo4McmqEdMKcSMvZ0AtzAIaVW4PsJOiVkw1RP37nFZ6hDVZg%3D)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

subject: I tried to do everything in my power to avoid this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Brace yourself because 2025 will be a WHOLE new ballgame!

| |
---
| | | I tried to do everything in my power to avoid this...

This is the last message I wanted to send you today but our backs are up against the wall. We're about to fall 10-15% SHORT of our final fundraising goal of the year!

**[So if you're able, I'm humbly asking you to contribute ten or twenty bucks before our final deadline of 2024.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11058a2e6ef9401caa727d50bc286d33&_e=oEsdG3Y9icNdLMNXAYqe-sCGNK5Sf6KEamDkgLPHvIqF6kdYqy63lNaGE4Eiz3Ec1gRJ58JJlvrPyqkDVTvJHuPGav68CYVYFDl4U-MAMgQD7GF3Mc8q_L2oHHlNqmL0hPqnuaFEq4224KBOa1RkfVlUOty2o-ppBbB1UbzfNOsNCDSU7vUjKJgV6EF2Jw-0-F8-uY_LYM3_Pt9utHhA2hAn0CTmSgVvyKD51uZaYlsO29JYvyAux_xSnJihAaSAiaUYhBO_4f3n7YNP-isQUV77tHKPqJv1TguKOZH8rw99Ma68etw3i7AeDLxfAUO7loVxtJSONYkE0tJ-atftvlY5F_Xan9f4YKA8d_I5pDazu3OW59TzitAlpt7Z63Foamw4UCXJdDtAS4qziWZaTTwbhW2IgkIjYfekFtEwkr-4rip3kFxF6MxMHLW3mLbC "So if you’re able, I’m humbly asking you to contribute ten or twenty bucks before our final deadline of 2024.") After that, our numbers go public - and the Radical Democrats are chomping at the bit for any sign of weakness so they can swoop in and DESTROY our House Majority.**

To put it plainly, if we come up even 1% short of our goal, they'll claim House Republicans are doomed, twist the narrative, and try to kneecap our Majority before we even get off the ground.

If we don't catch up now, I'm afraid it'll only get worse... _So if you thought 2024 was bad when they tried to:_

- Imprison President Trump
- Censor Conservative voices
- Weaponize the government against Americans
- Allow non-citizens to vote in our elections
- Pack the Supreme Court

**... Brace yourself because 2025 will be a whole new ballgame!**

This fight won't be easy - it never is. House Democrats have already plotted their plan to take back the Speaker's gavel AND we're going toe-to-toe with Liberal dark money groups that have ALREADY mobilized to flip key battleground districts.

**_[But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country- just a few bucks make a world of a difference.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11058a2e6ef9401caa727d50bc286d33&_e=oEsdG3Y9icNdLMNXAYqe-sCGNK5Sf6KEamDkgLPHvIqF6kdYqy63lNaGE4Eiz3Ec1gRJ58JJlvrPyqkDVTvJHuPGav68CYVYFDl4U-MAMgQD7GF3Mc8q_L2oHHlNqmL0hPqnuaFEq4224KBOa1RkfVlUOty2o-ppBbB1UbzfNOsNCDSU7vUjKJgV6EF2Jw-0-F8-uY_LYM3_Pt9utHhA2hAn0CTmSgVvyKD51uZaYlsO29JYvyAux_xSnJihAaSAiaUYhBO_4f3n7YNP-isQUV77tHKPqJv1TguKOZH8rw-Nd5bbwYmCqoWkLGdLpnwlpeoc46TOBQauqJTzNVK5GGSVAKS1JqrkBiXYv75rvaSXefsUC9Oc1Y6Qht0EEAEeu9yVg_C9C327yCXOY0jH-QU7t_uX96wHYf-83Tn1_2Sk9jZBb-W_As8fGhMcc0AP "But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country – just a few bucks makes a world of a difference.")_ **And if you don't have anything to spare right now, know you are still a valued member of this team.

I couldn't be more grateful or more honored to fight alongside you.

Thank you for everything you do.

For America,

Steve Scalise

subject: Why the Voynich manuscript is important
body:
Next time you’re having trouble on Duolingo, just be grateful you’re learning a language that people can actually understand. # [The Voynich manuscript is a 15th-century codex that has never been deciphered.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp9837&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp9837&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp9837&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| N ext time you’re having trouble on Duolingo, just be grateful you’re learning a language that people can actually understand. Those who’ve attempted to study the [Voynich manuscript](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp9837&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) — a 15th-century codex that has yet to be deciphered — aren’t so lucky. Often referred to as the world’s most mysterious book, it’s been puzzling scholars for centuries. No one knows who wrote it, exactly when or where it was written, or even what language it’s in. The enigmatic tome only has an agreed-upon name thanks to Wilfrid Voynich, the Polish American bookseller who acquired it more than a century ago.
---
In addition to a mix of Latin letters, unknown characters, and Arabic numbers, the manuscript features fanciful drawings on nearly every page. Many of them are botanical in nature, as though the author were composing a field guide to fictional plants, while others are astrological. There are even illustrations of dragons. Some believe it to be a work of cryptography, others consider it a hoax, and still others think it’s a work of fiction. As recently as 2020, an Egyptologist claimed he had cracked the code by concluding that the manuscript is written in a Semitic language based on Hebrew. A true consensus has yet to emerge, however, and probably won’t anytime soon. The Voynich manuscript has been part of Yale University’s Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library since 1969 and is now available to view in its entirety by anyone hoping to solve its mysteries.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp9837&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp9837&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## "Frankenstein" was originally published anonymously.
The literary world didn’t exactly welcome female authors with open arms in the early 19th century, and Mary Shelley wasn’t alone in leaving her name off of her influential work, including her 1818 novel _Frankenstein,_ which was initially published [anonymously](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp9837&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Jane Austen’s _Sense and Sensibility_ was also published anonymously seven years earlier, and writers such as Ann Radcliffe, Frances Burney, and Maria Edgeworth did likewise with their early work. Many believed that Mary Shelley’s husband Percy Shelley was the author of _Frankenstein_ , a falsehood she had to correct many times. Her name appeared on the second edition of _Frankenstein_ , subtitled _The Modern Prometheus_ , in 1821.

clean_body: Next time you’re having trouble on Duolingo, just be grateful you’re learning a language that people can actually understand. | N ext time you’re having trouble on Duolingo, just be grateful you’re learning a language that people can actually understand. Those who’ve attempted to study the — a 15th-century codex that has yet to be deciphered — aren’t so lucky. Often referred to as the world’s most mysterious book, it’s been puzzling scholars for centuries. No one knows who wrote it, exactly when or where it was written, or even what language it’s in. The enigmatic tome only has an agreed-upon name thanks to Wilfrid Voynich, the Polish American bookseller who acquired it more than a century ago. In addition to a mix of Latin letters, unknown characters, and Arabic numbers, the manuscript features fanciful drawings on nearly every page. Many of them are botanical in nature, as though the author were composing a field guide to fictional plants, while others are astrological. There are even illustrations of dragons. Some believe it to be a work of cryptography, others consider it a hoax, and still others think it’s a work of fiction. As recently as 2020, an Egyptologist claimed he had cracked the code by concluding that the manuscript is written in a Semitic language based on Hebrew. A true consensus has yet to emerge, however, and probably won’t anytime soon. The Voynich manuscript has been part of Yale University’s Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library since 1969 and is now available to view in its entirety by anyone hoping to solve its mysteries. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Year Wilfrid Voynich came into possession of the manuscript 1912 | | Unidentified plant species featured in the manuscript 113 | Unidentified plant species featured in the manuscript 113 | | Pages in the manuscript (some are thought to be missing) 240+ | | Years the manuscript’s pages have been carbon-dated to 1404-1438 | Years the manuscript’s pages have been carbon-dated to 1404-1438 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- "Frankenstein" was originally published anonymously. The literary world didn’t exactly welcome female authors with open arms in the early 19th century, and Mary Shelley wasn’t alone in leaving her name off of her influential work, including her 1818 novel Frankenstein, which was initially published . Jane Austen’s Sense and Sensibility was also published anonymously seven years earlier, and writers such as Ann Radcliffe, Frances Burney, and Maria Edgeworth did likewise with their early work. Many believed that Mary Shelley’s husband Percy Shelley was the author of Frankenstein , a falsehood she had to correct many times. Her name appeared on the second edition of Frankenstein , subtitled The Modern Prometheus , in 1821. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. Friend, Elon and Vivek are starting a Department of Government Efficiency podcast!

What better way to help hold the government accountable than to bring the public along to see all of the wasteful spending, unnecessary regulations and fraud that goes on.

Well, that's what Elon and Vivek's new podcast is all about. Call it DOGEcast if you will.
Friend, pinch me, I'm dreaming. Elon + Vivek are teaming up for a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME project and you've got a chance to be part of history.
**[**Do you plan to be a loyal viewer?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80bef75474b14a73a399f35cb587a2a7&_e=rboOB8lC2c6S7gkrQVXNr3HKCzZIYGs1gtP7bNBF1KJEM6I_SoKVFJ2RUW_ECRZ3mZtuG03hQRFJQgjDkdYE5KqTthaj0xmzaO2wUJ0Sjzt8WdxQPpA25yIHU8sKUhoI9a-8YdgFAxySd_zApcrBEnqaFF6KHoO3lW9SwD6749mLi6ih72Um5MtiYZ5g9N87dC-t1ZewPcgZg9DP4Ad7juQ0oeph5oOPMy8bDFHSmIy4vcKF40lg2jA3cRS_ls7bIVQbAkmv4nZ--dSUbZ0z2leQQgXH8UIit5moigCUUu3i4UdklVWgdTwDUAgxLftag7NKvmZmFL93WpQ0kqPamB0GB-EFnxsF6WtQI1PR45c1elFYAkuhr4V7bBD-8j4P6x91bn5Mavpex1wWW5_hghTQHmfvu2RN0Srv3NiuTRO7Mz75OPOLlghObHAAq9VUZ75sS4XksrFsw_7ROfbF0nqY1oIC8NJLLqZrXZe9z04-c9auKvZVzOCv4yHFG3ox)**

body:
Brace yourself because 2025 will be a WHOLE new ballgame!

| |
---
| | | I tried to do everything in my power to avoid this...

This is the last message I wanted to send you today but our backs are up against the wall. We're about to fall 10-15% SHORT of our final fundraising goal of the year!

**[So if you're able, I'm humbly asking you to contribute ten or twenty bucks before our final deadline of 2024.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89e9548785a3400e86cb151fe375943f&_e=kYy5PUSFmmwYljvzRW2vnytYwHq7ZBeeuDRaHoyY8_POK8HkH2Di9ECvKNQd8XMJV6TiZImvF4fC0gMxpoPAavLC8uECDqre001OobmpSLm9yov3dKD5vGo8vU72BnRtmlxLc2Q8kxqrqJKlTYLl8LlxgSHF1SKTEZqP2DYsF4jN44wxXMdfaYZ8oGneMo0yWex0_qbyShKvmpzrLowsKEyhlyMVUcmFI9SiRiMEQW4zCFrlE5d4CMMTVOp3cCvKL1wNCiCvyGwC4mnbiJWq8IyAP402NlYTCX_jFqSGv3tJ364ELsaiokkhNovFbLY1Z0tQfxski2szd2lOg3Y9u_liBG3voW6XPYMDUNKWitAAvFKBFeP9PFiPRVZXnjz3DBTlG66-HWm2zu8ejoTAhhQfcIeJ6MPE6nZMe8M2RAvGofL8tiVilrzOSK_paDrK "So if you’re able, I’m humbly asking you to contribute ten or twenty bucks before our final deadline of 2024.") After that, our numbers go public - and the Radical Democrats are chomping at the bit for any sign of weakness so they can swoop in and DESTROY our House Majority.**

To put it plainly, if we come up even 1% short of our goal, they'll claim House Republicans are doomed, twist the narrative, and try to kneecap our Majority before we even get off the ground.

If we don't catch up now, I'm afraid it'll only get worse... _So if you thought 2024 was bad when they tried to:_

- Imprison President Trump
- Censor Conservative voices
- Weaponize the government against Americans
- Allow non-citizens to vote in our elections
- Pack the Supreme Court

**... Brace yourself because 2025 will be a whole new ballgame!**

This fight won't be easy - it never is. House Democrats have already plotted their plan to take back the Speaker's gavel AND we're going toe-to-toe with Liberal dark money groups that have ALREADY mobilized to flip key battleground districts.

**_[But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country- just a few bucks make a world of a difference.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89e9548785a3400e86cb151fe375943f&_e=kYy5PUSFmmwYljvzRW2vnytYwHq7ZBeeuDRaHoyY8_POK8HkH2Di9ECvKNQd8XMJV6TiZImvF4fC0gMxpoPAavLC8uECDqre001OobmpSLm9yov3dKD5vGo8vU72BnRtmlxLc2Q8kxqrqJKlTYLl8LlxgSHF1SKTEZqP2DYsF4jN44wxXMdfaYZ8oGneMo0yWex0_qbyShKvmpzrLowsKEyhlyMVUcmFI9SiRiMEQW4zCFrlE5d4CMMTVOp3cCvKL1wNCiCvyGwC4mnbiJWq8IyAP402NlYTCX_jFqSGv3s3c1AsPR4-f31m2WWApMGzlLcf04zq9LOylKpD1kAKv1ethYx8ZcyTWVn6ULrZ5ZUdJZ3woO2rqpKC8aVMwit-o1AcSDpoW2zLKFVm2Oyfl69QnnTAP5oWnc-oSA7WrivAL3XJcH42cB-vQ9thOaZo "But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country – just a few bucks makes a world of a difference.")_ **And if you don't have anything to spare right now, know you are still a valued member of this team.

I couldn't be more grateful or more honored to fight alongside you.

Thank you for everything you do.

For America,

Steve Scalise

**_[But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country- just a few bucks make a world of a difference.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18ae3c9dd03e443a9206c0a5eac9d4ac&_e=xTW6-d8HJDyXv8C66hBgCL6Nq47KlTHp5zvAu4ltulSYTQT8DubJzWA5t34OYLvD61gl-_XIHAEkV3VsnUwoDNyD2HFHbwEMakKUg-ApDc9UEg8dRjvX51zMBUbjQPtprJLN1VcThdzffmbIJ3eP4G2UI51CXmTWUuNK94c-rTSMgXuEphYz8t6050SqHeHSVMaX8WdVusuJb39xPd-6UGaS_TvXP5zPc8SgGQnOSuB2kBsTcPRKn-hmTRGyMvl0QF_g_aa_YX_HJ29n1P7FKWgq8HVY9HO-gurThuB2kvjOpy8LGtHhu4uon-A2glaKY7B9mMqFpRS4bgUGUFlrGpEdXxNWBpxzHNG2hsNiPXT30kyRs-FdhUOHfxve40oMmhMIrutgUXnLOAhCfK4ke-ku-sNgpP_y__DDGjKjDq5VKMJN2FEoh39Fp9WndjAt "But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country – just a few bucks makes a world of a difference.")_ **And if you don't have anything to spare right now, know you are still a valued member of this team.

clean_body: Brace yourself because 2025 will be a WHOLE new ballgame! | | | | | I tried to do everything in my power to avoid this... This is the last message I wanted to send you today but our backs are up against the wall. We're about to fall 10-15% SHORT of our final fundraising goal of the year! "So if you’re able, I’m humbly asking you to contribute ten or twenty bucks before our final deadline of 2024." After that, our numbers go public - and the Radical Democrats are chomping at the bit for any sign of weakness so they can swoop in and DESTROY our House Majority. To put it plainly, if we come up even 1% short of our goal, they'll claim House Republicans are doomed, twist the narrative, and try to kneecap our Majority before we even get off the ground. If we don't catch up now, I'm afraid it'll only get worse... So if you thought 2024 was bad when they tried to: - Imprison President Trump - Censor Conservative voices - Weaponize the government against Americans - Allow non-citizens to vote in our elections - Pack the Supreme Court ... Brace yourself because 2025 will be a whole new ballgame! This fight won't be easy - it never is. House Democrats have already plotted their plan to take back the Speaker's gavel AND we're going toe-to-toe with Liberal dark money groups that have ALREADY mobilized to flip key battleground districts. | | Fellow Conservative, Ted was the National Democrats' #1 target this year. We faced our greatest challenge yet.

But in the end, voters saw through their dishonest attacks and backed Ted in a big way...

We came out on top here in the Lone Star State, and in other battleground states across the country, and now it's time for our new Republican Senate majority to get to work to dismantle the left's disastrous policies and get America back on track!

Here at Team Cruz, we're rebuilding for the fight before us. Ted is fired up and ready to go.

body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fb00198635549638c077303b1885d3f&_e=90L7K-4yKts17u-k17qhFe3TlXAMau1k_oVCoFbmniEB_MrFQEA-QwUO-nnWLi0WFUPWX87OWui4O0ij0vOoYW0U1BQKJXDBtPBjky9j4Y07JQGj1tfLK9LK7Qbzvv00emIfRlkZZtjnXSZ2aII2_Ce0vgUfQYJT6IKtSgIM9naF8_JU_XFDSSLly0k2sEc4WVzQW62IYIS-doWY_EDcqKSeFMd_BlSPWylEhquc0Nak8UObR2Q2wbqux-7MUMp_tglMXd_yLF5ggXt9PE17Tkj6OSkwg-cooGPB2pKqwC-y_ZZRk52kkNgwi4Y3_1crP41Oi4icw-WYop0hRhhmH94J8jyceDQya20k7wTAP3_454nxYyNrYG9bePdS43VSgFxzykAG2N9wRCD2K7PEfg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---
[**But if you can fund my battle to appeal this unjust ruling, please make a contribution of any amount to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund now that I’ve officially appealed this unjust ruling.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fb00198635549638c077303b1885d3f&_e=90L7K-4yKts17u-k17qhFe3TlXAMau1k_oVCoFbmniEB_MrFQEA-QwUO-nnWLi0WFUPWX87OWui4O0ij0vOoYW0U1BQKJXDBtPBjky9j4Y07JQGj1tfLK9LK7Qbzvv00emIfRlkZZtjnXSZ2aII2_Ce0vgUfQYJT6IKtSgIM9naF8_JU_XFDSSLly0k2sEc4WVzQW62IYIS-doWY_EDcqKSeFMd_BlSPWylEhquc0NZpWpJ4G6HQcwi-V28RCH81AaMZo6-d3_18o2Tsj5ZGk1J6cqvzke74oSAacZut3VRhFnidL6Eo9EXvyrE-ZRuK_hbLQZ04OJArCdoCGqjItNTkVmyt1idUe43VDDIBLprIWB6ti7cc9AY7B4dcvGRl7noeHP1g-VbXfSloEj0pjw%3D%3D)

clean_body: I will continue to fight this injustice. | Dear Peter, The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections. To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up everything I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have officially APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: A free eBook on the most historic events in American history
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWk327SW5N

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWk327SW5N

Dear
Fellow Conservative,

Because
you're someone who values America's heritage, we wanted to give
you access to this educational resource - the eBook "Moments in
American History."

This
eBook is a compilation of 22 significant events that have shaped
the United States. Each chapter dives into a key historical
moment, offering a concise and accessible overview that enriches
your understanding of America's profound heritage.

By
downloading this free eBook today, you will:

Gain
valuable insights into key moments and principles that have
shaped our nation.
Equip
yourself with a deeper understanding of American history to
better navigate current issues.
Take
a step towards preserving the essential foundations of our
republic for future generations.

Empower yourself to defend and uphold the values that make
America unique and strong.

"Moments
in American History" equips you with the knowledge you need to
appreciate and engage more deeply with America's story.

Click
here to request your free eBook of "Moments in American History"
and start your journey through the pivotal moments that define
our nation:
https://secured.heritage.org/free-moments-in-american-history-ebook/

We hope
this eBook inspires you to learn more about the importance of
American history, principles, and heritage.

Sincerely,

Kevin D.
Roberts, Ph.D.

President, The Heritage Foundation

The
Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington
D.C. 20002

## 2024’s Winners and Losers: Year in Review
For those of us in the news business, 2024 provided a steady stream of stories to cover—and rarely a dull moment. From the Republican primaries early in the year to the assassination attempts and political conventions this summer, our Daily Signal team stayed busy through Election Day and in the days that followed. # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

body:
We need to carry this momentum into next year.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241229-1&t=1&akid=1585%2E587540%2EE0eMXA)
Peter, it has been one hell of a year at Leaders We Deserve!
**First:** We endorsed a slate of bold young progressive candidates in competitive races across the country to help create the future face of the Democratic Party.
**Then:** We fought tooth and nail all year to help these candidates win, ultimately resulting in six inspiring Gen Z and Millennial leaders winning their elections.
**Now:** As our endorsed candidates prepare to take office next month, we’re already gearing up for 2025, 2026, and beyond. We are playing the long game!
**[We’re just getting started, Peter. Will you help carry our momentum into next year with a $5 contribution toward our crucial $50,000 end-of-year goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241229-1?refcode=em20241229-1585&amount=5&refcode2=1585_587540_E0eMXA&akid=1585%2E587540%2EE0eMXA)**

subject: 𝘔𝘚𝘕𝘉𝘊 is in ＤＥＥＰ trouble!!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
Things are going from bad to worse
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22697%2E4449941%2Ez5t_Y8)
---
**THIS IS BAD NEWS:** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20241229_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22697%2E4449941%2Ez5t_Y8) **THIS IS EVEN WORSE NEWS:** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20241229_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22697%2E4449941%2Ez5t_Y8) We’re **stunned** to see that _MSNBC_ is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re launching an _URGENT_ petition standing with MSNBC during this trying time for them.** [**Please, after all that _MSNBC_ has done for Democrats, we can’t abandon them now! name: Sarah Elfreth
subject: My New Year’s Resolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
There’s so much to be grateful for and look forward to in the New Year.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99451256/519947680/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-29_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTE2M2Q5MS1mNWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wy06sHLN6o0oXuaZ_c7YCP2d6-M_CwdkJ6KZmahpRk8=)

| My heart is full that you have put your trust in me to be your voice in the House of Representatives. Because of your support, we’ve built our movement from scratch and amplified our message to people across the district.

There’s so much to be grateful for and look forward to in the New Year. As we all prepare to bid goodbye to 2024, I wanted to share my New Year’s resolution with you.

In 2025, I’m committed to getting things done in Congress and bringing our communities together to organize against hate and division. I’m motivated to stay engaged and make a meaningful difference in protecting our basic freedoms. These include curbing gun violence, ensuring abortion access, standing up for democracy, fighting climate change, and many more critical issues important to families across our community. These issues matter to me, and I will work toward delivering results.

Progress isn’t promised — but it is possible. And it’s possible because of you.

I can’t wait to move full steam ahead in the new year.

—Sarah Elfreth
---

* * *
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99451259/519947682/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-29_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTE2M2Q5MS1mNWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wy06sHLN6o0oXuaZ_c7YCP2d6-M_CwdkJ6KZmahpRk8=)

name: The Democrats
subject: The importance of this moment:
body:
Please give us a chance to explain why this request is so important.
---
Derek, In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to donate directly to the Democratic National Committee before our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this year. Please give us a chance to explain why this request is so important. No doubt about it: the election did not go the way we had hoped. Democrats invested millions of dollars and hours but ultimately, we came up short in the race for the White House. But this is no time to sit back. Our work now is more important than ever. Soon, Trump will be sworn into office. We already know what he and his allies are capable of and what they plan to do. It’s crucial that we have a strong and robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under his control. If you understand the importance of stopping Trump’s far-right agenda and standing up to him and his allies, we are asking you to contribute to the Democratic National Committee before our end-of-quarter deadline. [**Click here to do just that.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241229_2431_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2431_22930333_xKmOIP&akid=2431%2E22930333%2ExKmOIP) On top of that, in just a few days, this fundraising quarter will end and the amount of money we’ve raised will become public. Trump and his allies are hoping we won’t have the resources to counter them as they roll out their Project 2025 agenda. We have to prove them wrong. So while you may not have opened this email expecting to donate, given how important it is for us to put up a strong number and how effectively we can put your contribution to work, we have to ask: [**Can Democrats everywhere count on you to contribute $3 to the Democratic National Committee before our end-of-quarter deadline? We need to be ready on day one of Trump’s administration.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241229_2431_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2431_22930333_xKmOIP&akid=2431%2E22930333%2ExKmOIP) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241229_2431_fr&refcode2=2431_22930333_xKmOIP&akid=2431%2E22930333%2ExKmOIP)**

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Olivia_Krolczyk=2C_Leadership_Institute=C2=A0?=
subject: Stand bravely with me and Riley
body:
| Friend, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d5f835967944ee687492dd0a2a7f3b9&_e=8-aS72cyL3fuKCNrMzdXc5ijzApOGpidfKjJsXkd3Wx6M_8p117m9fwhsRaj-5bsJUkthRXhBaCmFs3-qwqKp6-KkJ_RNimA4IfiCU-9DHxOvgXi_h_7Uuw_6G_Lqd4NMYJ6hJOiSfQ39eo6U6rZS-yhTNt54tC7P5D05UO7VZNG4P5bWpcbmPNSd5zlMULhh3TFsxFkz9n1Q6uhekfG-aKQCtIqJ3xyIEwQ9HPyooG1xzVw--C0zk91rRM3QVMA-6g4iGMgfrLEL6Mj1ux-Rh9qe1p3Pu61fjHb0zM-AKfPAMPNfHCbc-sXYL91tg6QijB05Og3YfSb7wNWpQ1pb8wKv8iUJkSF0LREBa9b34wW7s1Zr0Nd6y2gpwLtJj8L0LSBPG66wAhX7lSgOrDhwA%3D%3D)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Friend, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? [Today I ask you to help conservative students fight for their rights this fall. ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d5f835967944ee687492dd0a2a7f3b9&_e=8-aS72cyL3fuKCNrMzdXc5ijzApOGpidfKjJsXkd3Wx6M_8p117m9fwhsRaj-5bsJUkthRXhBaCmFs3-qwqKp6-KkJ_RNimA4IfiCU-9DHxOvgXi_h_7Uuw_6G_Lqd4NMYJ6hJOiSfQ39eo6U6rZS-yhTNt54tC7P5D05UO7VZNG4P5bWpcbmPNSd5zlMULhh3TFsxFkz9n1Q6uhekfG-aKQCtIqJ3xyIEwQ9HPyooFX8QpFNL2kzC_CFNJVpyUdOEurAUw5Qr0jO0j7a4D3VrJlQjQM0e8gNXpmYvTjFbgvMKeXA_zgjQoaBk5_fgixmhpEC8iQ_bKdi6QNiWRElsN2nNAunIPt3r3wyl7qZuNA9LOdTQBWgS5crtHGJQFpES6EOfvhUnozzHVAEDkljA%3D%3D) With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. [Will you stand bravely with me and Riley? ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d5f835967944ee687492dd0a2a7f3b9&_e=8-aS72cyL3fuKCNrMzdXc5ijzApOGpidfKjJsXkd3Wx6M_8p117m9fwhsRaj-5bsJUkthRXhBaCmFs3-qwqKp6-KkJ_RNimA4IfiCU-9DHxOvgXi_h_7Uuw_6G_Lqd4NMYJ6hJOiSfQ39eo6U6rZS-yhTNt54tC7P5D05UO7VZNG4P5bWpcbmPNSd5zlMULhh3TFsxFkz9n1Q6uhekfG-aKQCtIqJ3xyIEwQ9HPyooHfzBiMvo_B-bAmKbvTTrVDbUZnyRc-GvDwWFgnLGSrGFh9T0o-dO9vPitGvBPGW4EpIJ8-OaONE_ujBTCf2O18qEyX99p6X_yBcc6jK4IelWF6hxaE-6pkelb0Ue2AJ1ZkExUTtG2GcXrLTYEaPcxoL6gf-APcQ00ym8HHLKynZw%3D%3D) Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. Please let me count on you now. Thank you. Fight on, Olivia Krolczyk Ambassador Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
| [ **Stand with Riley Today ** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d5f835967944ee687492dd0a2a7f3b9&_e=8-aS72cyL3fuKCNrMzdXc5ijzApOGpidfKjJsXkd3Wx6M_8p117m9fwhsRaj-5bsJUkthRXhBaCmFs3-qwqKp6-KkJ_RNimA4IfiCU-9DHxOvgXi_h_7Uuw_6G_Lqd4NMYJ6hJOiSfQ39eo6U6rZS-yhTNt54tC7P5D05UO7VZNG4P5bWpcbmPNSd5zlMULhh3TFsxFkz9n1Q6uhekfG-aKQCtIqJ3xyIEwQ9HPyooEPAkP4VllNBoVNmAWSV2L6MkId8Y6Yn7hmY_YKuIOmplyy0DJQxc7uOJqL5J0eGSCCV_AitTpsX7U8EpMLnlOVaerbbo04VFPsG-Og9PW5OAiUDT21Z3wsokEei3e2WbU95IRrGiom_4lJB8RVjMMO13rLStpL_ubDXw9vphObCA%3D%3D)

---

December 29,2024
Over the past two years, my readers have been spoiled by my accurate predictions. But [2024 was a mezza mezza](https://substack.com/redirect/d09659cb-a9c8-46d2-80cf-cc41fe14be5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I will review my calls before proceeding to 2025:
The Stock Market will gain around 5%. Wrong. The S & P gained 26%.
Joe Biden will be the Democratic nominee. Wrong
Donald Trump will be the Republican nominee. Correct
The Democrats will retake the House. Wrong
The Republicans will retake the Senate. Correct
Joe Biden will win reelection. Wrong. But I still think if the Democrats had not forced him off the ballot, kept him in the basement where he belongs and never debated Trump - he would have won. [And so does he.](https://substack.com/redirect/6fabd462-782b-4fa4-8be5-88b3ebf10cb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Cleveland Browns will win the Super Bowl. Wrong. The Chiefs won again.
The Michigan Wolverines will be the national football champions. Correct
Both the UConn Men and UConn Women will make the Elite Eight. Correct. The Men won the National Championship and The Women lost a Final Four game to Iowa by two points.
The Steelers will be Super Bowl contenders. Correct. We are in the playoffs.
And now for 2025:
**The Stock Market will gain 5%.** America is on a roll, but the tech valuations are too high. They will correct but value stocks such as Pepsi and Verizon will hold their ground. Furthermore, the Federal Reserve Board artificially propped up stock market valuations - especially with their irresponsible September drop of the Fed Fund rate by 0.50% - to keep Trump out of office. It didn't work so now the Fed should behave responsibly and raise rates to break the back of inflation. The bond market is already anticipating this with higher yields on long-term treasuries. This will further put downward pressure on the stock market.
**President Trump 's popularity will be 50% of higher for the first time**. Trump's victory was so broad based that his previous detractors are groveling before him. He will actually have a honeymoon and be able to concentrate on inflation, illegal immigration and world peace (see predictions below).
Also many Americans are thankful that Trump has spared us eight years of total incompetence in which illegals on the public trough murder more women, boys who think they are girls slam volley balls into our daughters' faces, freeloaders don't pay their student loans in defiance of court orders, citizens who complain are labeled "domestic terrorists" and harassed by FBI, and global instability increases because our leaders are more interested in DEI and climate change rather than stopping nuclear weapons from becoming airborne. As one voter put it, "I want my country back." She is about to get it back.
**There will be cease fires in both the Ukraine and Israeli Wars**. While President Trump has bragged he will end these wars on Day One, Biden and his team of Ivy League incompetents have so inanely projected weakness that the best Trump can do is start with ceasefires. To stop the war in Ukraine, he will have to make concessions that nobody - especially NATO - will like. And the Mideast has been a killing field for millennia. Simply stopping the killing would be a victory in itself. But if Trump can squeeze Iran enough that the unpopular Ayatollah is overthrown, the seeds of a lasting peace could be planted.
**President Trump will succeed in deporting violent illegal immigrants**. While a few liberal judges may try to stop this, Americans overwhelmingly want this to happen.
**Inflation will decrease.** President Trump will "drill baby drill" while decreasing regulations on energy producers and business in general. This will decrease gasoline prices - especially diesel (used by trucks) - allowing lowering transportation costs and therefore grocery prices. If the Fed has the sense to not lower the Fed Fund rate more or even increase it slightly, this will decrease inflation also.
**The Supreme Court will allow the banning of transgender treatments.** Tennessee passed a law prohibiting hormone treatments of transgender youth under 18 years of age (U.S. v. Skrmetti). While the tone of the questions by Supreme Court justices during oral arguments is not always an accurate predictor, there seems to be at least five votes to allow Tennessee's law to stand.
**The Steelers will win the Super Bowl**. Chiefs, Bills, Eagles. Are you serious? It is time to put these quiche-eating tofu aficionados in their place. Football fans will note that the Steelers performance at the end of the season can be charitably called lackluster. What they do not realize is that the brilliant Tomlin is resting his stars to prevent injuries since a playoff spot is already guaranteed. Furthermore, he is lulling our hapless opponents into complacency so they will be crushed as this is part of God's plan.
**The Steelers will make the playoffs again.** Again, this is part of God's plan.
**Penn State will win the National Title.** Please see the comments above. This is western Pennsylvania. The players are toughened by cold weather while these southern whiners complain if the temperature is below 50°F (that means Fahrenheit in case any southern football fans are reading this article). George, Texas. Useless chokers. Boise State? Is that some sort of meditation goal? Notre Dame. Overrated for the umpteenth time.
**The UConn Men will make the Elite Eight**. Presently we are ranked 11th. But the savvy Coach Hurley will raise this team higher. It is unlikely we will get a Threepeat National Championship, but you never know.
**The UConn Women will make the finals**. Presently we are ranked 7th but Paige Bueckers is peaking and if Azzi Fudd can stay healthy, this team will just get stronger.
Happy New Year
Follow Dr. Bentivegna on Twitter (X) @joebentivegnamd
Contact: jfbentivegna@gmail.com

But I still think if the Democrats had not forced him off the ballot, kept him in the basement where he belongs and never debated Trump - he would have won. The Cleveland Browns will win the Super Bowl. Wrong. The Chiefs won again. The Michigan Wolverines will be the national football champions. Correct Both the UConn Men and UConn Women will make the Elite Eight. Correct. The Men won the National Championship and The Women lost a Final Four game to Iowa by two points. The Steelers will be Super Bowl contenders. Correct. We are in the playoffs. And now for 2025: The Stock Market will gain 5%. America is on a roll, but the tech valuations are too high. They will correct but value stocks such as Pepsi and Verizon will hold their ground. Furthermore, the Federal Reserve Board artificially propped up stock market valuations - especially with their irresponsible September drop of the Fed Fund rate by 0.50% - to keep Trump out of office. It didn't work so now the Fed should behave responsibly and raise rates to break the back of inflation. The bond market is already anticipating this with higher yields on long-term treasuries. This will further put downward pressure on the stock market. President Trump 's popularity will be 50% of higher for the first time. Trump's victory was so broad based that his previous detractors are groveling before him. He will actually have a honeymoon and be able to concentrate on inflation, illegal immigration and world peace (see predictions below). Also many Americans are thankful that Trump has spared us eight years of total incompetence in which illegals on the public trough murder more women, boys who think they are girls slam volley balls into our daughters' faces, freeloaders don't pay their student loans in defiance of court orders, citizens who complain are labeled "domestic terrorists" and harassed by FBI, and global instability increases because our leaders are more interested in DEI and climate change rather than stopping nuclear weapons from becoming airborne. As one voter put it, "I want my country back." She is about to get it back. There will be cease fires in both the Ukraine and Israeli Wars. While President Trump has bragged he will end these wars on Day One, Biden and his team of Ivy League incompetents have so inanely projected weakness that the best Trump can do is start with ceasefires. To stop the war in Ukraine, he will have to make concessions that nobody - especially NATO - will like. And the Mideast has been a killing field for millennia. Simply stopping the killing would be a victory in itself. But if Trump can squeeze Iran enough that the unpopular Ayatollah is overthrown, the seeds of a lasting peace could be planted. President Trump will succeed in deporting violent illegal immigrants. While a few liberal judges may try to stop this, Americans overwhelmingly want this to happen. Inflation will decrease. President Trump will "drill baby drill" while decreasing regulations on energy producers and business in general. This will decrease gasoline prices - especially diesel (used by trucks) - allowing lowering transportation costs and therefore grocery prices. If the Fed has the sense to not lower the Fed Fund rate more or even increase it slightly, this will decrease inflation also. The Supreme Court will allow the banning of transgender treatments. Tennessee passed a law prohibiting hormone treatments of transgender youth under 18 years of age (U.S. v. Skrmetti). While the tone of the questions by Supreme Court justices during oral arguments is not always an accurate predictor, there seems to be at least five votes to allow Tennessee's law to stand. The Steelers will win the Super Bowl. Chiefs, Bills, Eagles. Are you serious? It is time to put these quiche-eating tofu aficionados in their place. Football fans will note that the Steelers performance at the end of the season can be charitably called lackluster. What they do not realize is that the brilliant Tomlin is resting his stars to prevent injuries since a playoff spot is already guaranteed. Furthermore, he is lulling our hapless opponents into complacency so they will be crushed as this is part of God's plan. The Steelers will make the playoffs again. Again, this is part of God's plan. Penn State will win the National Title. Please see the comments above. This is western Pennsylvania. The players are toughened by cold weather while these southern whiners complain if the temperature is below 50°F (that means Fahrenheit in case any southern football fans are reading this article). George, Texas. Useless chokers. Boise State? Is that some sort of meditation goal? Notre Dame. Overrated for the umpteenth time. The UConn Men will make the Elite Eight. Presently we are ranked 11th. But the savvy Coach Hurley will raise this team higher. It is unlikely we will get a Threepeat National Championship, but you never know. The UConn Women will make the finals. Presently we are ranked 7th but Paige Bueckers is peaking and if Azzi Fudd can stay healthy, this team will just get stronger. Happy New Year Follow Dr. Bentivegna on Twitter (X) @joebentivegnamd Contact: jfbentivegna@gmail.com | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Joseph Bentivegna 541 Cromwell Avenue, Rocky Hill, CT 06067 ? ?

But with your help, and with conservatives holding the trifecta of Government, White House, House, and Senate... We can not only undo the chaos of the Biden/Harris administration AND the Obama/Biden years... But we can also create lasting conservative change. It's clear 2025 is going to be a year of epic battles So please friend, make an investment in the America First movement today! Don’t let this opportunity go to waste. Become a force multiplier by joining millions of fellow conservatives in demanding change. And I don’t want to rush you, but it’s critical that we make the change we want to see happen before the midterm season, when Congress will all but grind to a halt... That means we don’t have four years, we have just months to make this happen. So don’t wait, Thank you, friend. History will remember what you and I did to save our great nation. | | I look forward to your response. For Freedom, Rebecca Weber, Chairwoman AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103, Leesburg, FL 34748 |

Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[put News Nation host Chris Cuomo in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/70cebf48-6067-410f-8769-508ca1d23d2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for challenging his deportation agenda during a fiery live interview.
"You'll lose a lot of people that the economy needs!" Cuomo told Homan.
**[Watch Homan set the record straight about the illegal migrants in this country](https://substack.com/redirect/70cebf48-6067-410f-8769-508ca1d23d2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , "If you're in the country illegally, you are in violation of the law!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/70cebf48-6067-410f-8769-508ca1d23d2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/70cebf48-6067-410f-8769-508ca1d23d2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"This roundup idea, and I haven't heard Trump say it the way you have,... If you are just grabbing whoever you can grab, not only do you have families that get effected but you lose 1/8 of your construction workers, 1/8 of your agriculture workers, 1/12 of your hospitality workers," Cuomo told Homan.
Homan said that he's interested in removing national security threats and other high priority targets first, but it is up to Congress to fix the asylum process.
* * *
# The left-wing riots that destroyed America - A firsthand account:
Learn the TRUTH about the democrat riots that ravaged American cities in 2020. **[The media wants this all to go away...](https://substack.com/redirect/04bc1abe-c91a-4592-a223-79829bddbd3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** We can't let that happen!

**[Watch this must-see classic Trump moment](https://substack.com/redirect/79850d15-537c-4f51-a1d8-b7637aa76f09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when he comforts the grieving wife of a fallen police officer.

Peter,
This holiday season is the calm before the storm. Because in January, a new GOP-lead Congress will be sworn in, and Donald Trump will take over the White House for another chaotic four years.
**We need to band together in this critical moment and support Democrats at all levels of government who are fighting against the MAGA agenda and working tirelessly to prevent Trump and his allies from destroying our democracy.**
[**If you want to help Democrats be prepared for the second Trump term, please consider making a donation of $10 or giving any amount you can to help us get our war chest ready for 2025 and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99455804/519959817/-1444662483?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.29_PreparingFor2025_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzg3ZjdkYy1mYmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCsKKBjAatq2U0R8ccus6Zlzn0TfKgmZKT4NcTZGsQA=)

**In 2025, there will be important races all across the country where Democrats can start turning the tide.** Across the country, people will vote for Mayors, Attorney Generals, and other positions that have a big impact in Americans’ lives – and **we need to make sure Democrats win as many seats as possible.**
[**So please, Peter, help give Democrats the best chances they can to protect our democracy in the new year by making a donation today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99455807/519959822/1907121472?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.29_PreparingFor2025_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzg3ZjdkYy1mYmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCsKKBjAatq2U0R8ccus6Zlzn0TfKgmZKT4NcTZGsQA=)

Because in January, a new GOP-lead Congress will be sworn in, and Donald Trump will take over the White House for another chaotic four years. We need to band together in this critical moment and support Democrats at all levels of government who are fighting against the MAGA agenda and working tirelessly to prevent Trump and his allies from destroying our democracy. = ****=** **=** It can be scary to think about what is going to happen next year, and in the years ahead – but there’s still hope and ways we can take power back from MAGA Republicans. In 2025, there will be important races all across the country where Democrats can start turning the tide. Across the country, people will vote for Mayors, Attorney Generals, and other positions that have a big impact in Americans’ lives – and we need to make sure Democrats win as many seats as possible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. **=** **=** **=** **=** **=** **=** Thank you. \- Durbin HQ Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. Though the 2024 Presidential Election didn’t have the results we were hoping for, our Democratic coalition in Georgia isn’t going anywhere.
In 2024, we cemented our status as a battleground state, and in 2026, we’re going to re-elect Jon Ossoff to the Senate and help Democrats regain the Senate majority.
But it’s going to take all of us to do it.
That’s why we’re reaching out to our top supporters from the 2024 cycle before our FEC deadline on Tuesday at midnight and asking them to cement their status as an Official Democratic Member before we kick off 2025.
[**Please, Peter: Donate before Tuesday at midnight to confirm your 2025 Democratic Supporter status with the Democratic Party of Georgia for the upcoming election cycle.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99456017/519960489/-871140472?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_122924_1_2_EOY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDYzMDdmZS1mYmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glqvJnzFiBrM7dpJ4PKsKz4cm_LeZbc8sXRLmTsf1eE=)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I have not lost hope
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We built something special here. And that would not be possible if the people on this team — people like you.
#

Team, it’s Mark Kelly here.
There’s no denying that things didn’t go as well as we’d hoped this November.
But as true as that is, we still managed to accomplish some incredible things together. Here are just a few things I’m grateful for as we approach the end of the year:
American manufacturing is on the rise — and Arizona’s growing microchip industry is at the forefront of that success.
We are rebuilding our infrastructure, road by road, bridge by bridge, and generations to come will benefit from the investments we have made across the country over the last four years.
We are reducing our emissions and growing a clean energy economy right here at home, and our children and grandchildren will inherit a more sustainable and resilient country as they grow and start families of their own.
And here in Arizona, Democrats hold the Governor’s office, the Secretary of State and Attorney General positions, and now TWO seats in the United States Senate.
We built something special here. And that would not be possible if the people on this team — people like you — had not invested a ton of time and effort (and donations!) to help me win both of my campaigns and hold the line this November.
To put it simply, I have not lost hope. It has never been more clear to me that the work we do matters. That campaigns like ours matter. That science, data, and facts matter. And I do not intend to step aside as Trump and National Republicans work to undermine everything we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t do it alone. We’re coming up on our final goals of the year with our FEC deadline of the year, and I’m confident we can get there if a few more people chip in before New Years Eve.
[**So, to defend our progress and continue the essential work we have committed to, can you please make your first $3 contribution today? This is one of our final chances to hit our goals before we hit this deadline and are legally required to release our numbers.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec24.KA0iD9&refcode=em241229-1-120&t=1&akid=5939%2E6688874%2EduCQ5j)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-dec24.bc1t6i&refcode=em241229-1-120&t=20&akid=5939%2E6688874%2EduCQ5j)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-dec24.azfHhS&refcode=em241229-1-120&t=21&akid=5939%2E6688874%2EduCQ5j)**
---

| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-dec24.85OjOB&refcode=em241229-1-120&t=22&akid=5939%2E6688874%2EduCQ5j)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-dec24.wguv_x&refcode=em241229-1-120&t=23&akid=5939%2E6688874%2EduCQ5j)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-dec24.MrR5lU&refcode=em241229-1-120&t=24&akid=5939%2E6688874%2EduCQ5j)**
---
****

---
****
Thanks so much for everything you’ve done for us.
It means a lot to me, personally.
Mark

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=5939%2E6688874%2EduCQ5j).

our mission for service members in 2025**](https://links.e.uso.)

| [MAKE A 3X-MATCHED DONATION](https://links.e.uso.)

USO Supporter,
Our service members are busy preparing for anything and everything they might be called to do in 2025 -- but we're falling short of our critical fundraising goal as we approach the end of the year. **[Rush $29 (becomes $87) now to help us close this gap.](https://links.e.uso.)**
As important as our mission to support our military heroes is, the USO is **not** part of the government. We're a nonprofit organization that relies on the generosity of military supporters like YOU to raise the resources that make it possible for us to always be there for our service members.
**Thankfully, a generous group of USO donors is TRIPLE-MATCHING all gifts, up to a total of $100,000, until midnight tomorrow to help us reach our crucial goal so we can provide the support that helps our military members be the best in the world. But we need your help to take advantage of this exclusive offer before it expires.**
**[Will you make a tax-deductible gift of $29 or more now to help us provide even more essential supplies, connections to home, meals and other support for military families next year?](https://links.e.uso.)**
