name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.
| | |
---
| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=94cdef01c9ec4b4d9edf84a411af0b78&_t=FNPetFjNSfuvn8456cIkpnjcEx5YNjWeG6SoGdENAQteF2TP4pE0mFNw7kW88ciIIO07ETBoXmrOynMNMpYDhcUemFc07aXqjQ_ufktkfMdlNW0Mk63ZsyS9JnSsINvX)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=94cdef01c9ec4b4d9edf84a411af0b78&_e=xhP_N6wbPOVZTRDFpQWPRsQPq2onf61kTvD8Y81wAr_VYvT70nz8eCE6y1IZMpnlB7yfrJ1HByDHVT4GVRX1s1-yWgohHm_RB6qPD3M3PhrCWcj1Zw1DiFezNOt-jJBQpXjyv9j-TRSL0_Rgvt8kVb_caWVKWenYsjuQI6f28Zh5J64ht8JfG5utb7dwO_7lzH5Wys_kX6X2jmo8ugIbleg1Elowkyg2D939ofEdw44wx49UZ8KjTf9CsnKpxhLNDZbsMhPjWLSdwgwHI5IjqFtxc6JVTpKNkIk6Gu2-U7NrzNUAUz7V0yH9OTZqzTVhRHaZZ0fSw33ZrO_LWYicDpu6Z6giNiD3-n5ko4U93cG_7Se17Kpr2zhzzXVFoWW6n67MOFHOYdpGH1ec1wQUzg%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=94cdef01c9ec4b4d9edf84a411af0b78&_e=xhP_N6wbPOVZTRDFpQWPRsQPq2onf61kTvD8Y81wAr_VYvT70nz8eCE6y1IZMpnlB7yfrJ1HByDHVT4GVRX1s1-yWgohHm_RB6qPD3M3PhrCWcj1Zw1DiFezNOt-jJBQpXjyv9j-TRSL0_Rgvt8kVb_caWVKWenYsjuQI6f28Zh5J64ht8JfG5utb7dwO_7lzH5Wys_kX6X2jmo8ugIbleg1Elowkyg2D939ofEdw44hZgIZNCtTlO-oeSgLz3e6qK5WtjNuf_2khnMN5KhmCuOY1_laHwz3g0ubj0ADi9ohnr630Xif01i39i00D8M4F3w_83eRkpi78mxxo6D1PgdhF7BZphqE9jyr8MPwnbX2PEFRTJTKrV1rSK312AyjnzxYUA8valCGBUIWSvBfrQ%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=94cdef01c9ec4b4d9edf84a411af0b78&_e=xhP_N6wbPOVZTRDFpQWPRsQPq2onf61kTvD8Y81wAr_VYvT70nz8eCE6y1IZMpnlB7yfrJ1HByDHVT4GVRX1s1-yWgohHm_RB6qPD3M3PhrCWcj1Zw1DiFezNOt-jJBQpXjyv9j-TRSL0_Rgvt8kVb_caWVKWenYsjuQI6f28Zh5J64ht8JfG5utb7dwO_7lzH5Wys_kX6X2jmo8ugIbleg1Elowkyg2D939ofEdw468QtIxDRvrzrZHgJQkT2x7q6kmChlAiMNH8efmY3RRPGO6803yIA6kkgLo7h-hagF0NbnwkyDqZkdImM41z_eCCHIUXY4RjmtfSzcIJqf3MJ3Tc7R9si8bB5mKelzxQOuLS9b5QzhK8RVrykOcOOB3l9gCCIaunKKB9zX6mArEgw%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=94cdef01c9ec4b4d9edf84a411af0b78&_e=xhP_N6wbPOVZTRDFpQWPRsQPq2onf61kTvD8Y81wAr_VYvT70nz8eCE6y1IZMpnlB7yfrJ1HByDHVT4GVRX1s1-yWgohHm_RB6qPD3M3PhrCWcj1Zw1DiFezNOt-jJBQpXjyv9j-TRSL0_Rgvt8kVb_caWVKWenYsjuQI6f28Zh5J64ht8JfG5utb7dwO_7lzH5Wys_kX6X2jmo8ugIbleg1Elowkyg2D939ofEdw47v70Pknxw15miY3bYKTIP4npOo61N5TvG88llymt3gPjIfrlI9hYV4myI80Wq2YmvsH6OVpC4rUz1IqRViP9NRusKbcL57FH3NeMdtq92ptujaYPlLI5PNeFdOI5wA7dp9VBjHeK8BC8JOs6TQdL1rcWz6C-1ps_5cUcA1a11YIg%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=94cdef01c9ec4b4d9edf84a411af0b78&_e=xhP_N6wbPOVZTRDFpQWPRsQPq2onf61kTvD8Y81wAr_VYvT70nz8eCE6y1IZMpnlB7yfrJ1HByDHVT4GVRX1s1-yWgohHm_RB6qPD3M3PhrCWcj1Zw1DiFezNOt-jJBQpXjyv9j-TRSL0_Rgvt8kVb_caWVKWenYsjuQI6f28Zh5J64ht8JfG5utb7dwO_7lzH5Wys_kX6X2jmo8ugIbleg1Elowkyg2D939ofEdw45uorncpJ3O0OcmzoUKPyfIjI2LwLfXd3G5Vf9Ve3lVfSxSvzVsoZJVd_Dz-oX6zpEaLEqsw0oB2M-BuhnKO55BgAZqNT8hW4WazrJ5nnm5oiZngH82SKEA61HGCRjEEAaD4VinVxXn_1yyNAPSiZHU_SPCsGGu_FvVej4aittUzQ%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

I hope you’ll take the time to read through, and **[then make a contribution toward Wes’ campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99457512/519965047/1942360058?refcode=em20241229-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjAzYzMxOC1mZWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=94IaqdnDl83eBM40TbpNVaeB-0oZOMvPc3HxNRfMlfo=)** | With December coming to a close, we need to enter the new year with strong fundraising numbers in order to execute Wes’ vision for Maryland. On January 7th at midnight, we have to shut down our ActBlue, and any contributions received after midnight, we’ll have to return — _no exceptions._ The reality is that we’re behind where we want to be. Three months of not being able to fundraise will set us back if we don’t raise $20,000 by the end of the month. We need to build up our campaign’s reserves now to make sure we have the strongest quarter possible before the start of the legislative session in January. So what comes next? We need to focus our efforts on raising $20,000 by December 31.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I need your help to start the new year off as strong as possible.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
December 31 marks an important FEC fundraising deadline, and we still need help to reach our $10,000 goal.
#
Hi, Sarah here. I hope you're enjoying the holidays!
Personally I love the chance to spend quality time with loved ones — which is why when my team told me I should send another fundraising email before the end of the year, it made me feel a little bit like this:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241229-1?refcode=em20241229-1648&amount=5&refcode2=1648_21716_2vomBb&akid=1648%2E21716%2E2vomBb)
**But I can’t blame them, they’re right! December 31 marks an important FEC fundraising deadline, and we still need help to reach our $10,000 goal.**
[**Can you pitch in $5 before 2024 is over so we can start the new year off as strong as possible?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241229-1?refcode=em20241229-1648&amount=5&refcode2=1648_21716_2vomBb&akid=1648%2E21716%2E2vomBb)
Once I’m officially sworn in on January 3, there’s going to be a lot of work to do on behalf of our neighbors up and down Delaware.
And with Donald Trump in the White House and a new Republican majority in Congress, things are certainly looking chaotic.
But no matter what, I’m going to remain focused on the work Delawareans elected me to do: **bringing down costs, standing up for workers,** and making sure the progress we’ve made with the **Affordable Care Act** is protected.
So, I can't thank you enough for all the support you've shown me throughout this campaign. And I'm grateful to know that you'll continue to have my back in the months ahead.
[**With 2024 coming to a close in just a few days, can you pitch in $5 now to help us reach our $10,000 end-of-year goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241229-1?refcode=em20241229-1648&amount=5&refcode2=1648_21716_2vomBb&akid=1648%2E21716%2E2vomBb)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241229-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241229-1648&refcode2=1648_21716_2vomBb&akid=1648%2E21716%2E2vomBb)**
Thanks again,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241227-1&t=1&refcode2=1648_21716_2vomBb&akid=1648%2E21716%2E2vomBb)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1648%2E21716%2E2vomBb)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1648%2E21716%2E2vomBb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1648%2E21716%2E2vomBb)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Bill Gray
subject: A renewed hope
body:
One community, one school, one classroom, one student at a time

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eadfc21f736a4949ac8c4f2dcf9195aa&_e=-qDaRZWqMRLDGhOVWOp4pSrwyiZLsJK2NIjexJ6FYhN3rA80N0Uk57Ia1Apuxfxd_jS8jisKUNQVLvz9THwC6eLSOY4Dcw97kg-LfMtd0wO2Dj2wI7Khi36ev3AMVLKpXD_QFdULxYc4cKLbsg5bwBx3GZjUqHCUI4696DflBnhSSS5B0exZVsounsmU5ANqqDaKOOj0hqD7F1YfGZFg0WXMawKJ08j87_WPWHOfbQgr2c9xpAd2A5hjoaiI8h-z5Eid9fXpuXFV1-dPOIooYEvLiLCLo0cxvfCjayEWPxLZoo6s0uEfaSnCQ1tl50laLj461qclk6V4F0RFztVAubwSRN0CLCCdqY_xiIrjA7xM45zlFcXjdv6xpx9t_Siz)
---
| |
Peter,

It's cold and quiet in Hillsdale, Michigan today. I hope you're staying warm, and that you and your family are doing well. Our students have headed home for a much-needed break, and I wanted to send you a quick note as we approach the close of 2024.

The end of one year and the beginning of another is a natural time to reflect. When I think back over the year that was, I never could've predicted we'd be where we are today. Did you think we'd see...

Campus protests, legacy media censorship, wars in Europe and the Middle East, and multiple assassination attempts of a presidential candidate?

I certainly didn't!

At the same time...

This year ended with so many Americans showing they haven't given up on this country. A renewed hope is in the air. There is a feeling that we can and will accomplish great things again.

I don't know about you, but when I remember America and its leaders in my prayers, I am so grateful to God to live in a country where the people can still choose those leaders and where we can enjoy so much personal freedom.

Even with the events of the last few years, our country remains "the last, best hope on earth," to quote one of our country's greatest presidents--Abraham Lincoln.

Like America in Lincoln's time, our country is once again going through a time of crisis and division. That's why next year if we're going to restore liberty, we must educate all who wish to learn. [We must make it possible for them to do so for FREE if it is within our power.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eadfc21f736a4949ac8c4f2dcf9195aa&_e=-qDaRZWqMRLDGhOVWOp4pSrwyiZLsJK2NIjexJ6FYhN3rA80N0Uk57Ia1Apuxfxd_jS8jisKUNQVLvz9THwC6eLSOY4Dcw97kg-LfMtd0wO2Dj2wI7Khi36ev3AMVLKpXD_QFdULxYc4cKLbsg5bwBx3GZjUqHCUI4696DflBnhSSS5B0exZVsounsmU5ANqqDaKOOj0hqD7F1YfGZFg0WXMawKJ08j87_WPWHOfbQh3CsjS5Px2qgNbZxBKdMaflwqcZiNJ_qquZNcWknic7aSgIGzS5SDH1PT4ZDU2duDwy9iJUBOc7dqK6tuRVqKiBQI64iKsKQIkamr6rCBwJGSRic-cbjH-0xElRiCh2S8voevw2_1q85Lj2uD12fpB)

And that means that you and I must do all we can to teach the next generation the principles of liberty, something that Hillsdale does better than any other college in America.

We're committed to doing this no matter the cost because it's part of our 180-year-old mission to preserve "the blessings of liberty" we enjoy in America.

Our extensive **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** is one of the most effective ways to engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education.

Through _Imprimis_ , free online courses, the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and classical K-12 educational outreach, we are "developing minds and improving hearts," one community, one school, one classroom, one student at a time.

And this is multiplied by thousands and thousands...

If possible, could you consider making a generous tax-deductible gift before December 31? Hillsdale's mission is so important, and I know you stand with us. Your timely donation will help us continue to expand these programs in this **critical time for our nation while helping us reach our ambitious year-end fundraising goal.**

**If you 're able, please make your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $100, or even $250 before midnight on December 31. **

**We still have not reached our $6,000,000 goal, and time is running out.**

I've included a secure link for you to see our progress and to make your gift safely:

clean_body: One community, one school, one classroom, one student at a time A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Peter, It's cold and quiet in Hillsdale, Michigan today. I hope you're staying warm, and that you and your family are doing well. Our students have headed home for a much-needed break, and I wanted to send you a quick note as we approach the close of 2024. The end of one year and the beginning of another is a natural time to reflect. When I think back over the year that was, I never could've predicted we'd be where we are today. Did you think we'd see... Campus protests, legacy media censorship, wars in Europe and the Middle East, and multiple assassination attempts of a presidential candidate? I certainly didn't! At the same time... This year ended with so many Americans showing they haven't given up on this country. A renewed hope is in the air. There is a feeling that we can and will accomplish great things again. I don't know about you, but when I remember America and its leaders in my prayers, I am so grateful to God to live in a country where the people can still choose those leaders and where we can enjoy so much personal freedom. Even with the events of the last few years, our country remains "the last, best hope on earth," to quote one of our country's greatest presidents--Abraham Lincoln. Like America in Lincoln's time, our country is once again going through a time of crisis and division. That's why next year if we're going to restore liberty, we must educate all who wish to learn. And that means that you and I must do all we can to teach the next generation the principles of liberty, something that Hillsdale does better than any other college in America. We're committed to doing this no matter the cost because it's part of our 180-year-old mission to preserve "the blessings of liberty" we enjoy in America. Our extensive Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education is one of the most effective ways to engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. Through Imprimis , free online courses, the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and classical K-12 educational outreach, we are "developing minds and improving hearts," one community, one school, one classroom, one student at a time. And this is multiplied by thousands and thousands... If possible, could you consider making a generous tax-deductible gift before December 31? Hillsdale's mission is so important, and I know you stand with us. Your timely donation will help us continue to expand these programs in this critical time for our nation while helping us reach our ambitious year-end fundraising goal. If you 're able, please make your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $100, or even $250 before midnight on December 31. We still have not reached our $6,000,000 goal, and time is running out. I've included a secure link for you to see our progress and to make your gift safely: Please know how thankful I am to have you as a friend. Together, we can educate for liberty in America. Enjoy the rest of your day! Looking forward to hearing from you, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. There's more that we have to do to secure liberty in America in 2025. That's why we have an ambitious $6,000,000 online fundraising goal. So, would you be willing to make a gift to help reach and teach even more people? Here's a secure link for you to chip in a $50, $100, or even $250 gift: Thank you!

Friend : U.S. Senator Amy Klobuchar introduced and is working hard to pass the Election Worker Protection Act , which would would " provide states with the resources to recruit and train election workers and ensure these workers’ safety, while also instituting federal safeguards to shield election workers from intimidation and threats ". The bill includes provisions that were developed with input from election officials across the country.
We want to see how our members feel about this legislation. Please take our quick survey:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122924_1&amount=25]

body:
As we move forward in the Trump era, we know that the fight to protect our democracy, our values, and our future is starting once again.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99459703/519971814/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzY5M2RiZi0wMGM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtZJAqOa76MXyTlkb5hsDl9tSTjl_5iYbYIhllw5Z84=&emci=6c71fa44-5dbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=87693dbf-00c6-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=26261389)

| | The next few years will be full of uncertainty, but one thing is clear: **the challenges we face will require bold action, unwavering commitment to our values, and all of us standing together.** As we move forward in the Trump era, we know that the fight to protect our democracy, our values, and our future is starting once again. With Trump and his allies in the White House, we must build a movement and stand up against the rising tide of divisive rhetoric, corruption in politics, and threats to the progress we've worked so hard to achieve. Andy has always fought for our values in the House, and now he's bringing that fight to the Senate, ready to push back against the MAGA forces that seek to divide us. He's ready to protect healthcare, defend our civil rights, and be a caretaker for our democracy. **But he can't do it alone.** **We are gearing up for an even tougher fight in the years ahead, and we need your help to grow our powerful movement.** [**Today, we're asking you to pitch in $3 or whatever you can to ensure that we have the resources to build up our grassroots stretch to take on the challenges of today and tomorrow—from defending our democratic institutions to pushing for policies that lift up every American. name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: “Are these deadlines made up?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P

A lot of people ask me, “What is the end-of-quarter anyway?" Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. Hey Team — a lot of people ask me, _“What is the end-of-quarter anyway? And why do you need to reach a goal before it?”_ So I’m going to explain it to you, but if you already know the gist, let me ask: [**Will you please donate $5 to our first end-of-quarter goal since the election? We barely survived our fight here in FL-23, and Republicans are already gunning for this seat as a result.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99459763/519971975/1921673955?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.29_EOQ1_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjhlNTEwNi0wMWM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aA19YWXN9FuSnRtF6Izzps-3X_wWFplS_RB0NVbCX9I=) [CHIP IN $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99459764/519971976/1921673955?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.29_EOQ1_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjhlNTEwNi0wMWM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aA19YWXN9FuSnRtF6Izzps-3X_wWFplS_RB0NVbCX9I=) I promised, so here’s the answer: Four times a year we are required to publicly disclose how much we have raised. Strategists, journalists, donors, and our opponents all pay close attention to these numbers, so what you report can have a _huge_ impact on how the race turns out. We came very close to losing in November. **So if we post a weak fundraising number for this quarter, GOP Super PACs will pounce. ** But if we reach our goal and put up a strong showing, it will kickstart our momentum and show the GOP that we fully intend on holding this seat. [**This is the first end-of-quarter deadline since Election Day, so it will set the tone for the entire campaign. Please, will you rush in $5 so we can reach our $12,000 goal? The stakes could not be higher. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99459765/519971977/1921673955?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.29_EOQ1_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjhlNTEwNi0wMWM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aA19YWXN9FuSnRtF6Izzps-3X_wWFplS_RB0NVbCX9I=) If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [CHIP IN $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99459766/519971978/1921673955?express_lane=true&amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.29_EOQ1_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjhlNTEwNi0wMWM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aA19YWXN9FuSnRtF6Izzps-3X_wWFplS_RB0NVbCX9I=)

name: GIFFORDS
subject: We won’t try and beat around the bush
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
There’s no better day than today to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC
#

We’ll be direct with you, team: [**We’re reaching out to ask you to make another contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our FEC fundraising deadline passes tomorrow at midnight.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241229-1-b&t=1&akid=9716%2E3935704%2EalayeP)
We’ve made so much progress in our movement to end gun violence because people like you care enough to get involved. Just by reading these emails, you’ve shown us that gun safety is one of your top priorities.
But today, we’re asking you to take the important next step of making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our FEC fundraising deadline passes tomorrow at midnight. After our FEC deadline, our fundraising numbers go **_public._** If we come up short, the gun lobby and the MAGA right will take it as a sign of weakness and use our shortcomings as an opportunity to attack our movement.
There truly is no better day than today to join the hundreds of thousands of others who have already contributed to support our mission to end gun violence.
[**So please, will you make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? We need your support to help us reach our 2024 goals and prepare for the road ahead in 2025.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241229-1-b&t=2&akid=9716%2E3935704%2EalayeP)

Peter,
Please don’t scroll past this one-minute read.
It’s Sunday, December 29. In less than one month, Donald Trump will be sworn in for a second term alongside a Republican Congress to do his bidding.
We must be ready to protect our shared values, no matter what comes our way next year — from extreme legislation and executive orders to chaotic political fights over personal grievances. And we have to be ready on day one.
But here’s the truth: With only two days left until our first and only public fundraising deadline of the year, we’re still falling short of our critical target.
**Peter, to make up the difference so we can protect our rights, freedoms, and way of life in Minnesota next year, we still need to raise $19,000 by midnight on Tuesday.**
[**If you’re able, will you pitch in $10, $25, $50, or whatever works for you right now to help us prove that our movement has never been stronger in the New Year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99460218/519973145/2147450176?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTE1MjJmOS0wMWM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GcLVv8l0nhPLrx1z9aW7Flc7xJwNwn5O_g860rh-oaE=)

_A big thank you to everyone for the ongoing engagement, it 's great to see such a diversity of thoughts and ideas in the comment section and emails. As always, please keep them coming! Also, please continue to share the Substack with anyone you think might be interested and, if you're able, you can [become a paid subscriber here](https://substack.com/redirect/e5643b79-d74c-42b1-acd1-16d10b0d6112?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
_In every single comment section on this Substack you will find multiple posts with concerns about the media. I've been wanting to include special guests here for a little while now and those comments have given me the perfect excuse._
_Today I'm excited to bring a perspective on the current state of the media from my friend and favorite independent media option, Brian Tyler Cohen. If you don't know him please check out his[YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/aa03e13f-489a-43dc-b120-6e1496f3bf73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where he provides the public, including his 3.5 million followers, the type of news that the established media doesn't provide._
_He has a deep reservoir of knowledge and experience with both traditional and independent media, and he's got an explanation of what 's going on and why -- alongside some choice words for the current media establishment's approach and what we can do about it!_
_Without further ado, here 's Brian Tyler Cohen._
_-- Lucas_
* * *
Hey everybody, I'm Brian Tyler Cohen. It's an honor to be a guest here on Lucas's Substack, and I wanted to use the opportunity to speak to an issue close to my heart and my work. It's also one that has been blowing up in our faces as, one by one, corporate media outlets are displaying a disturbing trend of muzzling themselves and obeying in advance. In doing so, they are underscoring how crucially important it is that we continue to cultivate, grow, and support our independent media ecosystem.
So just a few days ago, a rare phenomenon occurred: Donald Trump told the truth:
_**" The media has tamed down a little bit. They're liking us much better now, I think. If they don't, we'll have to just take them on again, and we don't want to do that."**_
OK...so not the _whole_ truth. It's a mighty stretch to suggest that anybody _likes_ Trump any more than they did six weeks ago. But the media has clearly tamed down more than a little bit...and it's a disgrace. Over the past few weeks, we've seen practically every legacy media outlet swiftly fall in line in an abrupt, unspeakably disappointing fashion.
By now, you've all heard Timothy Snyder's oft-repeated first lesson from his essential handbook, _On Tyranny_ : "Do not obey in advance." The members of our so-called "free press" have heard it too--nevertheless, they're putting on a clinic demonstrating this precise form of obedience.
The shameless folding of our so-called fourth estate is a longstanding problem, but folks started paying closer attention to its failings in the run-up to November's election. Jeff Bezos prevented the _Washington Post_ from endorsing Kamala Harris, even though the decision had already been approved by the head of the editorial board. In doing so, Bezos put an alarming halt on an institutional tradition that had lasted for the last nine presidential elections.
The _LA Times_ and its billionaire owner, Patrick Soon-Shiong, quickly followed suit--and has since made a number of unconscionable proposals for the paper, including using AI to neatly offer "both sides" of every story. (Implicit in that suggestion is his apparent belief that journalism is not concerned with delivering facts.)
The next to bend, following years of searing coverage of Trump, were Joe Scarborough and Mika Brzezinski, hosts of MSNBC's flagship AM program "Morning Joe." The pair stunned viewers by announcing they had gone down to Mar-a-Lago for some amicable face time with the president-elect.
CNN made Trump-appendage and reliable lap dog pundit Scott Jennings a fixture of their political coverage, while issuing misleading statements about Trump's favorability in the country; using a poll of just over 1,000 people but implying such a limited frame represented the nation's opinion.
Social media wasn't far behind with their shows of "I never meant the words I said," with Elon Musk running DOGE and shadowing Trump like a dipshit, and Mark Zuckerberg donating a million bucks to Trump's inauguration fund (followed shortly by Bezos's Amazon matching the seven-figure donation). How radically courageous to be so very subservient.
And of course, the _New York Times_ has trafficked so deeply in both sides-ism over the last few years that it's become a parody of itself. We saw this near-perfect refraction of their nauseating trend toward false equivalency and selective outrage in the coverage of President Biden's pardon of his son. The[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/bd262191-590a-447a-b5e5-ebaa8bd1891a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[New York Times](https://substack.com/redirect/bd262191-590a-447a-b5e5-ebaa8bd1891a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _responded:
**" The nation needs integrity, and Biden's dishonesty contributes to the sense that there isn't really that much difference between Trump and his opponents."**
Ahh, yes. Biden perceiving a radically-elevated threat to our nation's justice system and consequently pardoning Hunter for lying about his sobriety on an application to purchase a gun _isn 't really that much different_ from Trump's promise to pardon many or most of the January 6th insurrectionists who HE incited to breach our Capitol, attempt to lynch his Vice President, seek to kill Nancy Pelosi and who knows how many other lawmakers, and try to _overthrow our government_ in an attempted coup. According to the self-styled paper of record, that's apparently an apples-to-apples comparison.
And _then_ , last weekend, surprise news broke that ABC News had reached a settlement with Trump in his defamation suit against the host, with ABC agreeing to pay $15 million to Trump's presidential foundation and $1 million for his legal fees. The suit was brought over George Stephanopoulos stating that a jury found that Trump had raped E. Jean Carroll. Remember, that's only slightly off: the jury _did_ find Trump liable for sexual abuse, with Judge Lewis Kaplan explaining, in writing, that:
"The finding that Ms. Carroll failed to prove that she was 'raped' within the meaning of the New York Penal Law does not mean that she failed to prove that Mr. Trump 'raped' her as many people commonly understand the word 'rape.'" He concluded: "Indeed, as the evidence at trial recounted below makes clear, the jury found that Mr. Trump in fact did exactly that."
So here's the thing about a defamation case against a public figure. If this had gone to court, Trump's team would have had to prove _actual malice_ , meaning proof that Stephanopoulos knew with certainty that his statement was false and recklessly declared it anyway. Stephanopoulos saying a jury found Trump liable for rape is a distinction without much of a difference in terms of what the presiding judge stated. It's certainly not a "reckless" statement declared with "malice."
Trump also would have had to prove damages, i.e. evidence that the comment had caused substantive reputational harm or financial hardship. Does anybody believe that George Stephanopoulos caused Trump _the slightest bit_ of harm? Is there some massive subset of ABC News' Sunday audience that suddenly swung away from Trump after hearing the coverage? Did Trump lose his ability to raise money? Of course not. But that didn't stop ABC from settling for FIFTEEN MILLION DOLLARS. That money will be put in escrow toward a fund for a future Trump library or foundation.
But... _why?_
For one thing, ABC saw the upside of giving a vast sum of money to a man who makes no secret of his willingness to accept payment in exchange for his good graces. Secondly, this method of ass-kissing has a cover of plausible deniability. "This wasn't just proving fidelity to Trump through money! Nooo, definitely not. We were forced to pay him _legally_ , because of the defamation." How convenient.
It's deeply distressing for the American public to behold these publications, hosts, and outlets going out of their way to curry favor with Trump, by kissing the ring in the buffet line at Mar-a-Lago or writing hefty checks to make it plain that he's got them under his tiny thumb.
And look, I know the _Washington Post_ 's motto has become a punching bag--but it is horrifying that the instant "Democracy Dies in Darkness" was challenged, our media gave way and rolled over for Trump, delivering exactly what he and his repressive government want: submission, cash, and control. When Bezos acquired the _Washington Post,_ he spoke earnestly of how many of us believe "that certain institutions have a very important role in making sure that there is light." But he and a shocking number of our supposed business and media titans have proven that, in fact, Democracy can also die in broad daylight.
Oh, and let's not forget that _Time Magazine_([who, in 2017, asked Trump to remove the fake covers](https://substack.com/redirect/7535c27a-7675-491a-a045-c0ad024cf718?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of himself that he had placed on the wall of several golf clubs) dubbed him Person of the Year for 2024. In keeping with the absurd pageantry of all this misplaced obedience and adulation, Trump was then asked to ring the bell of the New York Stock Exchange--which his [ass-backward tariff strategy](https://substack.com/redirect/be7dd302-638d-4010-89a0-408830f81807?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is likely to run into the ground in short order.
As we careen toward Trump's second term with its supporting cast of incompetent misfits, these examples of our spineless mainstream press--with exceptions, of course, but not enough of them--serve as a potent reminder of how vitally essential it is for big-D Democrats and little-d democracy to bolster independent media.
The left has relied on legacy media for far too long to act as its spokespeople. Yet all the major players have done little but broadcast just how unwilling and unfit they are for that task. They're either fearful of our president-elect's retribution, beholden to their billionaire owner's business interests, or just unwilling to risk ruffling Trump's fragile feathers. Clearly, maintaining integrity doesn't pay as well as Trump's nod of approval does. If Democrats have any hope of succeeding in the future--and of receiving accurate information along the way--we must embrace media who prioritize resisting a despot over gaining his favor.
Witnessing a succession of trusted media kowtowing to a lying, unpatriotic, wannabe tyrant drains our limited reserves of willpower and resolve. We have manifold reasons to lose our heart and our nerve. But we can't. **Do not give in.** There remain countless voices who are refusing to obey in advance. That defiance must continue undeterred, no matter what this next term brings, if we are to keep this republic. Stay in the fight. You are necessary.
The vast majority of the voices who publicly refuse to surrender operate without boards or trustees, dubious funding, or government affiliation. I am entirely committed to providing independent analysis and commentary, none of which is beholden to any corporate power, advertisers, or external influences.
I don't know how much more proof we need to confirm that legacy media is not going to save us. As outlet after outlet drops the ball, it is more important than ever to get behind the creators who are ready to pick it up and preserve the integrity of our message and our democracy.
As we steel ourselves for the long fight ahead, if you'd like to support my work--as well as the larger, far more significant mission of encouraging independent media, please do [check out my work and subscribe to my substack](https://substack.com/redirect/c9f93d7c-93f8-4643-ab40-7e871e5c14f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Many thanks to Lucas, and to all of you, for giving me the time and space to share my perspective on the perilous state of our media landscape.

Billions of views on YouTube. #1 NYT bestselling author of "Shameless."[Subscribe to Brian](https://substack.com/redirect/78d2a3a8-bd77-4f52-afaa-ff97ffb42185?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Jalen Nix, Deputy Executive Director
subject: we need the resources

body:
| |
---
Peter,

We are only 2 days away from 2025, and still short of our $25k end of year goal. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Despite this year’s setbacks, we still made incredible strides for building Black political power this cycle. Now, with Donald Trump heading back to the White House, we have an uphill battle ahead of us. Over the next few years, we’ll have to be prepared to fight back against his dangerous agenda — that means we MUST elect Black Democrats who are ready to defend our communities. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We’re planning for 2025 and beyond, Peter — looking at the critical work that needs to be done in order to build Black political power on the federal, state, and local levels, as well as mobilizing and educating Black voters. body:
---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99460644/519974470/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241229_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgwZjVkNS0wMmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZv22z6G7oCVIhbH8OC9UMh6HnUtoYSxHp-Tj8lt3Ns=)

Peter, we’re only 48 hours away from our End of Year Deadline, so I’ll be quick.
I need you to understand three essential things in this critical moment for the future of our country.
[**1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99460648/519974476/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241229_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgwZjVkNS0wMmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZv22z6G7oCVIhbH8OC9UMh6HnUtoYSxHp-Tj8lt3Ns=) → Only THREE Republican seats stand between Democrats and retaking the House majority.
[**2**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99460655/519974481/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241229_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgwZjVkNS0wMmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZv22z6G7oCVIhbH8OC9UMh6HnUtoYSxHp-Tj8lt3Ns=) → Building an early foundation of support is critical to our ability to deliver the resources we need to win.
[**3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99460661/519974488/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241229_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgwZjVkNS0wMmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZv22z6G7oCVIhbH8OC9UMh6HnUtoYSxHp-Tj8lt3Ns=) → This is our [**FINAL**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99460663/519974494/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241229_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgwZjVkNS0wMmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZv22z6G7oCVIhbH8OC9UMh6HnUtoYSxHp-Tj8lt3Ns=) chance to raise the funds we need to head into 2025 stronger than ever.
Peter, I know Democrats can win back the House majority. It’s going to take all of us to do it.
[**Republicans aren’t waiting until the new year to begin raising funds to expand their majority. That’s why we have to start earlier than ever.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99460664/519974495/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241229_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgwZjVkNS0wMmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZv22z6G7oCVIhbH8OC9UMh6HnUtoYSxHp-Tj8lt3Ns=)
[_**As you read this, we have already started working to win the next election. This early work is critical to giving Democrats the foundation we need to succeed. That is why I’m asking another 6,816 supporters to chip in $15 before our FINAL deadline of the year, demonstrate an undeniable foundation of support and help us build our path to unprecedented victory. Will you chip in $15 to renew your 2025 Democratic Membership and stand up for the future of our Democrats? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99460665/519974496/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241229_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgwZjVkNS0wMmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZv22z6G7oCVIhbH8OC9UMh6HnUtoYSxHp-Tj8lt3Ns=)

name: THANK YOU HOUSE DEMOCRATS! (VPP)
subject: your signature spot expires tonight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
this makes us proud to be Democrats
| Team, while House Republicans have broken records for their incompetence the past 2 years, House Democrats stood unified for the American people!

We’re reaching out to 200 TOP Democrats across the country with the exclusive opportunity to thank House Democrats for their amazing work! **Hurry, your signature spot isn’t open long:[ Sign the thank you card now! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85636?t=6&akid=18310%2E878179%2EKLA1Xe)** | [Donate $3 to sign the card now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85636?t=7&akid=18310%2E878179%2EKLA1Xe)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear House Democrats,

_Thank you for your incredible work for the American people!_**

The Republican majority is a total DISASTER. They threatened government shutdowns, tried to impeach President Biden, and even ousted their own Speaker!

**But thanks to you, we were able to narrow their majority down to RAZOR-THIN margins this November!**

Speaker Mike Johnson is PANICKING — Democrats could flip the House BLUE as soon as 2025 in critical special elections!

Your strength makes me proud to be a Democrat — **and gives me hope that we can take down the GOP’s majority in just a matter of months!****

[**Fighting against the MAGA dark money machine won’t be easy, so I’m chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to enter the new year strong and get to work to FLIP THE HOUSE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85636?t=8&akid=18310%2E878179%2EKLA1Xe) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85636?t=9&akid=18310%2E878179%2EKLA1Xe)
---
**_X A GRATEFUL AMERICAN_**
–The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18310%2E878179%2EKLA1Xe). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18310%2E878179%2EKLA1Xe).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18310%2E878179%2EKLA1Xe) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=18310%2E878179%2EKLA1Xe). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18310%2E878179%2EKLA1Xe)
---

body:
| | | Y'all -- I'm scratching my head trying to figure out if there's ANY WAY I can convince you to ACT!

Right now, Trump is teeing up his next wild administration, and every second we hesitate is another second MAGA Republicans could get the jump on us to stay in power even longer.

I've got a lot to catch you up on, but first I have to ask:

**[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to rush $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before Tuesday's end-of-year deadline to flip the Senate out of Donald Trump's tiny hands?!](https://go.dscc.org/go/20851?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241229-JamesCarville-CarvilleAnythingICanSayRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241229-JamesCarville-CarvilleAnythingICanSayRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19170%2E9716520%2EuB_OAy)**

What if I told you that Donald Trump's already hammering his MAGA majority in line to pass his wacko agenda?

What if I told you we have a helluva shot at retaking the Senate -- especially with TWO possible special elections coming up for Vance's and Rubio's seats?

**What if I told you that if we pull this off and flip the Senate, we'd be cutting the Trump agenda's shelf life in HALF?**

Folks, there's plenty of reasons Trump and his cronies want you to give up the fight. But that's all the more reason to keep on fighting.

**So I'm going to say this as directly as I can: MAGA Republicans may have control for now, but you better believe we have a shot to take it ALL back. That's why I'm talking your ear off now, so please:**

clean_body: | | | Y'all -- I'm scratching my head trying to figure out if there's ANY WAY I can convince you to ACT! Right now, Trump is teeing up his next wild administration, and every second we hesitate is another second MAGA Republicans could get the jump on us to stay in power even longer. I've got a lot to catch you up on, but first I have to ask: | | What if I told you that Donald Trump's already hammering his MAGA majority in line to pass his wacko agenda? What if I told you we have a helluva shot at retaking the Senate -- especially with TWO possible special elections coming up for Vance's and Rubio's seats? What if I told you that if we pull this off and flip the Senate, we'd be cutting the Trump agenda's shelf life in HALF? Folks, there's plenty of reasons Trump and his cronies want you to give up the fight. But that's all the more reason to keep on fighting. So I'm going to say this as directly as I can: MAGA Republicans may have control for now, but you better believe we have a shot to take it ALL back. That's why I'm talking your ear off now, so please: If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thank you. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “Calls for Giuliani to be held in contempt of court”

body:
“He’s not going to be permitted to speak.”
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0bc7e08d1c7e4e46b86d2de3c72aa6b1&_e=Pc_f3MuQxOIK_1q_MLu-c3KrZoyHTROxTso0jxy7T_vncshC-_pXazy30psrF_93ETEFoqM2Qg2ZDUQ-Z5lx2FZsQb7sugmfgwZv7S3J_GRRyBQbC53R4y--pEcy2ztetrcmvVNzJzYd3PwDhkaBqckUQ5bt3-89LQOS3Vh_DBYpQYOc0tfHZ-6kR_Mzc_seBAzxW2r2-mBYrwQU51Guj0p9ar1ZZ32K_YLA5tzaN8opyaBt7NgR_zW24UW-yKXnt45ISWFM11Yk4Eve25N2PoDgeRppRwIxFAH0cjeQz2OTnmjZTqIOB3Y4VHl1yjHWrwwUa04ywrZZUDI6I12TN_W8jqxap96xXIzZJ4kgEXS1RlQFEU0Gn50z46FvZuPI6aw6Jka54EyGXF0t7tJvib_Nzzsg1C2v6ZK6RUQtccgYK3YGjVv3tVRYyOpbtcD5)
---
Dear Peter,
---
According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly **_“hold me in contempt.”_**
---
Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – _yours truly_ – bankrupt and behind bars.
---
During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, __I will not be permitted to speak.__
---
It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech.
---
But I will _never_ _surrender_ this battle, _because**freedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for.**_
---
They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom!
---
**With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you.**
---
_Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can keep fighting for my rights and freedom against the Left’s vicious witch hunt.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0bc7e08d1c7e4e46b86d2de3c72aa6b1&_e=Pc_f3MuQxOIK_1q_MLu-c3KrZoyHTROxTso0jxy7T_vncshC-_pXazy30psrF_93ETEFoqM2Qg2ZDUQ-Z5lx2FZsQb7sugmfgwZv7S3J_GRRyBQbC53R4y--pEcy2ztetrcmvVNzJzYd3PwDhkaBqckUQ5bt3-89LQOS3Vh_DBYpQYOc0tfHZ-6kR_Mzc_seBAzxW2r2-mBYrwQU51Guj0p9ar1ZZ32K_YLA5tzaN8opyaBt7NgR_zW24UW-yKXnt45ISWFM11Yk4Eve25N2PoDgeRppRwIxFAH0cjeQz2Pv-2kadbwRQ84DEccdX7aafmTS5tzayiBieyBncZwL31x2W2kGGEpbvzw2KatojD5xONfCDrsAnOutkDcZqp7CdshFkGpf_wWc5iLz7lu51-Ba-0rGXllNKv_chewzZlJpv8WtFPDWIdCCgw6lcV-D)

body:
Our mission at DWS PAC is to strategically direct resources to help elect Democrats around the country, and our success depends on support from thousands of donors across the country. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.dwspac.com/p/bg-w4eO8DEWuKhf2unAuQg2?unsubscribedata=OFShRGRv6rUcHX84Pd1Jwnh7esqvQkX4r4KLLFeueYKLJXPjb6%2FYXpESP8aV1U8%2FVXzYfLzAua6Rkw0zp3hZpBn%2F87JLZp0ymTQoxfwsYVrUCVxFpQBjEyeerDvCrdBEeBqOnQNG7FXMlV9JyRT%2Fq9FGep6lbxIWtGuZnTnnlkJed3OCOal0mZY3mE6KigmoUK7%2BgNXYgGsZmBKP0CqZWLzBzeg6zEnY5S%2BIdo%2BdXuwn8ehM2X628MDQMELY3VdfBLP7RkAKcZKI553B9cgEHwCJ2KoEVYnNyKpazZEEmrYuXYNOCkasBjSJ6AiT3eD%2FDhnr7qJOoONMzAGTyAkssxtDLBwc959dJOtz0Egb5doeky6odE9hk8g520XMTv%2BiozYNf1vrD%2B3FxrRHZa903bwTBoOBfmIqDudN6rJGr%2Fo%3D).

| Peter,

Last cycle, Democrats Win Seats raised and gave more than $700,000 to help elect Democrats in critical seats around the country — flipping EIGHT seats this year and leaving Republicans with the smallest House majority in nearly a century.

But our work doesn’t stop here. Our new mission: **retaking the House in 2026.**

This work won’t be easy or cheap — that’s why we need to start early. **[We set a goal to raise $8,000 by the end of the year to make sure we finish strong and are on track to start the work ahead. subject: Thank you President Biden for your service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
With President Biden’s presidency coming to an end, we want to say thank you for his service to the American people

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q42024_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q42024_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]We’re letting 5,000 top Democrats sign onto this exclusive Thank You Letter, and you have been hand-selected to participate but you have to redeem this offer before 6am tomorrow! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q42024_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]

CHIP IN $7 TO SIGN THE THANK YOU PRESIDENT BIDEN LETTER BEFORE THE END OF THE YEAR » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q42024_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]

TO: President Biden
FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: Thank you for your service to the American people
Dear President Biden,
Thank you for how you have bravely led our nation over the past four years.
When you came into office, you immediately started cleaning up Donald Trump’s mess and put the priorities of everyday Americans at the top of your list.
You saved MILLIONS of lives during the pandemic.
You lowered prescription drug prices.
You passed the BIGGEST Climate Solutions Investment Bill ever.
You created MILLIONS of jobs for working people.
Because I’m so thankful for how you’ve advanced the people’s agenda during your presidency, I’m pitching in $7 to Democracy On the Line so we can continue building on this progress. It’s more critical than ever for Democrats to stand together! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q42024_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]

I wanted to share a quick update on our team’s progress toward our goal as we close in on our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2024. **We set out to raise a fairly modest $20,000 before we close out the year. Right now, we're sitting right around $7,300 raised.** [**We have some work to do, but if just 1 out of every 5 supporters reading this email makes a donation, we will _easily_ hit this goal before ringing in the new year. Here’s why this goal matters:
For better or worse, pundits are going to use our end-of-year numbers to determine the strength of our movement. I'm not keen on listening to the judgments of the media, but the truth is that showing sustained momentum will bolster our standing, and can help ward off potential Republican challengers.

-Eric

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked. I was not going to stand for that.
#

Peter -
I can trace my path to this moment back to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked. I was not going to stand for that.
Growing up poor, I worked hard for the American Dream. But I got a ton of help, too. From my family, from my community, and from the country itself.
After all of that help, I knew I had a debt to repay to the United States of America and our people. That’s why I decided to serve — first in the Marines, then in state government, then in Congress, and now in the U.S. Senate.
I don’t want a ton of fancy things out of life. I want my family to be safe, I want to help Arizona, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
We’ve got some tough fights ahead of us in 2025. But this country has given me so much — and I’m not about to give up on it.
If we’re going to be ready on day one of 2025, I need your help. So please:
[**Can you use this link to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford before our final FEC deadline of the year on December 31st? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in. That’s the way we’ll make it through: together.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec24.kYyuzx&refcode=em241229-1-90&t=1&akid=3622%2E734936%2EywJ3el)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: WolfPack Bag
subject: Introducing my NEW concealed carry Wolf Pack (Complimentary S&H!)
body:
I've got something here you're gonna like...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19517/6374453/d6b03c0c60a9054802cc8e439d336e4a27395de6/17231aadecd8219dc73ba66681cd262a3fa02190)
---
| | |
---
_December 29th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
I've got something here you're gonna like...
We just got our first shipment of **Wolf Packs** in the warehouse!
I’m so pumped about it, I’m knocking [**60% OFF and giving you free shipping today.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19517/6374453/d6b03c0c60a9054802cc8e439d336e4a27395de6/17231aadecd8219dc73ba66681cd262a3fa02190)
Listen, this is my sneakiest CCW holster EVER!
But it’s not just an ambidextrous holster...
**This pack carries your:**
* Phone
* Cash and credit cards
* Backup magazine
* Hunting knife
* Throwing stars
* Rain poncho
* Bear spray
* Passport...
* And a bag of chips!

You get the point...
The Wolf Pack is a concealed carry lumbar pack that allows you to carry your gun when you’re not wearing a belt.. or even pants!

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A moment I won’t forget
body:
It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father.
|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=40917b816e2f48e5a26854ee49f7a134&_t=Wf0o3P5hP4JE962NyIp1mrbhCpXipglIOzmBSSXFy0fGSP78veE9UhCCmxUvvWJB6zCTQ6TFUGJwNdqM3mcfS8oIazDSWuzNAxy93mupB6OEnScNKtq-CjX40_-e5TPF)_
---
| | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=40917b816e2f48e5a26854ee49f7a134&_e=fhkrfCIri7RQHMRh8iLrZW5MqkOihP6PiwyXI7ddA5-EXo3eezvVhtISFg1XM14lZwc1nXSjU3TlPj4I5ONoI6ASgqtAwtEtw062T_NMXrDoFSeMuopNRLs1vvHWPIRM_hKvBseYjPnknfU1cHqKQU0UAx9kg4GbkcVqQHz4hEKmlEXm9q_FgRw5507MJbnRPOn-7a010p-Mak30XryoO1ZxliOodNvSkKn2e1yzzr3N8MY8o1IFSbCGem6-l53XvYLIkpoEVlXQOtlW0TolpETW1Oe9lMfQRclE3yogIrzThvl5dolbakVT3KHrUS5t-7P7aG9yuaoodse6Rg6zDvD_PsRjZDVyq_WiO4Isi8lnf988Jz17495uDP8dSR3Sax3TRdu9c762HDPsczmQw3tdpjRFioovzkONDqDRVA8-ozeLkVVi56Tc959ooa7Y)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=40917b816e2f48e5a26854ee49f7a134&_e=fhkrfCIri7RQHMRh8iLrZW5MqkOihP6PiwyXI7ddA5-EXo3eezvVhtISFg1XM14lZwc1nXSjU3TlPj4I5ONoI6ASgqtAwtEtw062T_NMXrDoFSeMuopNRLs1vvHWPIRM_hKvBseYjPnknfU1cHqKQU0UAx9kg4GbkcVqQHz4hEKmlEXm9q_FgRw5507MJbnRPOn-7a010p-Mak30XryoO1ZxliOodNvSkKn2e1yzzr3N8MY8o1IFSbCGem6-l53XvYLIkpoEVlXQOtlW0TolpCPPQSrFf828MLMtFFhpkn0MBKP9fdz-W4bnlX1S8xTerc2nP16r8dv2ostGJJWtljBba2nJK8Zep66DowP8tVRNaCy0D-gdCNhn-ctjNdJmk9LTAh4lwg02TyQ5xi20V4h6Y9sCgOwgfKaCCRPiYJ934tffrznjaE6CRQYO5vd7)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=40917b816e2f48e5a26854ee49f7a134&_e=fhkrfCIri7RQHMRh8iLrZW5MqkOihP6PiwyXI7ddA5-EXo3eezvVhtISFg1XM14lZwc1nXSjU3TlPj4I5ONoI6ASgqtAwtEtw062T_NMXrDoFSeMuopNRLs1vvHWPIRM_hKvBseYjPnknfU1cHqKQU0UAx9kg4GbkcVqQHz4hEKmlEXm9q_FgRw5507MJbnRPOn-7a010p-Mak30XryoO1ZxliOodNvSkKn2e1yzzr3N8MY8o1IFSbCGem6-l53XvYLIkpoEVlXQOtlW0TolpBpxDk4TDOK5TM_w8Gdb6sN5NnHoQZnpOQ8vMHmTwzlFDqrvJfrumRq5Vnqq9KARGknghO9K2hDjzNoPFMaPvcKet5_7H0Ky5f_sV5q0pfqetmDDkeZBrp_hUpot5Mb9v-8dpleE9qJUrnj4oCyfBACpyyNGJjvRK-9qonDbxtSz)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=40917b816e2f48e5a26854ee49f7a134&_e=fhkrfCIri7RQHMRh8iLrZW5MqkOihP6PiwyXI7ddA5-EXo3eezvVhtISFg1XM14lZwc1nXSjU3TlPj4I5ONoI442loSLxNMGIj_CyTw1j7aEY4CXqirqLihKQD25kiheh1twLEKegEefoqrT40o1DZHmcg3Mpd7fDBnwpgfv5SNlcoXlzuZoZBh-BAAREQ3UWj2mRbCkcLIuKijlJ5eaxxtok0mUETl8SHGgMXMtIE2H0ujB-ASgJHVfxqK_Bbn5Wg9u_yawMTdRUAWe-dxLQGFYcTR74tIR3Jd82bHBcXsKJdu_n5Dfpkx96DLH7ov7aHlJxopdEoNQJl_eG-S2ezv7uZB5mBI8fu6T32JpAuVoyrdgaW0_1uFQ3kyTe1rITEkPZfhqOlwkGz3JfKAsVDyEZXpABncpOqczWdPe2ZsFiICEK3tmzXmOn-D_icox)
---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=40917b816e2f48e5a26854ee49f7a134&_t=Wf0o3P5hP4JE962NyIp1mrbhCpXipglIOzmBSSXFy0fGSP78veE9UhCCmxUvvWJB6zCTQ6TFUGJwNdqM3mcfS8oIazDSWuzNAxy93mupB6OEnScNKtq-CjX40_-e5TPF).

---

As we close out 2024, I am privileged to share a top 25 list of the articles you read the most this year. When I launched _Let 's Address This_ just over eight months ago, I did not expect to close the year publishing more than 265 articles, with nearly 12 million reads, more than 90,000 amazing followers, and subscribers from all 50 states and 140 countries. **Make no mistake --this became possible due to your support.** For that, I am both grateful and encouraged to continue into 2025 and beyond.
I hope you enjoy this recap, continue to share this human rights content, and join our growing community as a paid subscriber to further elevate our advocacy. **Let 's Address This.**
**As we enter 2025, we need all hands on deck to combat the onslaught of fascism**. Please join our efforts and become a paid subscriber below!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..J8rtJUgzF81WppDG0QWGjjU6hIQm9I-DiPBCApcB1tI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153756452)
As you review these articles below, you'll no doubt notice the breadth of human rights topics we cover from local to global. Feel free to share, comment below which articles were most meaningful to you, and even what you would like to see more of in 2025.
## Top 25 articles of 2024 -- 25th to 17th
25. [Debunking the NRA's 9 Favorite Gun Myths](https://substack.com/redirect/ba86b1fe-89ab-482b-a18a-d52af12199fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As four more innocent people are massacred in the 385th mass shooting of 2024, we are beyond the point of needing critical federal gun safety legislation
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/66ac44a8-3709-43bb-ac96-9a739da2dc0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(L/R) Richard Aspinwall, Christina Irimie, Mason Schermerhorn, Christian Angulo. Victims in the Apalachee High School shooting on September 4.

24. [Fact Checking the First Presidential Debate Between Harris and Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/d630a394-0471-4c9d-9381-492e8479c493?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Two near diametrically opposite visions of the future of our country -- breaking it down into bite sized paragraphs
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8359a5bc-281d-4e8b-ba83-30b1393b11cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Trump (L) and Harris (R)

Palestine (Green) and Israel (Blue) borders since 1946.

When I launched Let 's Address This just over eight months ago, I did not expect to close the year publishing more than 265 articles, with nearly 12 million reads, more than 90,000 amazing followers, and subscribers from all 50 states and 140 countries. Make no mistake --this became possible due to your support. For that, I am both grateful and encouraged to continue into 2025 and beyond. I hope you enjoy this recap, continue to share this human rights content, and join our growing community as a paid subscriber to further elevate our advocacy. Let 's Address This. As we enter 2025, we need all hands on deck to combat the onslaught of fascism. Please join our efforts and become a paid subscriber below! name: Laura Friedman
subject: 🎱 What does pool have to do with politics?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99464377/519985835/158001685?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk1YTkzZmUtMDdjNi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NVIP4JMcwrACw7O2mx2iGw0BFs24t925UkHG7Ch_DUg=) Here's something you may not know about me, friend.

Back in my college years, and even for a bit during my producing days, I was a semi-pro pool player. 🎱
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99464379/519985841/158001685?refcode=em-12.29.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk1YTkzZmUtMDdjNi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NVIP4JMcwrACw7O2mx2iGw0BFs24t925UkHG7Ch_DUg=)
Believe it or not, some of the most important skills I developed at the pool table I still use today as a legislator. I learned that people like playing mind games when they want to win, and being one of the few women in a male-dominated sport taught me how to be strategic -- _and not be intimidated._

I've learned to stay focused on what winning actually means: _delivering results._
* I've been a champion for efforts to improve street safety, increase affordable housing stock, and protect our climate;

* I led the effort to improve transparency and keep people safer from sexual harassment and retaliation in the state assembly;

* I banned toxic, cancer causing ingredients from personal care products, children’s clothing & toys, and mattress;

* I’ve even taken on online ticket sellers to ensure Californians can see their favorite performers without price-gouging.

[I'm in Congress because we need proven, effective leaders in Washington who have a track record of delivering results. So ahead of my final FEC deadline of the year, I hope you'll join me by making a small contribution to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99464380/519985842/158001685?refcode=em-12.29.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk1YTkzZmUtMDdjNi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NVIP4JMcwrACw7O2mx2iGw0BFs24t925UkHG7Ch_DUg=)

clean_body: | = Here's something you may not know about me, friend. Back in my college years, and even for a bit during my producing days, I was a semi-pro pool player. 🎱 = Believe it or not, some of the most important skills I developed at the pool table I still use today as a legislator. I learned that people like playing mind games when they want to win, and being one of the few women in a male-dominated sport taught me how to be strategic -- and not be intimidated. I've learned to stay focused on what winning actually means: delivering results. I've been a champion for efforts to improve street safety, increase affordable housing stock, and protect our climate; I led the effort to improve transparency and keep people safer from sexual harassment and retaliation in the state assembly; I banned toxic, cancer causing ingredients from personal care products, children’s clothing & toys, and mattress; I’ve even taken on online ticket sellers to ensure Californians can see their favorite performers without price-gouging. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! clean_body: | | = Friend, did you see Wendy's email? We wouldn't normally reach out on a weekend like this, but we urgently need to make up ground in the final days of 2024. We close our books for the year on Tuesday, and we're still $3,022 short of where we need to be. = = Thank you so much. — Team Kaptur \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Wendy with Team Kaptur Date: Fri, Dec 27, 2024 Subject: I wouldn't normally reach out like this, To: You Friend, I wouldn't normally reach out like this, but I was just looking at our fundraising data for the month, and this is what I saw: = We're on track to miss our end-of-the-year online fundraising goal by $7,477. That's a serious shortfall, friend. Missing our goal by that much will mean we're starting off 2025 at a big disadvantage. In 2024, national Republicans came within a fraction of a percentage point of flipping this critical seat red. They're only going to double down in this next election cycle — and we have to be ready to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you so much, — Wendy Balodis Kaptur Finance Team | Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. ---
Friend,

Yesterday, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you still watch _MSNBC_ amidst Elon Musk’s threats to BUY the news network!

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond to our poll.** We know you don’t want Elon Musk to turn _MSNBC_ into Trump’s propaganda network! **[_So we’re giving you one last chance to complete our urgent poll »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241229_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22686%2E4449941%2EvxG9KV)** | **[COMPLETE YOUR _MSNBC_ VIEWERSHIP POLL BELOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241229_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22686%2E4449941%2EvxG9KV)**
---
We’ve attached our original message below for your records.

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: horrifying [FFR] <hello@fightforreform.org>
Date: Sat, Dec 28, 2024 at 1:45 PM
Subject: we can’t let Elon Musk run MSNBC into the ground
TO: You <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241229_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=9&akid=22686%2E4449941%2EvxG9KV)
**FIRST:** Donald Trump won the election, TANKING ratings at _MSNBC_ and putting the future of the network in JEOPARDY!

**THEN:** Elon Musk joked about BUYING the network! _He’d run it into the ground turning it into Trump’s personal propaganda machine!_

**SO NOW:** We’re making sure top Democrats still watch _MSNBC_ – we can’t let _MSNBC_ fall into Musk’s hands!
**[_Do you still watch _MSNBC?__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241229_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22686%2E4449941%2EvxG9KV)**
**[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241229_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=11&akid=22686%2E4449941%2EvxG9KV)**
---
**[NO, I DON'T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241229_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=12&akid=22686%2E4449941%2EvxG9KV)**
**We need 35,000 Democrats to respond before our midnight deadline!**
Fight for Reform
_MSNBC_ is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication.

THEN: Elon Musk joked about BUYING the network! He’d run it into the ground turning it into Trump’s personal propaganda machine! SO NOW: We’re making sure top Democrats still watch MSNBC – we can’t let MSNBC fall into Musk’s hands! We need 35,000 Democrats to respond before our midnight deadline! Fight for Reform MSNBC is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication. | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.
