name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Hi, Peter, it's Ilhan!
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241229-1166-foote&t=1001&akid=1166%2E342411%2E-F2dKE ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, it's
Ilhan!

I wanted to reach out personally because we are now just two days away
from our end-of-year deadline! Our Squad is working hard to gear up for
2025, and we need your help to protect our rights and progress from the
far right and their dangerous policies.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241229-movement.Ig4qBa&refcode=em20241229-1166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1166%2E342411%2E-F2dKE ]Can you rush a donation of $3 or more today to help us
reach our goal before the clock strikes midnight on December 31? Reaching
this goal will ensure our Squad has what we need to take on crucial fights
in 2025.

Together, we’ve achieved so much in the fight for a multi-racial,
multi-generational democracy that lifts up the working class. Our advocacy
for climate justice, reproductive rights, immigration reform, global
peace, and more has made an impact — and the movement is only growing
stronger. Every day, we’re inspiring more changemakers to join us in the
pursuit of true, transformative progress.

But we know this hard work is far from over. As we face the negative
impacts of a second Trump administration and GOP congressional control,
our movement must remain united. We’ve seen firsthand how the far right’s
attacks on our values have caused harm — but we also know that our
resilience, our collective power, can and will push back.

That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your help,
Peter. There’s so much on the
line under a second Trump presidency, and we cannot afford to give up, go
home, and stop fighting for our values. It’s up to us, champions for
change, to ensure that this movement we’ve built together can stand tall
against Trump and his MAGA administration.

This is our final chance in 2024 to show right-wing extremists and
corporate special interests that despite their best efforts, our Squad
isn’t going anywhere.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241229-movement.Ig4qBa&refcode=em20241229-1166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1166%2E342411%2E-F2dKE ]We need to raise $50,000 before the end of the year, and we need
grassroots support to get it done. Help us solidify our Squad’s resources
so that we can fight for the future we deserve by making a donation of
$3 or more today.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241229-movement.Ig4qBa&refcode=em20241229-1166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1166%2E342411%2E-F2dKE ]Contribute ››

The road ahead is tough, but we must walk it. Together.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar
Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1166%2E342411%2E-F2dKE

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Friend,

The effort to tank Pete Hegseth's nomination is one of the most coordinated smear campaigns I've ever seen in DC.

Pete is going to get his hearing before the Senate Armed Services Committee, not a sham hearing before the American media.

**[And before he does, I'm calling on ALL PATRIOTIC AMERICANS to rush to his defense and fill up our Official Letter of Support with MILLIONS of signatures. >>](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=08e6e936cc194d5cb93895715e2cd546&_e=821koEeoW-FeUbZ-JDtixLefmqnum3fMgjnRMHfCK5XJPozZr1-hwpmYRB3MYH5tPUF2LvpKEp7gy9rpl33PvDCtFrZ17-g62I_2T-1Mmz3oPD-FCtDwUqLYWBSFaQMtbmAm_3iH8o5eMkFrvRwypILR6NGsZ03226F8En8YKgcZ8NMUyJoI_nqERhf0cIH_3WgWhK7T_H34MOsa06Udo7fKlcWoADWyx9L-7hL50ETCAOaWn1__0VI5VM-w1ugYg3YGHX9yOnfAwKkEm3IFh6U8pcRovu6X6q0x1uW-uT4ua7J9_iudWmBHMUmPvqEXY7MmQ-MNn3pZq6vm018U0Wg3XSUzvJgk5meYHTsIPd26NiGmwlQh_UpMtoKOfV1_67uCFuHHEuVwGoV-9JkMybytxzEqqjBYCa1UAoKShjStEbjiyHA7GP6fKIgKjIMBJ2hIQrg46tmh-IkZRxVHFzwmfAqhToAVana0wlbqCJXLHZs3Uzp6XrgYTra71YdwDh-1rUZY5zv7eJC0jSD82SmOhOsIBX-U_TGewIuRPas%3D)
** **[SIGN THE LETTER](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=08e6e936cc194d5cb93895715e2cd546&_e=821koEeoW-FeUbZ-JDtixLefmqnum3fMgjnRMHfCK5XJPozZr1-hwpmYRB3MYH5tPUF2LvpKEp7gy9rpl33PvDCtFrZ17-g62I_2T-1Mmz3oPD-FCtDwUqLYWBSFaQMtbmAm_3iH8o5eMkFrvRwypILR6NGsZ03226F8En8YKgcZ8NMUyJoI_nqERhf0cIH_3WgWhK7T_H34MOsa06Udo7fKlcWoADWyx9L-7hL50ETCAOaWn1__0VI5VM-w1ugYg3YGHX9yOnfAwKkEm3IFh6U8pcRovu6X6q0x1uW-uT4ua7J9_iudWmBHMUmPvqEXY7MmQ-MNn3pZq6vm018U0Wg3XSUzvJgk5meYHTsIPd26NiGmwlQh_UpMtoKOfV1_67uCFuHHEuVwGoV-9JkMyTWg7rUGGteTj2rp9kGZ7iNybmdAAgrgUjJ0VuLb-vWBWGnsoCY927dCxxZ3hq89SsnNrqrjWSrmATLpHCL41Dyd8UT2vEaMkGW-ib_iWVq4sPr1ziSsm9LAtyCCq3EAsnNmints8m0DOXhSQFMz1c8%3D)**
They can't go after President Trump and me. We already beat them in a landslide!

That's why they've focused their efforts on attacking a proud veteran like Pete Hegseth.

Pete will dismantle their DEI agenda, eradicate wokeism, and build our military back into a fighting machine - _**and that TERRIFIES them.**_

**[But as a veteran, I'm PROUD to endorse Pete Hegseth as our next Secretary of Defense, and I'm hoping that you'll do the same by signing his Official Letter of Support. >>](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=08e6e936cc194d5cb93895715e2cd546&_e=821koEeoW-FeUbZ-JDtixLefmqnum3fMgjnRMHfCK5XJPozZr1-hwpmYRB3MYH5tPUF2LvpKEp7gy9rpl33PvDCtFrZ17-g62I_2T-1Mmz3oPD-FCtDwUqLYWBSFaQMtbmAm_3iH8o5eMkFrvRwypILR6NGsZ03226F8En8YKgcZ8NMUyJoI_nqERhf0cIH_3WgWhK7T_H34MOsa06Udo7fKlcWoADWyx9L-7hL50ETCAOaWn1__0VI5VM-w1ugYg3YGHX9yOnfAwKkEm3IFh6U8pcRovu6X6q0x1uW-uT4ua7J9_iudWmBHMUmPvqEXY7MmQ-MNn3pZq6vm018U0Wg3XSUzvJgk5meYHTsIPd26NiGmwlQh_UpMtoKOfV1_67uCFuHHEuVwGoV-9JkMyXpRnlOPtaSTm3DmhAut53A-PPZRLoJvtVYImotBpT6cFxSl0MCcdw_gArYq-pWSJaqQZlQgk4srbI0qEMfLexcI7yD9sxlATY_7xRkhPs0_AI_1K5AjWJ2GYhhS93hbAy5rIcaYZxJo3URmos6GgwA%3D)

| Meet Luther Cifers for Senate in Powhatan
---
| |
---
| Team,
We hope you are enjoying this time with family and friends. It was over a year ago today we answered the call to run for Congress after receiving countless requests to run, from constituents all over the district. Through the grace of God we won the 5th big in the General and I get sworn into Congress on January 3rd. Thank you for the Teamwork!
Now we need to fill my, soon to be vacated, State Senate Seat with a remarkable young man and our Republican nominee, Luther Cifers.
Election Day is just a few days away and we need you to vote now early at your county registrars office or on Election Day January 7 at your normal voting precinct to ensure this seat remains in Republican hands.
Please join myself and meet Luther Cifers in person. Please share the following details with your friends:
MEET & GREET with John McGuire and Luther Cifers Republican Nominee for Virginia State Senate, District 10 December 30 9:00 a.m. at Frisby's Restaurant 2150 Anderson Highway Powhatan, Virginia Please RSVP to: john@mcguireva.com
[You can donate to Luther Cifers campaign here](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RJhUAeLpCowdHsHOl2rYu39XiBz2nA3_szkMVQGa1riUlZZc_vMFGjPurcGc6R5OXAkbW4WfZWkNF0-zwhC9NwK8LiFX2yxbqr30lRsEyGzczDafs95z34LUUEvPu4R2JD15KiHLBOe-zym8DJ1AfQ==&c=asixJu9NjWNfK7D64J_I8XP3AagpqvVjf11WcCpkQB1QiUaBQndWJA==&ch=Uef2nT_ZMjr6yZtDy-qVMHlUOIL4NNkC8Ne8SU7bEO4OqPyMeKWmYw==)

clean_body: McGuire achives huge VA05 Vote Record | | | | == | == | Meet Luther Cifers for Senate in Powhatan | | | Team, We hope you are enjoying this time with family and friends. It was over a year ago today we answered the call to run for Congress after receiving countless requests to run, from constituents all over the district. Through the grace of God we won the 5th big in the General and I get sworn into Congress on January 3rd. Thank you for the Teamwork! Now we need to fill my, soon to be vacated, State Senate Seat with a remarkable young man and our Republican nominee, Luther Cifers. Election Day is just a few days away and we need you to vote now early at your county registrars office or on Election Day January 7 at your normal voting precinct to ensure this seat remains in Republican hands. Please join myself and meet Luther Cifers in person. Please share the following details with your friends: MEET & GREET with John McGuire and Luther Cifers Republican Nominee for Virginia State Senate, District 10 December 30 9:00 a.m. at Frisby's Restaurant 2150 Anderson Highway Powhatan, Virginia Please RSVP to: john@mcguireva.com == | Senate District 10 Counties | | == | Weak and or selfish leadership along with the "wokeness" ideology have been destroying our country. | Dear Freedom Fighter:

Right before Christmas and Hanukkah, I was asked to submit an opinion piece to the _Daily Caller_ for publication.

Here's a link to the article that was published: [https://dailycaller.com/2024/12/22/opinion-linda-mcmahon-make-schools-safer-shawnna-bolick/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6231b19649&e=a7ab36849c)

I very much look forward to working with the next administration, especially the future Secretary of Education Linda McMahon to increase educational freedom, protect girls only sports and to make our schools safe.

I hope you are having a great weekend!

Take care,
Shawnna

Folks – this is making me sick: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99466322/519991465/-1296694659?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.29_Mid-Month_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJlZDY4OWItMGNjNi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pYeCspVThmSLTzsksXXilvRDXL0tEd5XI6n4h0V1x4I=) Bennie Thompson, Adam Schiff, Pete Aguilar, Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger and other selfless members of Congress painted a huge target on their backs when they formed the January 6 committee.

**But they did it because of the pain, the trauma, that me and my fellow officers endured. They did it because our democracy was under threat.**

_And now, Donald Trump is reviving that threat._

**_I've never been more certain of this:_** If we do not act now, Donald Trump will take our democracy and demolish it right before our eyes.

[**_I'm asking you to be brave and bold right now and chip in $10. You can help us form a grassroots movement that fights back against MAGA-extremism and holds the Trump administration accountable. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: The Lions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
We could win the conference tomorrow.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=15%2E181023%2E65JPO3)
Tomorrow is a big test for this Detroit Lions team. We’re taking on the 49ers and could clinch the NFC North and No. 1 playoff seed before the new year.
Let me tell you what I like about this team. Much has been made of our fiery head coach Dan Campbell who introduced himself in 2021 with this gem of a quote:
> _This team is going to take on the identity of this city. This city’s been down, and it found a way to get up...
>
> We're going to kick you in the teeth. And when you punch us back, we’re going to smile at you. And when you knock us down, we’re going to get up, and on the way up, we’re going to bite a kneecap off. And we’re going to stand up, and then it’s going to take two more shots to knock us down. And on the way up, we’re going to take your other kneecap, and we’re going to get up, and then it's going to take three shots to get us down. And when we do, we’re going to take another hunk out of you.
>
> Before long, we’re going to be the last one standing.
> _
Who wouldn’t run through a brick wall for Dan Campbell? He made good on that promise. This Lions team embodies the identity of Detroit; the grit, resilience, and toughness of Michigan.
When I first moved here to clerk for the legendary Judge Damon Keith, I didn’t expect to fall so in love with the state. But there’s something magnetic about Michigan — in the architecture of Detroit, in the determination of our people. We’re a city that refuses to be defined by those who’ve written us off.
The Lions are the only franchise from the start of the Super Bowl era to never compete in one. And like them, Michigan knows what it means to be underestimated. We’ve seen industries pack up and leave. We’ve watched politicians break promises. We’ve heard the media joke about us.
But we are a city and a state that measures ourselves not by the amount of times we’ve been knocked down — but by how many times we’ve gotten back up.
I often tell people it’s hard to leave Michigan once you’ve seen it through Judge Keith’s eyes. Through that lens, I saw beyond the closed factory doors and boarded windows. I saw the dreamers building something new and a vibrant community keeping a rich culture alive.
Tomorrow, the Lions take the field against the Niners. And they’re going to carry those dreams and that culture with them. The Lions carry the spirit of an entire state that knows how to take a hit and come back stronger.
We might get knocked down seven times. No problem. We’ll get up eight. And in the words of Dan Campbell, we’re going to be the last ones standing.
Go Lions.
Jocelyn Benson
Michigan Secretary of State

* * *

Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. She’s on the front lines of defending and strengthening our democracy. **[Will you contribute today to show your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20241229-1?refcode=em20241229-1&refcode2=15_181023_65JPO3&akid=15%2E181023%2E65JPO3)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20241229-1?refcode=em20241229-1&refcode2=15_181023_65JPO3&akid=15%2E181023%2E65JPO3)**
---

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=15%2E181023%2E65JPO3)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_2024/?t=3&akid=15%2E181023%2E65JPO3)

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO BOX 21368,
Detroit, MI 48221
PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

name: Team Pramila
subject: 2024 was a tough year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We have our work cut out for us next year.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241229-4626-footer&t=1&akid=4626%2E420207%2E3bf0Xq)
2024 was a tough year, Peter:
**FIRST too many Democrats pushed to pivot to the right** and prioritize winning moderate Republicans rather than turning out our multiracial working class coalition that has always powered us to victory.
**THEN Donald Trump won the election** and will re-enter the White House in less than a month.
**NOW we have our work cut out for us to defend our democracy and rebuild the Democratic Party** around a bold, populist agenda that can win back the working class.
Some have argued that we need to move even _further_ to the right and embrace billionaire donors and powerful corporate PACs. And we’re counting on your grassroots support to show them loudly and clearly that that’s NOT the answer. 🙅🏽♀️
**If we’re going to succeed, we need to reach our $20,000 end-of-year fundraising goal.[Peter, will you pitch in $3 before the deadline and help us rebuild the Democratic Party and defend our democracy in 2025?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241229?refcode=em20241229-4626&amount=3&refcode2=4626_420207_3bf0Xq&akid=4626%2E420207%2E3bf0Xq)**

In solidarity,
Team Pramila

\- And we helped advance 60+ bills, constitutional amendments, and referendums across the country at the state level. We can’t accomplish any of this without the support of conservatives like you, and we are really counting on your commitment to our cause moving forward. **[Become a 2025 Heritage Action member and make a difference in America’s future today by chipping in today>>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bc80c304bcb4e83a955ea5d27f0fe74&_e=0l_8_mQSPA5fDZGepCjBvUFKmJnpTwcSJpIEr7wKFsytyIxYxONd8r0UjVKM04b8ggHw8J9qBzxX3iSE_Ggn5qXar2CNhUdhtwp_iiFVCSEn_MarI8JAFxVoPbfaq9vW1Gv3FVcJVkqRmou0mAMXmg5-TJojvrQjHF1yFqPIfzFkoTOPQyIjuUMlLRvQIPMOyXTInkOh8xY0y7MoJNhjLfsDE2cBQwQxcSsDByQp24hcVu-_zpYQDX0GJ4avB28vZNbA53oinhIl1fDNioF6JLCsYWCkq7HPfpyVfvK_yxRQCCsF0fFMS_PYnRWQZf_B1SFCuP6WF3ZppcaXDnt3twl56MG7yp9gI4NLyFe6zVg2BZTDYvzvSqULrpLgJnUm026tlP7CBpnuH8_H2XKex_7rcdkC3Dr0sEjWwsLpSzeagtNnP7HlNBCrXUi0JijVt1_ds0ZCrRmhUei3BNjzMTo2xJa2KVABBAWoQdBufho%3D)**

\----------- Forwarded message -----------
From: Ryan Walker
Date: December 11, 2024 at 6:00 PM EST
Subject: Democrats to BLOCK President Trump’s deportation plan.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bc80c304bcb4e83a955ea5d27f0fe74&_e=0l_8_mQSPA5fDZGepCjBvUFKmJnpTwcSJpIEr7wKFsytyIxYxONd8r0UjVKM04b8ggHw8J9qBzxX3iSE_Ggn5qXar2CNhUdhtwp_iiFVCSEn_MarI8JAFxVoPbfaq9vW1Gv3FVcJVkqRmou0mAMXmg5-TJojvrQjHF1yFqPIfzFkoTOPQyIjuUMlLRvQIPMOyXTInkOh8xY0y7MoJNhjLfsDE2cBQwQxcSsDByQp24hcVu-_zpYQDX0GJ4avB28vZNbA53oinhIl1fDNioF6JLCsYWCkq7HPfpyVfvK_yxRQCCsF0fFMS_PYnRWQZf_BVR9CIgktrgZv1rs10sakgN118hpCLfIU9RLbKdat5K60w1YxAR0VNWUwSAstwXedJI8OUPxPe1QxDPTBo6m4JNCoyA5_vSjWPY6g0f-qQBwK320qEtWxEqPWrzWvgE_IWv3msMuuo-XyE1DByGW8oT9Bg6ntg-CIjePAx1haFJw%3D)
---
Peter, more than 77 million Americans voted for President Trump, but now top **Democrats are trying to subvert the will of the people and BLOCK his plan for mass deportations.** **And sanctuary cities are even planning to rally their police officers to stand in the way of ICE agents enforcing the law!**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bc80c304bcb4e83a955ea5d27f0fe74&_e=0l_8_mQSPA5fDZGepCjBvUFKmJnpTwcSJpIEr7wKFsytyIxYxONd8r0UjVKM04b8ggHw8J9qBzxX3iSE_Ggn5qXar2CNhUdhtwp_iiFVCSEn_MarI8JAFxVoPbfaq9vW1Gv3FVcJVkqRmou0mAMXmg5-TJojvrQjHF1yFqPIfzFkoTOPQyIjuUMlLRvQIPMOyXTInkOh8xY0y7MoJNhjLfsDE2cBQwQxcSsDByQp24hcVu-_zpYQDX0GJ4avB28vZNbA53oinhIl1fDNioF6JLCsYWCkq7HPfpyVfvK_yxRQCCsF0fFMS_PYnRWQZf_BjbQhXX4VAcgFcB8P2mhUYXGcQzi2_eAYriQMFiNL5n5lmaa0OR-QV40YPjBrtAguLRm_8511GZ9Y4TUPJAeOZ95GQNh4GpaxtJqM9RNiR6-U_LHdEWRVXb_KS4Hh6LQz9Jf7V_RsSDXLWLDdACREMh5y0okWNbFbsY7cMitUll0%3D)
---
This is a disgrace to our country and the millions of Americans who voted for President Trump and his policies. But don’t worry, help is on the way: **Heritage Action was the #1 group on the front lines fighting the Biden-Harris administration's open border policies.** _**And now we’re fighting to enact President Trump’s common-sense border security plans.**_ Democrats will do anything to stop President Trump from securing the border and deporting criminal illegal immigrants.
So, if you want to ensure President Trump and conservatives are successful, **[**we need you on our team today!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bc80c304bcb4e83a955ea5d27f0fe74&_e=0l_8_mQSPA5fDZGepCjBvUFKmJnpTwcSJpIEr7wKFsytyIxYxONd8r0UjVKM04b8ggHw8J9qBzxX3iSE_Ggn5qXar2CNhUdhtwp_iiFVCSEn_MarI8JAFxVoPbfaq9vW1Gv3FVcJVkqRmou0mAMXmg5-TJojvrQjHF1yFqPIfzFkoTOPQyIjuUMlLRvQIPMOyXTInkOh8xY0y7MoJNhjLfsDE2cBQwQxcSsDByQp24hcVu-_zpYQDX0GJ4avB28vZNbA53oinhIl1fDNioF6JLCsYWCkq7HPfpyVfvK_yxRQCCsF0fFMS_PYnRWQZf_BZMm6MD4pUXs_KZwfgSW0FqRwLA0zGvJuR4C_m1ojjRkBNlvcUOzRpi3WANDmol0Le1DIpt9ZDM12fZMGBTZyAHC4VQfvEXbeJN5QgFlASYjFWpBPSVmxkklzxfClSRRdD7mRM-rR_vnwiPxKEpoTQa8Y-Ut2VzJZrArllQxrfPY%3D)**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bc80c304bcb4e83a955ea5d27f0fe74&_e=0l_8_mQSPA5fDZGepCjBvUFKmJnpTwcSJpIEr7wKFsytyIxYxONd8r0UjVKM04b8ggHw8J9qBzxX3iSE_Ggn5qXar2CNhUdhtwp_iiFVCSEn_MarI8JAFxVoPbfaq9vW1Gv3FVcJVkqRmou0mAMXmg5-TJojvrQjHF1yFqPIfzFkoTOPQyIjuUMlLRvQIPMOyXTInkOh8xY0y7MoJNhjLfsDE2cBQwQxcSsDByQp24hcVu-_zpYQDX0GJ4avB28vZNbA53oinhIl1fDNioF6JLCsYWCkq7HPfpyVfvK_yxRQCCsF0fFMS_PYnRWQZf_BQGXHY8BwGc1g2eMd9_bkZ_vtbOPlIR1F7lMoB5ENoOtV_7bjTg7Nl9YPobNT7OTQiKPYtLB2QH8HFnEnMxFCt7P3LZGKTFecJsw9h42zErCxfRbwQqoEdrNj0inN3HAwBHzacRAv_IaUACpFRrHEsyRKtqoBQXz-ZDPm8VYTrrI%3D)
---
Please, please do not sit on the sidelines as Democrats try to keep the borders open and millions of illegal immigrants in our country.
---
|

That’s why Wiley is leading efforts to create a Shadow Cabinet — to oppose Donald Trump’s cabinet comprised of billionaires and TV show hosts, and show the American people that our policies will help build a better future. **We need everyone to take action for this to work, Peter.** That’s why we’re humbly asking: **[Can you pitch in $10 before our final fundraising deadline of the year? | | We have a lot of work to do, and the fights ahead will be tough – but our team will never back down in the face of adversity. Democrats have been lowering costs for our seniors by capping the price of prescription drugs like insulin, tackling climate change by passing the Inflation Reduction Act, fighting to restore abortion rights for all, and defending our democracy from extremist forces who want to drag us backward. Now, our fight is going to become even more important. All this progress we've achieved over the last few years will be tested in the new Trump administration, and it's up to people like you, to not give up and sit quietly on the sidelines. **We know we can count on Jeff to be on the frontlines of the fights to come. He's not afraid of the Trump administration, and he's ready to stand up to them when he sees our rights under attack.** [**We're building a powerful grassroots movement in 2025, and we're asking you to join us by pitching in to****help****Jeff today. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d4ccef14c8c643028c31d3ca739957de&_e=ArCZqUXwXfRDZr-GxBN-eL4jk2j2PKuBP40Ur6uwBngBUqI9pRXYZM88ZHsVaMuyNtqrGLhmX_79Y1SSNrX7oucusZUp7gIRt8CRXtbTW8sHiVbK8jDNnwgJaC4Qb6jsW4jbbzTuJmb1Zj-16pWPHsV_0rt3_SWMDMaPBe1eYUGUzwZqggW97hAtG8KXfwYoYSk9WixxBaeXzluOgQ3MuGL_707KZ8uvrkyPrRMpSc-gGFo9Q7A9quH-ISZSpaosbY-l5LQ8T-R7tnhxpeaDTdkj27Y82zg4_ieTYlCV-adzFSOIrxGeMzjD2wCgOslW9J9AN0Zdp9AtTrEEHlX-AlBC-6yRAnszPdmE3eDq_JjNHGfcP4GXmJLA5z6JeD5NB_ErcfC78fgpnJBj927U1w%3D%3D)
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before December 31st by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d4ccef14c8c643028c31d3ca739957de&_e=ArCZqUXwXfRDZr-GxBN-eL4jk2j2PKuBP40Ur6uwBngBUqI9pRXYZM88ZHsVaMuyNtqrGLhmX_79Y1SSNrX7oucusZUp7gIRt8CRXtbTW8sHiVbK8jDNnwgJaC4Qb6jsW4jbbzTuJmb1Zj-16pWPHsV_0rt3_SWMDMaPBe1eYUGUzwZqggW97hAtG8KXfwYoYSk9WixxBaeXzluOgQ3MuGL_707KZ8uvrkyPrRMpSc9ANWs63P4VR4f-zGr5uK0HwsdS1soueqCenwsHpQDstEPgkjIkBnl_qcv8jgewaoT48YcpITDa86ZBSf0vv9N8F0TyhIBvS9iQm_BUXqPaUuffBBcaxmFJdfCaYEvqPZRIxqxPezFbSTtpV6-JT_nu7XIj0r262QtWUsJ_HmytQw%3D%3D)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d4ccef14c8c643028c31d3ca739957de&_e=ArCZqUXwXfRDZr-GxBN-eL4jk2j2PKuBP40Ur6uwBngBUqI9pRXYZM88ZHsVaMuyNtqrGLhmX_79Y1SSNrX7oucusZUp7gIRt8CRXtbTW8sHiVbK8jDNnwgJaC4Qb6jsW4jbbzTuJmb1Zj-16pWPHsV_0rt3_SWMDMaPBe1eYUGUzwZqggW97hAtG8KXfwYoYSk9WixxBaeXzluOgQ3MuGL_707KZ8uvrkyPrRMpSc97K-I7db1oPq55azx_Ln7Z2HEwPzo0liiCDoZoNNEU6Yp1_XmPWXP9drsz_lWHx05N4YhUkPOYzJHrSFEe_hcffE81KzpQVsX9xQmXidYqhRNW7fTXRU8Iinndf-PpgWmVW8HClrN_BmRTs5YEgFxwxpC9f64VStvJd_FLqlhq7A%3D%3D)

And when you do, you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**. But you must act before December 31st.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before December 31st at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d4ccef14c8c643028c31d3ca739957de&_e=ArCZqUXwXfRDZr-GxBN-eL4jk2j2PKuBP40Ur6uwBngBUqI9pRXYZM88ZHsVaMuyNtqrGLhmX_79Y1SSNrX7oucusZUp7gIRt8CRXtbTW8sHiVbK8jDNnwgJaC4Qb6jsW4jbbzTuJmb1Zj-16pWPHsV_0rt3_SWMDMaPBe1eYUGUzwZqggW97hAtG8KXfwYoYSk9WixxBaeXzluOgQ3MuGL_707KZ8uvrkyPrRMpSc8RoIVBu0Xij9VQ3cuW0BjiYx4h9jPS4D4sla0mVksCaco3LTlUhry6XzSQBx6RSna-_lROWcJ0imuj8Z8E5lERUkMPGAUJ7BKrzV_WxDSwYehTxR4-zqgNx2scMitlWgfO2kFrUtHzrtknn8hQe96C_F7Vt5H0rAiT7kDZx-6etw%3D%3D)

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. **Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission!**

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

clean_body: The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth And we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

subject: SAVE THE DATE: DNC Leadership Forum (virtual)

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, mark your
calendar for a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20801?source=email-20241229&t=1011&akid=7442%2E5885482%2EzGurZv ]LIVE forum with DNC Leadership candidates on Jan. 13th!

Our Revolution, The Progressive Democrats of America (PDA), Roots Action
and the State Democratic Party Progressive Network are taking the lead on
efforts to transform the Democratic Party. We need a party that bans dark
money super PACs, invests in grassroots organizing, has a transparent
budget, and is RESPONSIVE to the people.

The election of a new DNC Leadership will have major impacts on the
direction of the Party, and we are happy to welcome leading candidates to
this live virtual event to discuss their campaigns directly with our
movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20801?source=email-20241229&t=1012&akid=7442%2E5885482%2EzGurZv ]RSVP now for this crucial Our Revolution forum with DNC Leadership
candidates on January 13th.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20801?source=email-20241229&t=1013&akid=7442%2E5885482%2EzGurZv ]RSVP

To learn more about our work, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20801?source=email-20241229&t=1014&akid=7442%2E5885482%2EzGurZv ]RSVP for this important candidate forum,
and read Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese’s op-ed in
Common Dreams. Highlights below, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20791?t=1015&akid=7442%2E5885482%2EzGurZv ]full op-ed here.

Progressives Have the Answers to Transform the Democratic Party

Trump is not dumb. By publicly siding with union leaders, amplifying their
fight against automation, and nominating pro-labor Republican Lori
Chavez-DeRemer to lead the Department of Labor, he is deliberately
positioning himself as a fighter for workers. This calculated maneuvering
speaks to his understanding that working-class voters hold the key to
electoral power. Yet, behind the scenes, Trump’s cabinet of
billionaires—individuals who have profited off the backs of working
people—tells the real story of his agenda.

The Democratic Party, meanwhile, stands at a dangerous crossroads. The
MAGA strategy exposes a hard truth: the Democratic Party cannot afford to
continue losing its connection to the working class. Failing to respond
with bold action, clear reforms, and a commitment to the priorities of
working families will all but guarantee further electoral losses.

This is why progressives are calling for a reform agenda that puts
working-class voters first.

It’s imperative that new leadership adopts a Reform Agenda to signal it is
serious about restoring trust and rebuilding the party as a force for
working people.

Progressives have called for these institutional changes for years. With
the stinging loss in November, the urgency is undeniable.

This is not just a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party—it’s a fight
for the future of our democracy.

Be part of the conversation and efforts to transform the Party on January
13th. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20801?source=email-20241229&t=1016&akid=7442%2E5885482%2EzGurZv ]RSVP for our DNC Leadership Forum now.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution (OR), Progressive Democrats of America (PDA), RootsAction,
and The State Democratic Party Progressive Network

clean_body: The earlier we start preparing, the better chance we have at protecting this seat. | = | Peter, We know you’re wondering why we’re still fundraising well after the election. = | = 1️⃣ We’re closing the books on 2024; that means wrapping up any remaining expenses and preparing for the year ahead. 2️⃣ Republicans are controlling all majorities next year. Whatever we raise now will help April keep her focus on tackling the issues that matter most and less on fundraising. 3️⃣ We may have won this race, but the results were close. Republicans will be going after this seat AGAIN in 2026, and we will be doing all we can to defend this seat. The earlier we start preparing, the better chance we have at protecting this seat. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you, Delaney Finance Team * | | = PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS April McClain Delaney for Congress PO Box 83940 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-83940 United States | = = We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Things have really taken a turn
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Well, Peter, I’ll admit it… Things have really taken a turn since Election Day. I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn’t be further from the truth! Fundraising has PLUMMETED, and now I’m starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our final goal of the year. I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our final goal of 2024. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before the New Year. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=73c1215ba2f1eec04b02566501a6c4a1b03eb4e51ceb518a700ed3cc49091886d04791701737f215b54dbe3b062f94cecfeb9120a31d62220611ae3cce163174 I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my end of year goal. I wish so badly I didn’t have to ask you this. I promise you that. It’s the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this… But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it’s a no-brainer in my book. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=73c1215ba2f1eec04b02566501a6c4a1b03eb4e51ceb518a700ed3cc49091886d04791701737f215b54dbe3b062f94cecfeb9120a31d62220611ae3cce163174 I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference. Thank you and God bless you, Marsha Blackburn Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@updates.marshablackburn.com "info@updates.marshablackburn.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=73c1215ba2f1eec0fbeb4ddb44657cea255517096cfcce1668cfbeb30e691ae2d3c2f94999ca8d5f0f0c6a661316fa2ad3d5bbad0bca3f23642f8dd4d41eec54 iCloud , https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=73c1215ba2f1eec0e392626b2977795a059b5562c480617d6fcf3b53e07ae239757d20e09f36170f0e6d868342be9907c2ba80be7e83d2817b09e8528b1b76bb Gmail , https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=73c1215ba2f1eec018fd03652ec51a37a405e474e15311fda2189e1ac45c3dfe8a59a73cc489599ab73fcc92e807ade93f175219b9ccfa9ad784d8c66171247a Outlook , https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=73c1215ba2f1eec057ef801371d2bb2db3f3d7ecf58c61c8b5a9ac57ad4c25b6725fc6293a215a81d6311e415eca104aae5aece7a192762ab8059132e4cfb530 Yahoo Mail , https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=73c1215ba2f1eec00ea6895e4e0b1237fadeec1907e7aec0b80c677938af4af4eaa2952c01a579364f252c74629c6fef3c74afaf8a15119119cbdf9028271aea AOL Mail Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. name: Lara Trump
subject: Today I’m writing to you as a mother
body:
I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=25c461225a0d41bfad71b971cea7387b&_e=-egtSOuW582ad-YPUToeTiKCX6OY2YmHlK0Y4Up641k9DLUhh_Z767msDHTe7P4eP5tLnnJ02cA-4TpnDky84_L4EPamp-RAXI2yN2lLI137yQx10zA6zLZk81VI8lL-U1fO6Q32sSxoRS3VW0r7vQBFn_amfPkXnEJKhCOSVNJ6ajCoNiFLS0q7dBsNkaFrC5dlGDZTQIRqz134UccZs3tWXsLYJTvs0RGLn77u8diNM59nckEOtne_myXC2PhupMdKppA5yAUJPsIzqDiq6bRz65m_ajIa0ZprFudPGpPhvjL73-Mef2F5w2fVdjRVeNVhBTDOmHi7D72uW0JHChJBmYCTrJ5HC1tftZYZuEdX8o-0pYHEmDNMVrCmrsj9842iZSqsijGbjTZpeHb8eQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=25c461225a0d41bfad71b971cea7387b&_e=-egtSOuW582ad-YPUToeTiKCX6OY2YmHlK0Y4Up641k9DLUhh_Z767msDHTe7P4eP5tLnnJ02cA-4TpnDky84_L4EPamp-RAXI2yN2lLI137yQx10zA6zLZk81VI8lL-U1fO6Q32sSxoRS3VW0r7vQBFn_amfPkXnEJKhCOSVNJ6ajCoNiFLS0q7dBsNkaFrC5dlGDZTQIRqz134UccZs3tWXsLYJTvs0RGLn77u8dj2ivIRP7uZK0ThDi2dTqBETacgNn1968ab-eqotfDlmCvFQdYzWbyu4AvGnoyYWgu10VGEsCCdOhBDlCbLm9CUz_e1nxg9BL4LY1IKTUfNAC59HiFHDuP9VmE8boh0fUGPi0zMW96_PWeHL7hVzogbkKYirCzfivp2FnHoVJWxow%3D%3D)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=25c461225a0d41bfad71b971cea7387b&_e=-egtSOuW582ad-YPUToeTiKCX6OY2YmHlK0Y4Up641k9DLUhh_Z767msDHTe7P4eP5tLnnJ02cA-4TpnDky84_L4EPamp-RAXI2yN2lLI137yQx10zA6zLZk81VI8lL-U1fO6Q32sSxoRS3VW0r7vQBFn_amfPkXnEJKhCOSVNJ6ajCoNiFLS0q7dBsNkaFrC5dlGDZTQIRqz134UccZs3tWXsLYJTvs0RGLn77u8dieUmKM46cuONobqd3LQTM82RWu4HFH-2V2D3NkP-gc0BBWKrq8vQ1q_7C1h3qS5kslbHS2gt8qa33MRsueNy2tmsbHUlEYaL1sXUshgP6aqyH1uHm-OCMV67dhWu3_cSXarZM9D0NLXjPR4DKGaCKPsYkgrQGlnHfJoSEtd-mBrg%3D%3D)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=25c461225a0d41bfad71b971cea7387b&_e=-egtSOuW582ad-YPUToeTiKCX6OY2YmHlK0Y4Up641k9DLUhh_Z767msDHTe7P4eP5tLnnJ02cA-4TpnDky84_L4EPamp-RAXI2yN2lLI137yQx10zA6zLZk81VI8lL-U1fO6Q32sSxoRS3VW0r7vQBFn_amfPkXnEJKhCOSVNJ6ajCoNiFLS0q7dBsNkaFrC5dlGDZTQIRqz134UccZs3tWXsLYJTvs0RGLn77u8djTZIQHNcAHAHwzZIpe-usw5pJ-Z3OuMd36wib2mdg64E6wYJ1MU0P7UnzbbJr9NQAy5ehiYm8Oizi6kqi5aBhnpWN_Jk0SPVoZpykoUK2niiY-1BKPAAWaHgY7wBmTnGvHmHlF_jhifUaCVu9md207kp5kU3S9br0doCruIRikjg%3D%3D)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=25c461225a0d41bfad71b971cea7387b&_e=-egtSOuW582ad-YPUToeTiKCX6OY2YmHlK0Y4Up641k9DLUhh_Z767msDHTe7P4eP5tLnnJ02cA-4TpnDky84_L4EPamp-RAXI2yN2lLI137yQx10zA6zLZk81VI8lL-U1fO6Q32sSxoRS3VW0r7vQBFn_amfPkXnEJKhCOSVNJ6ajCoNiFLS0q7dBsNkaFrC5dlGDZTQIRqz134UccZs3tWXsLYJTvs0RGLn77u8diLfjUEeH6M44W5WTwTVNRcoGk6JOs9tGsVc4cTD2v-ryNdvKMA3cTeymwqfvN9-lWvF6cK7nyK8GS7spDtzQ4m1w6vbR11MJOL6Dhl4ixHH44-dEaqMMesPEckLpKzFA9X8tZcAG8mLpmM5Sihw1_ejU45vsqy_PTYPr9JEQZisQ%3D%3D)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=25c461225a0d41bfad71b971cea7387b&_e=-egtSOuW582ad-YPUToeTiKCX6OY2YmHlK0Y4Up641k9DLUhh_Z767msDHTe7P4eP5tLnnJ02cA-4TpnDky84_L4EPamp-RAXI2yN2lLI137yQx10zA6zLZk81VI8lL-U1fO6Q32sSxoRS3VW0r7vQBFn_amfPkXnEJKhCOSVNJ6ajCoNiFLS0q7dBsNkaFrC5dlGDZTQIRqz134UccZs3tWXsLYJTvs0RGLn77u8did4TNy-hcpzUb39--B-UEBWWd03l-3_83UAdBZZcVCpYjLL-BVzyos4ADnnBeaR4mKkC9d1Ds-vNTniFZGS2gE_tDGoI2516ET6H2pFvw5tZlH7icbYIomQY_q3Lr-AxXN06v_vRvgYQZBeaFyD2HkAp3lo-8jIbHdgneuowzyEQ%3D%3D), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=25c461225a0d41bfad71b971cea7387b&_e=-egtSOuW582ad-YPUToeTiKCX6OY2YmHlK0Y4Up641k9DLUhh_Z767msDHTe7P4eP5tLnnJ02cA-4TpnDky84_L4EPamp-RAXI2yN2lLI137yQx10zA6zLZk81VI8lL-U1fO6Q32sSxoRS3VW0r7vQBFn_amfPkXnEJKhCOSVNJ6ajCoNiFLS0q7dBsNkaFrC5dlGDZTQIRqz134UccZs3tWXsLYJTvs0RGLn77u8dh8uoThv1u5s77HeYNTbDv_WG_5A7zFZh6trUZh5k5ru1UNmLtSFOoMwk-znRMW6_iT9JnUjT1Inn3zbwlmgW1hkOgfxSn1rX4476G_ZAWHgq-fujAyvthlz9mWotLlbcc_n9fB_ugZxD44DKA_wXZ8eIuZYYXTeyjA3JJTX-Y10Q%3D%3D)

---
**Lara Trump** **Wife, Mother, and Author**
---
|

If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.[Please help me fight by giving to Brave Books to protect our children today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=25c461225a0d41bfad71b971cea7387b&_e=-egtSOuW582ad-YPUToeTiKCX6OY2YmHlK0Y4Up641k9DLUhh_Z767msDHTe7P4eP5tLnnJ02cA-4TpnDky84_L4EPamp-RAXI2yN2lLI137yQx10zA6zLZk81VI8lL-U1fO6Q32sSxoRS3VW0r7vQBFn_amfPkXnEJKhCOSVNJ6ajCoNiFLS0q7dBsNkaFrC5dlGDZTQIRqz134UccZs3tWXsLYJTvs0RGLn77u8didC-pmZIlo7qZLZaMXcEqL7hs7Sojylkn16tWdckcNEIGcDmwNEsUK7OV8iMAcFmRezjtjTKGLS5Bzl0G535HEvX_37pwqt5kRIiGqWszuTACHEuhGnyGhufKkWy64bcq5uK7NcEnSU690pkFSD-DGBYXIjvqzuJfi7xCar4Hvfw%3D%3D) **Thank you! - Lara

name: BPR daily PM
subject: Babbling Jasmine Crockett says Dems need to ‘shake it up,’ ditch seniority

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: New year, same corporate and billionaire opponents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In the 2024 election cycle, our opponents spent more than EVER before to
elect right-wing politicians and attack our progressive, working-class
movement:

* AIPAC, the anti-Palestinian lobby group, and its network of dark money
super PACs spent over $100 million in total, including more than $25k
to unseat Justice Democrats’ Reps. Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in
their Democratic primaries;
* The Crypto lobby made up HALF of all corporate political donations
last cycle, working to elect corporate Democrats and Republicans who
will refuse to regulate them so they can maximize profits at the
expense of everyday people;
* MAGA billionaire Elon Musk invested $277 million to help get Donald
Trump elected and become his right-hand man. He’s already talking
about spending more in 2026 races to unseat Democrats (see his tweet
below).

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241229?refcode=em20241229-36272&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36272_1203867_1g6VdP&akid=36272%2E1203867%2E1g6VdP ][IMG]

The stakes are high and the odds are stacked against us, but with enough
people-power, we can take on these powerful corporations, lobby groups,
and billionaires in the next election cycle and WIN — but only with your
support.

Justice Democrats depends on grassroots donations from emails just like
this one to fuel our work, including our 2026 Candidate Recruitment
efforts.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241229?refcode=em20241229-36272&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36272_1203867_1g6VdP&akid=36272%2E1203867%2E1g6VdP ]With only two days left in the year and thousands of dollars to go
until we reach our $100,000 goal, can we count on you to pitch in ANY
amount today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241229?refcode=em20241229-36272&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36272_1203867_1g6VdP&akid=36272%2E1203867%2E1g6VdP ]Contribute $5

The more we raise now, the more pressure we can put on the Democratic
Party to reject corporate interests and the wealthy elite, re-center
working-class people, and win more elections against the far right.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241229-36272-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36272_1203867_1g6VdP&akid=36272%2E1203867%2E1g6VdP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36272%2E1203867%2E1g6VdP

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| Peter,

Our final FEC deadline is in TWO days, and we could really use your help to close the books on 2024 and set the groundwork for the year ahead.

As Trump and extreme Republicans work to reverse our progress, Linda will be working to fight back and:

**💲 **Protect Social Security and Medicare
**🏥 **Lower the costs of healthcare
**🌎 **Tackle the impacts of climate change
**🟠 **Make progress on gun reform
**🩺 **Fight for reproductive rights nationwide

**With a Republican trifecta, Linda will have to juggle navigating attacks on our democracy and preparing the groundwork for 2026 victories. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Throughout it all, Sharice Davids will continue to do what she’s always done

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99470115/520002477/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI2Yjc0MS0xNmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UACDjEeJgi_o4J8O7an5l8O05QxKPSE_fOp95ho5YM=) As we look ahead to the new year, there is little doubt that extremists in Congress will try to bring more dysfunction, disorder, and chaos to Washington. But throughout it all, Sharice Davids will continue to do what she’s always done: Accomplish **real change** for the people of Kansas. [_**Here’s the situation: Our final fundraising deadline of the year is just two days away, and we need to kick off the new year with sustained grassroots momentum. We’ll explain more, but if you already know about the progress Sharice is fighting for, will you pitch in a donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99470116/520002478/1105044312?refcode=email_122924_EOM1&amounts=5,20,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI2Yjc0MS0xNmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UACDjEeJgi_o4J8O7an5l8O05QxKPSE_fOp95ho5YM=) We want to be clear: We’re not just asking you to donate because we’re up against a deadline. We’re asking you to donate because Sharice’s work in Congress is more important than ever. The fact is, in the months ahead, we’re going to see a lot of front-page news about chaos and dysfunction in Washington. But in the background, Sharice will be working with Republicans and Democrats alike to get stuff done for Kansas families. **After all, that’s the whole point of holding elected office!** Listen, we don’t know what the future will hold these next couple years — there are some tough battles ahead. But we do know that Sharice will fight tooth and nail to lower costs, find common ground, tackle the epidemic of gun violence, secure investments for Kansas communities, and defend our fundamental rights. It may not always grab the headlines — but Sharice’s steady, focused, bipartisan leadership is exactly what we need in Washington. [_**If, after reading all of that, you’re on board with Sharice’s fight, will you chip in a few bucks to support her work? With the new Congress beginning in less than a week, your grassroots support is essential.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99470117/520002479/1105044312?refcode=email_122924_EOM1&amounts=5,20,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI2Yjc0MS0xNmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UACDjEeJgi_o4J8O7an5l8O05QxKPSE_fOp95ho5YM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99470118/520002480/1105044312?refcode=email_122924_EOM1&amounts=5,20,25,50,100,250&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI2Yjc0MS0xNmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UACDjEeJgi_o4J8O7an5l8O05QxKPSE_fOp95ho5YM=)

clean_body: Throughout it all, Sharice Davids will continue to do what she’s always done = As we look ahead to the new year, there is little doubt that extremists in Congress will try to bring more dysfunction, disorder, and chaos to Washington. But throughout it all, Sharice Davids will continue to do what she’s always done: Accomplish real change for the people of Kansas. = We want to be clear: We’re not just asking you to donate because we’re up against a deadline. We’re asking you to donate because Sharice’s work in Congress is more important than ever. The fact is, in the months ahead, we’re going to see a lot of front-page news about chaos and dysfunction in Washington. But in the background, Sharice will be working with Republicans and Democrats alike to get stuff done for Kansas families. After all, that’s the whole point of holding elected office! Listen, we don’t know what the future will hold these next couple years — there are some tough battles ahead. But we do know that Sharice will fight tooth and nail to lower costs, find common ground, tackle the epidemic of gun violence, secure investments for Kansas communities, and defend our fundamental rights. It may not always grab the headlines — but Sharice’s steady, focused, bipartisan leadership is exactly what we need in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Dear Friend, Do you feel like the policy solutions offered by the government often create more problems than they solve?

From education to healthcare and beyond, it's clear that good intentions don't always lead to good outcomes.
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1467e1b6fe0240cfb5d096331c54b5de&_e=1zcaFR6Um0B4PuqW901CGRuBVYKvJ74a9vPX87EaPqvGHiVAN44fJflsreAmxFmTstBBWIMamGv_hXv9Q_c9uTGx9Vhdbu2ufSskRg1fMuVjWu8PaA3Srhj_tVFLW1U2F6yR9ytdzK7SAK3d6q5v6J9X-QF8dPSi2nxSh2tB-IduVlKR4zo9vMA_D-WkoBujQlkyNq_-LXHSosuKSBzjYM_qmKeNEvOccrclukhftW45QgtVLyKr3fXwf_aCe-rQ-0Cj1EBwkW0fQZg_XQuuDQQ2-dLNmvsYzu_iMd75H0E5QkCjmUgDXvax7aq79gwaaorHJDIlxgXQ_NoTFZIsUBiKGBRIpGXJC6HAULZnmG3tUZC7DWzK3HwaGFW46mCxH08aCS_EZzVDC3r2rJreUrulBeMxRmCrtiZt2lDQ7eo%3D)
---
| | That's why I'm excited to share a free digital copy of Milton Friedman's thought-provoking eBook, "Why Government Is the Problem."

In this insightful read, Friedman dives deep into:
* Unveiling how government interventions can worsen the social and economic problems they're trying to fix.
* Revealing the influence of special interests in policymaking, often at the expense of everyday citizens.
* Explaining why limiting government involvement might be the key to solving our most pressing challenges.

It's a must-read for anyone curious about the impact of government actions on our society. Originally written in 1993, Friedman's analysis remains as relevant today as ever.

Are you ready to explore a new perspective? [Click here to get your free copy](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1467e1b6fe0240cfb5d096331c54b5de&_e=1zcaFR6Um0B4PuqW901CGRuBVYKvJ74a9vPX87EaPqvGHiVAN44fJflsreAmxFmTstBBWIMamGv_hXv9Q_c9uTGx9Vhdbu2ufSskRg1fMuVjWu8PaA3Srhj_tVFLW1U2F6yR9ytdzK7SAK3d6q5v6J9X-QF8dPSi2nxSh2tB-IduVlKR4zo9vMA_D-WkoBujQlkyNq_-LXHSosuKSBzjYM_qmKeNEvOccrclukhftW45QgtVLyKr3fXwf_aCe-rQ-0Cj1EBwkW0fQZg_XQuuDRZV1hsfWo10LSuRZIqUDgwTfcTPsKDxtbhL9CnxsuOWYYJ4QHEJQZfEqAd7agL1dg7K4ymg5Tr_wyMVGO7CQfdtGVO6tpReEIk4WqB9VAhvtDl8dykx1WJ1D3Rx-OFd9t-TUFt85fRQR1LFENrONw4%3D) of "Why Government Is the Problem" now.
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University

* * *
Trump’s nomination of anti-vaxxer Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to lead the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) is a threat to our nation’s disease prevention! If confirmed, conspiracy theorist and vaccine denier RFK Jr. would oversee 13 critical divisions, including the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which guides the vaccination programs he has suggested eliminating. Extensive research shows that vaccinations are a safe and cost-effective way to protect individuals and communities from disease, disability, and death. **Allowing Robert F. Kennedy Jr., a vaccine skeptic with no background in health, science, or medicine, to oversee our nation's health system is perilous. We could see a resurgence in disease!** **[Stand up for public health! Sign on and tell the Senate to REJECT anti-vaxxer RFK Jr for HHS Secretary!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38eMinypNKOcfwbIiaikj4kLQVFcSZBT0dy0WlS3I3Xf2U8DWoUR4tpF402Br1lzxc8V5bIKbro_-_Uo3XNYcIcsQdiluAulMn6RgcVa_t8tGBmfsrU_68USB-6nRdIdBrqlKc6W-wjRvYAaYNOIfmHWgMmG-56qpZBW0eKWe6hv4gLEEVENDhkuP9kuHU6EQrzRngyA8PpQvUb1FbRdD4Smsu_s00dkcwzHjMR8yZi--33TDOulUAOBcGfVeqNNp_yQYdxPUM4La-_gTjE9N0Qsl3PkxMuNJy4BNGj8FWomI_4GWxL-j4--QIq6QcaZJVheNP5HfbCw8YN869N_dNNE-NJzDNDQoi6r-3I4WS0FpA5H_-Qcjvrtf2x7VJDhLIMRTf44ZGmA6PSIzAWSwn1yz_TG-aJ7b47S0yQzDA4fwscuK7ER3T4kNsXO2vjIEQm6cp92rz1ro_TYQZ5kG9UQ5dgmuvvXThSXYyWSpBgo1A8OPcuROl5_we59jFMuCUnKjH8DvAsu-bMgqfC7gJpv29FbjcZRU5TarRS_BhXfg/4cp/iFpzxwa6SnOY-uk-rCoG7Q/h2/h001.U99jG7pJZczuCy7S6E0bjR_8TRuwGeR-MwBcUnS8IRM)** **** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38eMinypNKOcfwbIiaikj4kLQVFcSZBT0dy0WlS3I3Xf2U8DWoUR4tpF402Br1lzxc8V5bIKbro_-_Uo3XNYcIcsQdiluAulMn6RgcVa_t8tGBmfsrU_68USB-6nRdIdBrqlKc6W-wjRvYAaYNOIfmHWgMmG-56qpZBW0eKWe6hv4gLEEVENDhkuP9kuHU6EQrzRngyA8PpQvUb1FbRdD4Smsu_s00dkcwzHjMR8yZi--33TDOulUAOBcGfVeqNNp_yQYdxPUM4La-_gTjE9N0Qsl3PkxMuNJy4BNGj8FWomI_4GWxL-j4--QIq6QcaZJUdgFdJt2Og00Yq886Zzg0yZ9yXNIaufr4xcrYuQHqBZShJYVelDdc8XsiKWYQB76Wcb-Yvw0b29uKGw1Etcza1-f6VQXaofy_zbvlXgHJ3o0wp8a8UJyAqDvuKRsKBh9oesVZ7zietW3i9H0edn1qWg7cfY37Kf1-GIdPSLyYlDp9ui03n9v3Mm-R_lUv-K82x3RQryotHA4aBMf05eiJ7A5jnDPyJx1yO4ybTYl-f7g/4cp/iFpzxwa6SnOY-uk-rCoG7Q/h3/h001.qj1mXvLhs-O9d0a11FMc6-2MODlr2Vc6WWc2A15vMU8)

In a groundbreaking development, more than 75 Nobel laureates and health experts have signed a letter strongly opposing RFK Jr.’s nomination, citing his lack of scientific credentials, his promotion of misinformation, and his opposition to health-protecting and life saving vaccines.
This sentiment is echoed by the [majority](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfiB1ExDwZ0B3wtLLr_KGVUhfKhY64aAx1aCTDd-X9FbK4U9vP2VC3qDEH_d0fIon_fDnAuQzVHym2odcJsppIJenW2GyScRppbKtlDoDC06sJfh8E85VdtKXlU_kQ2vMUv96aLoi5df5RqQHG4wBcU9bWK-f_D4hdT4pXlwaYwq3sncvpdLy0wlSrcvC6Cxwhmd4thSeBWRCtgUS2zl2ihTSrJwS4vnw5d8qNkm6eGdoUSBy_1Yfu4jETKADl2aDliBzlMLzgn5oDbOnfl12yffieCyugZedlgXMI2iAs8kcGS2cGIt3qwgYKPkoJJYfc7oBTb5ypw__A2p-OAO-6vE5D-eChn-dDoFllK5rZLgnH_i1U0aTDohF_adyQvgVQ/4cp/iFpzxwa6SnOY-uk-rCoG7Q/h4/h001.AZkbZNduVss6qh41hL_KtiniQfbctoT7yZ1NahvXbAo) of Americans.
**RFK Jr’s fringe views on vaccines and his disregard for science and public health, makes it clear he is unfit to lead HHS and is a danger to the American people.**
**[Join us in demanding that the Senate reject RFK Jr.'s nomination. Sign the petition today to protect our health and ensure a future guided by science and truth.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38eMinypNKOcfwbIiaikj4kLQVFcSZBT0dy0WlS3I3Xf2U8DWoUR4tpF402Br1lzxc8V5bIKbro_-_Uo3XNYcIcsQdiluAulMn6RgcVa_t8tGBmfsrU_68USB-6nRdIdBrqlKc6W-wjRvYAaYNOIfmHWgMmG-56qpZBW0eKWe6hv4gLEEVENDhkuP9kuHU6EQrzRngyA8PpQvUb1FbRdD4Smsu_s00dkcwzHjMR8yZi--33TDOulUAOBcGfVeqNNp_yQYdxPUM4La-_gTjE9N0Qsl3PkxMuNJy4BNGj8FWomI_4GWxL-j4--QIq6QcaZJUI4grj4E8Zo24It72880Y2jU9ah7YYzQPV8MI8lWl_2xE8OF203Nyd9jtoT8GewQ94Za4bBcnWpUo0zRjs3-ECbdAopUiWGZ_YGDUZ08DlbvKtZybZxti5az8t_NcdOOXkUr_98aeirJP8PM9qIEOu-iDM0ENSlYfppeBPeS1IvflcOUMGULfVjvj8PBVIe3Dy7bqYAzvXIZ0Oqjs1pk1dLN6979say8EUGzXgt7PpOg/4cp/iFpzxwa6SnOY-uk-rCoG7Q/h5/h001.WrXoPIiPVuJzWwNCwTNuFuyPcfz7SeV7ocKmjbIAplw)**

clean_body: | | | Trump’s nomination of anti-vaxxer Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to lead the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) is a threat to our nation’s disease prevention! If confirmed, conspiracy theorist and vaccine denier RFK Jr. would oversee 13 critical divisions, including the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which guides the vaccination programs he has suggested eliminating. Extensive research shows that vaccinations are a safe and cost-effective way to protect individuals and communities from disease, disability, and death. Allowing Robert F. Kennedy Jr., a vaccine skeptic with no background in health, science, or medicine, to oversee our nation's health system is perilous. We could see a resurgence in disease! | In a groundbreaking development, more than 75 Nobel laureates and health experts have signed a letter strongly opposing RFK Jr.’s nomination, citing his lack of scientific credentials, his promotion of misinformation, and his opposition to health-protecting and life saving vaccines. This sentiment is echoed by the of Americans. RFK Jr’s fringe views on vaccines and his disregard for science and public health, makes it clear he is unfit to lead HHS and is a danger to the American people. ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. body:
We need your help to start 2025 off strong.
| | |
---
Friend, I’ll get right to the point. With time running out, we’re falling dangerously short of our $20,000 end-of-year goal. [**_I need your help to close the gap, so please, will you rush $5 or more?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99470700/520004822/2042411210?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3045-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjhhYjBjYS0xN2M2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqImZfKqAotX3KbQhlZHgsV8e9ammI--zbyeq_mYovs=)
After a really tough 2024, we simply can’t afford to start 2025 with a budget shortfall. Democrats need the _opposite_ if we’re going to head into the year ready to lead a strong, unified resistance against the incoming Trump administration.
These are just a few of my top priorities going into 2025:
* Protect reproductive rights from right-wing attacks
* Prevent Donald Trump from eroding our democracy
* Set Democrats up to take back the Senate in 2026

**But all that and more simply won’t be possible if folks like you don’t help us raise the resources we need. Our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year is on Dec. 31, and we’re about $13,000 short. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The difference heaven makes today
body:
Imagine you’re planning a move to a new country
| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee10c0ce605c47b5a32646205dc929e9&_e=8Aq_w9AAogqTq_UsMC4MbXTt45OJqO9lbkPhHrOq8gZF2hWJcC-nbxpUJW9rJJ6rokfZmtEO6hoVeGDag6xODOBe7Ya6pLncgPshSAGnv1vlG-m_ukf3mM50DEnX8VYKt8bZ4M23CBzyAtdZR8fG1Zeotd_SXGjcTJNRvH3n8Mrwoi3KttfA0wZ0LKPenF6NaB6eCaFacEewT_nfEwUdGHeXtJrdFw_WHCufIChxZIPEAUHQOkUt1eyW0wgOCrC6rnevg6O_d6gaWOH2fLaL84KPckX8OuqzJozUwGCAYh6roLRbuVfrgSPBPCo4uH2CQxPnM40zTAk0j0nSXT8DB6_4RR9xmRr7n2mfytVyhoHUvkKH5V6nsUcnNNlYMKgzDf_MCtw6gihxB6iUYGHz6DoShC5h8Nwd2ZuXRtUZ6RA%3D)
---
Peter,

Imagine you're planning a move to a new country--a faraway place you've never visited before. Wouldn't you want to know everything you could about it--what the culture is like, the language, the climate, and most importantly, how to get there? It would make a huge difference in how you prepare for the journey!

As Christians, we know that one day we will leave this world and be united with God in heaven. But surprisingly, many of us know very little about what awaits us in that incredible place.
---
| | In my book _A Place Called Heaven_ , I dive into Scripture to answer 10 surprising questions about heaven, including:

* Is heaven a real place or just a state of mind?
* Will we know our loved ones when we get there?
* Do people in heaven know what's happening on earth?
* What difference does a future heaven make in our lives today?

---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee10c0ce605c47b5a32646205dc929e9&_e=8Aq_w9AAogqTq_UsMC4MbXTt45OJqO9lbkPhHrOq8gZF2hWJcC-nbxpUJW9rJJ6rokfZmtEO6hoVeGDag6xODOBe7Ya6pLncgPshSAGnv1vlG-m_ukf3mM50DEnX8VYKt8bZ4M23CBzyAtdZR8fG1Zeotd_SXGjcTJNRvH3n8Mrwoi3KttfA0wZ0LKPenF6NaB6eCaFacEewT_nfEwUdGHeXtJrdFw_WHCufIChxZIPEAUHQOkUt1eyW0wgOCrC6ZsiAzsSqhE40x6evUOq14n9RPGG0y3B3jTSbS14qmB7kl3ia31NDg-qYCH4qd6UkzxnwJU79quUO04ygRx6a9aq3LPM49teb2SA1c6_XsJWV5GuCaVcjSB4NVF4c8oeChOzyUY_hlsnlgE4EnAPZiuGIF63twxWkGC_m0BruIkA%3D)
---
| | I know many of us have asked these questions at some point. Understanding what the Bible says about our eternal home doesn’t just satisfy our curiosity—it transforms how we live today. By shifting our focus from the temporary struggles of this life to the eternal glory that awaits us, we can live with greater hope, purpose, and peace.

To thank you for your generous gift to _Pathway to Victory_ today, I’d love to send you a copy of _A Place Called Heaven_ , [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee10c0ce605c47b5a32646205dc929e9&_e=8Aq_w9AAogqTq_UsMC4MbXTt45OJqO9lbkPhHrOq8gZF2hWJcC-nbxpUJW9rJJ6rokfZmtEO6hoVeGDag6xODOBe7Ya6pLncgPshSAGnv1vlG-m_ukf3mM50DEnX8VYKt8bZ4M23CBzyAtdZR8fG1Zeotd_SXGjcTJNRvH3n8Mrwoi3KttfA0wZ0LKPenF6NaB6eCaFacEewT_nfEwUdGHeXtJrdFw_WHCufIChxZIPEAUHQOkUt1eyW0wgOCrC6HdmnYN0Xxlk4FPDk2g0WHQ0Qd0lgppBQ5iUe4MtWxA-B2nLE9r4cu3XaQXNHTKg7lMwlZRZNmX6pEge_2p2rD1lZocSjRSp7OITKfsg__LUCNuNDGBJlnwl1a7UTcA481F7ONx5ucNA7-RtGwopw-x4D8Ql41-9KtS6LP8JfmII%3D)

I hope this book will give you a clearer picture of the future God has prepared for you and help you live each day with eternity in mind.

Thank you for your continued support, which helps us spread the gospel of Jesus Christ to a world in need of hope.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. – For your gift of $75 or more, we’ll send you _A Place Called Heaven_ , the beautiful gift book _Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven_ , our exclusive ministry brochure, and the companion message series on DVD and MP3 audio. Click here to get a copy of this spiritually uplifting bundle: [https://secure.ptv.org/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-large-kit-1](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee10c0ce605c47b5a32646205dc929e9&_e=8Aq_w9AAogqTq_UsMC4MbbVWy1NMdtDT86JqnX_sYmIb_Qiz8TYaeclFJ23mIGaYDGZGw51c9AKOGRSkooRwQQj67wNsPkC5H9_u7KY8f779nLB0ydPpjGdXztusK2vYOFhweJ8jsE7ugls01OWDSzPKbCYYTkIJYIOCI_mUOp5el7q1yqax3ApAMRwBXxOiSGzows2ybqad_jCZ0Ea58a7KMmt5nXgVh777xw4_9t4XdmpGxsbDkZssJn0QiP2cdys9Zlp94tL7tpqAjFHiYTeuor34eZfthWST1XZd2sxuyR-J5MgkSlcKh0TWTYo0XPzXrpqaRewqB-If0ew_UBqjNJbQO44gaOxyknQ_AQ643uK1hDgZacO_YUM9HtmUXFdhg2g7biEBBRDxY7Am4VUplTmxo4IQzLFa_ZchkWYChixs39J1LeTdWz3CuIn8)

[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=ee10c0ce605c47b5a32646205dc929e9&_t=demf2g_GzHoOnjx0ePmg1qEeZox9Y6SU6IFYbmBUi_TSQ1eaTK_fa_3-1wkP4Ix6X85P0FjXrcxGvDO7sVG7hwDZJEDoP9XpwrDipRcWJOwjjaUV62HsOzp5SxseWGjr)

Wouldn't you want to know everything you could about it--what the culture is like, the language, the climate, and most importantly, how to get there? It would make a huge difference in how you prepare for the journey! As Christians, we know that one day we will leave this world and be united with God in heaven. But surprisingly, many of us know very little about what awaits us in that incredible place. | | In my book A Place Called Heaven , I dive into Scripture to answer 10 surprising questions about heaven, including: Is heaven a real place or just a state of mind? Will we know our loved ones when we get there? Do people in heaven know what's happening on earth? What difference does a future heaven make in our lives today? | | | I know many of us have asked these questions at some point. Understanding what the Bible says about our eternal home doesn’t just satisfy our curiosity—it transforms how we live today. By shifting our focus from the temporary struggles of this life to the eternal glory that awaits us, we can live with greater hope, purpose, and peace. To thank you for your generous gift to Pathway to Victory today, I’d love to send you a copy of A Place Called Heaven , I hope this book will give you a clearer picture of the future God has prepared for you and help you live each day with eternity in mind. Thank you for your continued support, which helps us spread the gospel of Jesus Christ to a world in need of hope. Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress P.S. – For your gift of $75 or more, we’ll send you A Place Called Heaven , the beautiful gift book Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven , our exclusive ministry brochure, and the companion message series on DVD and MP3 audio. Click here to get a copy of this spiritually uplifting bundle:
