name: Royce White
subject: I’m sharing my announcement with you FIRST, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I'm getting a head start NOW
|
---
Peter,

I have an important announcement, and you're the first person I'm reaching out to with it.

**I 'm running for Senate in Minnesota again, this time to take down Radical Leftist Tina Smith! [**Can you chip in to give me the head start I need?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5d92e5e996ba44348a77cd6cebe3ce50&_e=X8bO_gIbhoXHI6VSGG17x7ZVbcbmFQiKFF9v46DMRCUmjr1RuOvXJ5QLmne5amOTDNKp3wzQcxyz-Cj7FjN2HE9L5wlCdxJpuXFKXgXGqjIOnU-yNoxImghC036ISnHF9vOwqdeSYDvMW3RFRyqwqxtUmjggm1rxuthQyxBbH38BgK-Sx-KecbDNH35EMKqhD67VzxcntiT9WAZv72Bi51_RhvCgDNbeQtGZp8oT5mI32qKfmqIq8BhK5hJBqx3m1EulHpkxhIuZqS_21o-rVuTJkteZUZS28tz0uuaK37d_aemL4K48Dfd3WBNOilPkbWIu5-V3Rgb8GB08x9jLXA%3D%3D)**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5d92e5e996ba44348a77cd6cebe3ce50&_e=X8bO_gIbhoXHI6VSGG17x7ZVbcbmFQiKFF9v46DMRCUmjr1RuOvXJ5QLmne5amOTDNKp3wzQcxyz-Cj7FjN2HE9L5wlCdxJpuXFKXgXGqjIOnU-yNoxImghC036ISnHF9vOwqdeSYDvMW3RFRyqwqxtUmjggm1rxuthQyxBbH38BgK-Sx-KecbDNH35EMKqhhTAE1dekd8x5zFUjib9FWtgDks0-nu9TDDL6R5sT9N_y6KW-5Xrbu9cazoYHgUuTYsiIIsowI-SMYJzJXrZWfdtUevesL7syynoD-KNoqnyD59IxraJKsWioZLkhMw0Sxx6TNlnVdx8muPHGdhxVjg%3D%3D)
Now that I have two political campaigns under my belt, I understand what it takes to win. It's not easy for a Free-Thinking Black Republican to win in Minnesota. The Democrats control the media, schools, election integrity, and the areas with the most voter turnout.

_They want me to be a slave and servant to their politics. But I 'll never abandon my America-First principles._

For a Black Republican to win, it takes MULTIPLE runs at it, especially when you don't have help from the counter-MAGA RINO Republicans. First, you have to build a brand and get your name out there, then you have to endure the baseless attacks from the media and Left, and finally, you have to get your uncensored message out to voters.

**This takes time, but I 'm confident that in 2026, I'll defeat Tina Smith and become Minnesota's first Black Senator elected to represent Minnesotans.**

__The 2022 and 2024 elections were like pre-game warmups. If you don 't stretch and put up some shots before the game, you're going in cold, and you're bound to lose.

__[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5d92e5e996ba44348a77cd6cebe3ce50&_e=X8bO_gIbhoXHI6VSGG17x7ZVbcbmFQiKFF9v46DMRCUmjr1RuOvXJ5QLmne5amOTDNKp3wzQcxyz-Cj7FjN2HE9L5wlCdxJpuXFKXgXGqjIOnU-yNoxImghC036ISnHF9vOwqdeSYDvMW3RFRyqwqxtUmjggm1rxuthQyxBbH38BgK-Sx-KecbDNH35EMKqh_uy8OFTMwvkoYdcrSPIogdJyJXg7dMy12j2d-hz-ro4nrBrapwJEdTuvwQwsT_DhPk47dgs_X8qsIfWOoh8ffDyICREVuSMivmWqYKBW5G1ywT3ctdKx-ChIHTr3AkplHRBnx3_qAcqvL9AbYsAK1w%3D%3D)_
But I 'm warmed up now, and I'm ready to DUNK on the Radical Left once and for all._

**In the 2024 election, we gained 8 points of the 24 that we needed. No one outside of our movement expected my campaign to be competitive, yet I got 1.3 MILLION VOTES with ZERO HELP!**

[**THIS IS WHY I NEED TO START NOW! I 'M RELYING ON YOU TO CHIP IN AND GIVE ME THE HEAD START THAT I NEED TO WIN!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5d92e5e996ba44348a77cd6cebe3ce50&_e=X8bO_gIbhoXHI6VSGG17x7ZVbcbmFQiKFF9v46DMRCUmjr1RuOvXJ5QLmne5amOTDNKp3wzQcxyz-Cj7FjN2HE9L5wlCdxJpuXFKXgXGqjIOnU-yNoxImghC036ISnHF9vOwqdeSYDvMW3RFRyqwqxtUmjggm1rxuthQyxBbH38BgK-Sx-KecbDNH35EMKqhwPjUY_ZahofCpm-u-Q7bLu62z3H_2c9aLgeVpgLM515C19WdZw9Zo-ec-cULTxZoOayp-83PIt2OoBAbCJGnjjhr9FxGKCV7E2Q-8Um1NNPJB25dSA2yvOBzcuLWB0kj2z2tm9lTYK1DlkWzVSkPNA%3D%3D)

Tina Smith has spent every waking moment since she was elected in 2018 building a massive war chest, preparing for her re-election in 2026. I need your help by midnight to start amassing the resources to defeat her.

[**Peter, I 'm humbly asking you to donate just $10 before midnight to defeat a Radical Leftist who's been anti-Trump since the beginning.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5d92e5e996ba44348a77cd6cebe3ce50&_e=X8bO_gIbhoXHI6VSGG17x7ZVbcbmFQiKFF9v46DMRCUmjr1RuOvXJ5QLmne5amOTDNKp3wzQcxyz-Cj7FjN2HE9L5wlCdxJpuXFKXgXGqjIOnU-yNoxImghC036ISnHF9vOwqdeSYDvMW3RFRyqwqxtUmjggm1rxuthQyxBbH38BgK-Sx-KecbDNH35EMKqhiH0Ex9XkMiKRCD6Yup5kZKwIUDhZiVuSftk9wQrdZlY4Pmgtn-cCSiep8bcVrNkuMDI7d0mzXdHcDlG-LCjeK1TDtt-QETkE_zrOaiMrzZScV-no2O_Ib-6Fe-X7VR3872iGlZSu4hShdOp512OJGA%3D%3D)

Here's to our Head Start,
Royce White for Senate

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5d92e5e996ba44348a77cd6cebe3ce50&_e=X8bO_gIbhoXHI6VSGG17x7ZVbcbmFQiKFF9v46DMRCUmjr1RuOvXJ5QLmne5amOTDNKp3wzQcxyz-Cj7FjN2HE9L5wlCdxJpuXFKXgXGqjIOnU-yNoxImghC036ISnHF9vOwqdeSYDvMW3RFRyqwqxtUmjggm1rxuthQyxBbH38BgK-Sx-KecbDNH35EMKqhznomgRm6dfpg5kak7cbM8W37rLfVn9CysVts_lZBN0taWTefsHFyjJUID5KgoYD6iZ5v13Ub2Q3noUPi1_sENYz01_tvJqlwit6_dGH2FB_6CHceYxLEF4TG0ys2EE0gbmZBbX3lWMH0xLhWqetwYQ%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is working tirelessly to FLIP Minnesota Red and give President Trump the MAGA reinforcements he needs. Can you help him by clicking the button below?

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5d92e5e996ba44348a77cd6cebe3ce50&_e=X8bO_gIbhoXHI6VSGG17x7ZVbcbmFQiKFF9v46DMRCUmjr1RuOvXJ5QLmne5amOTDNKp3wzQcxyz-Cj7FjN2HE9L5wlCdxJpuXFKXgXGqjIOnU-yNoxImghC036ISnHF9vOwqdeSYDvMW3RFRyqwqxtUmjggm1rxuthQyxBbH38BgK-Sx-KecbDNH35EMKqh7Yo93DHjTpIt3JuBGTwdDQzbE3nF-GIrania3cr4CZsm9g3ZQObApjbKBkWg2EPMFHrejQZR-OCecksxQDqZvfspBeZckPLJ6_KTWmTv47GPNPWnsxU52QbkMWvof6dHufKuAIDtpcGC3ty2fIv53w%3D%3D)

name: Olivia Krolczyk, Leadership Institute
subject: Create campus leaders
body:
Protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution
| Peter, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4f57550217bc4a8bb5961eaff0084d27&_e=a2N5EhoAXK1JTWHX9ZIirHrbNgQfT7-S2U1SJzPDrcu7Gz1H-pihvs2gTopiFFDZk9Egssfrl8h-XRbsFiYZoZ8biW_aXTmFPAnSGOzzDo8t6K004MMv0jj2sj_QfvY9raNRBdDikL8z4BXxaK3D6qVczpYEZmBIvAh95HA0nCTKmZD81FwfVgd9oigxIpjGXSddBkrPWtVczfcyODv5Ffvw5hPiZ4HVeTyar4b7LNhoQzuf-_NPk2yaHhPLJwAOlLuT6yL3MRGmtQbuiT-iMBEXudGsdhoRuoWrvM6PGZJtVYYycNVJMBl11QbJ7MwuAU6S2aXXuwfctTnyRLUxox6CKm-F6_ggpV0pSP87jC5LSSnuxY_HzvGKzFvIbI6Gec3I8_9XRRG3zz-EJzw0yA%3D%3D)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Peter, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? [Today I ask you to help conservative students fight for their rights this fall. ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4f57550217bc4a8bb5961eaff0084d27&_e=a2N5EhoAXK1JTWHX9ZIirHrbNgQfT7-S2U1SJzPDrcu7Gz1H-pihvs2gTopiFFDZk9Egssfrl8h-XRbsFiYZoZ8biW_aXTmFPAnSGOzzDo8t6K004MMv0jj2sj_QfvY9raNRBdDikL8z4BXxaK3D6qVczpYEZmBIvAh95HA0nCTKmZD81FwfVgd9oigxIpjGXSddBkrPWtVczfcyODv5Ffvw5hPiZ4HVeTyar4b7LNhoghOgy0JICmpCCh5OjyhQevLmqS2N288lTAPRwuThEr59-EqUCWzsW7gr4oJOjxM29Uc7-V2HxcLhGED_11SpvNeYGEWhojjHTsfhgk8WJWKaibK3cHLIiRoQOgYVpHcej272-KPwbf8DId6YKJ-vP0GbejE0wtsGgZ5lk_TS3w%3D%3D) With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. [Will you stand bravely with me and Riley? ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4f57550217bc4a8bb5961eaff0084d27&_e=a2N5EhoAXK1JTWHX9ZIirHrbNgQfT7-S2U1SJzPDrcu7Gz1H-pihvs2gTopiFFDZk9Egssfrl8h-XRbsFiYZoZ8biW_aXTmFPAnSGOzzDo8t6K004MMv0jj2sj_QfvY9raNRBdDikL8z4BXxaK3D6qVczpYEZmBIvAh95HA0nCTKmZD81FwfVgd9oigxIpjGXSddBkrPWtVczfcyODv5Ffvw5hPiZ4HVeTyar4b7LNjLFdnNd5Hjr3FwAxgx267GTQvWfwgW1Cuc3KKpjfGHOegTiKz55lHS7EC9PYyjSSUIivFmTJim4T9kwKdeIBPNt8UVUN-qiCgjODvd3SKCDFWI50n8dLx0jAsY042G5n8uR9JbBMmAd07PS7pVhj1d_s9KFtfE21fciSou3Cg7Xg%3D%3D) Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. Please let me count on you now. Thank you. Fight on, Olivia Krolczyk Ambassador Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Look, I know this is the last thing on your mind right now.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
But hear me out... Look, Peter —

I know that the holiday season is a busy time for folks all across the country.

Whether you’re buying gifts, planning meals, preparing for holiday festivities, or even just getting ready to spend some quality time with your loved ones, **I know that asking for your hard earned dollars is asking for a lot right now – but here’s the truth:**

_With so much at stake in 2025, we can’t afford to let our foot off the gas._

Soon, Americans will be living under a MAGA administration that has both the Senate and the House of Representatives in its back pocket. Now, more than ever before, we need to be prepared to do whatever it takes to hold Trump and the GOP-controlled Congress accountable next year.

When I’m sworn into the 119th Congress on January 3rd, it’s crucial that I head into my first term representing MO-01 with the tools needed to fight back against extremism and get things done for St. Louisans. Whether it’s fighting to codify the right to reproductive freedom, protecting our environment, or getting weapons of war off our streets – I’ll always fight for your best interests. **But doing that takes resources, and I need your help to make it happen.**

[**Before you unplug before your holiday festivities – however you're celebrating – will you consider chipping in $10, or anything you can to help me keep this movement going strong all the way into clean_body: But hear me out... Look, Peter — I know that the holiday season is a busy time for folks all across the country. Whether you’re buying gifts, planning meals, preparing for holiday festivities, or even just getting ready to spend some quality time with your loved ones, I know that asking for your hard earned dollars is asking for a lot right now – but here’s the truth: With so much at stake in 2025, we can’t afford to let our foot off the gas. Soon, Americans will be living under a MAGA administration that has both the Senate and the House of Representatives in its back pocket. Now, more than ever before, we need to be prepared to do whatever it takes to hold Trump and the GOP-controlled Congress accountable next year. When I’m sworn into the 119th Congress on January 3rd, it’s crucial that I head into my first term representing MO-01 with the tools needed to fight back against extremism and get things done for St. Louisans. Whether it’s fighting to codify the right to reproductive freedom, protecting our environment, or getting weapons of war off our streets – I’ll always fight for your best interests. But doing that takes resources, and I need your help to make it happen. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you Wesley = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

body:
We know you’re probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!
| |
---
| | | **URGENT UPDATE ABOUT SPECIAL ELECTION TO FILL MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT:**
__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

__Now:__ Early voting is about to begin in FL-01 and we urgently need your support to win key races like this!
| | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=04068b5106344588846da0764baec035&_e=YLkW-JlZ-KPClmuLAmY-MT6CvsBEu46ZinSpI5uFkSyY6g-MV9wmsCjRlaI8DHYX9uPKfp08GPH8UJg5t1MRn_NT88UGMRNBOiI8alt23sSAtqkBe0GFRqaUJC_q00uW0c-057n9bkR0-ZK7Dlszym-6c8pim7-CJCC6tXGM2te78sFH5TwkBf5oxHC00g3Fb2Wk_cwT7y8lt9RXsxi6Nz59VqrA5S2RB4P9OmiiCL5pq94mqK8PvhHwb3_nWHNl3oPiiXbQ2UOhLQCDI4VQUwTrIMeWlqurpKYXuRWJlXwwBmLhoFV48VcohwCsvwfd95yK6Ofrgd6mZUDJ-SSB2k4DLZllxhFpAcE--eK4FAXnv2V-lX5HzRQhNJ7vJwumjUMGTmCMUSL5p9sBxJ1kmQ%3D%3D "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Do not forget this:

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

name: Team Warner
subject: Virginia’s elections are setting the tone for 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Let’s position Democrats for success.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99472288/520010075/-52086822?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOY_241229_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFhMjFlNS0xZmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4VrzR9JLN-wDjPBy3ZR3aQkcsIa7IX9dktx1vhbd8g=) Derek,

Early voting is already underway in Virginia’s January special elections – elections that will set the tone for 2025.

Before we talk more about what’s at stake, we’re asking if you can [_**chip in before our end-of-year fundraising deadline to support Senator Warner’s work to get out the vote for Democrats in VA >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99472289/520010076/-52086822?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOY_241229_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFhMjFlNS0xZmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4VrzR9JLN-wDjPBy3ZR3aQkcsIa7IX9dktx1vhbd8g=)

Look, the reality is that Virginia has a competitive election year coming up. Not only is control of the State Senate AND House of Delegates up for grabs next month, but in November, Virginians will vote on a new governor, lieutenant governor, and attorney general.

**We need an infrastructure for Democratic success and we need to start building it now.**

Preserving our majorities at the local level is Senator Warner’s top priority – but following this year’s elections, momentum is on the GOP’s side. All eyes are on Virginia as we pave the way for the 2025 elections.

[_**Will you donate $5 before midnight on December 31st to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in the Commonwealth?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99472290/520010077/-52086822?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOY_241229_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFhMjFlNS0xZmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4VrzR9JLN-wDjPBy3ZR3aQkcsIa7IX9dktx1vhbd8g=)

Thank you,

Team Warner
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99472291/520010078/-52086822?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOY_241229_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFhMjFlNS0xZmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4VrzR9JLN-wDjPBy3ZR3aQkcsIa7IX9dktx1vhbd8g=)****

subject: ☀️ To all VoteVets supporters - please don’t click away 🫡
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#
Peter -
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there and have made a real difference in people's lives.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans and Military Families. And looking ahead, it’s going to be critical in the fight against Trump and the MAGA Republicans running the government in 2025.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with tensions escalating every day and with Trump ready to tear the Constitution we swore to protect to shreds, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important moment in modern American political history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective election ads in politics, ads that make a real difference, seems worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation as we drive hard to our final fundraising goal of the year on New Year’s Eve. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241229-1-120&t=1&akid=34044%2E3013755%2EjnM0z1)

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: my mindset
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99472436/520010688/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY5YTk5NS0yMGM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0B2-jBaV6UIr3mq-7dDQJbW3ty4fV5Qy09FwkcBlUM=) Fighting for real change means always putting your community first. It means pushing forward even when the odds are stacked against you. It means working every single day to create opportunities that truly benefit others. That’s the approach I’ve taken my entire career — and the mindset I’m bringing with me to Congress. That mentality has helped me improve child care and education outcomes for children, revitalize communities, increase youth development programs, and level the playing field at Head Start and the Skillman Foundation. Then, in the Michigan State Senate, it helped me pass the largest tax cut for working families in our state’s history, help to repeal Michigan’s extreme abortion ban, and introduce plans to lower critical costs like prescription drugs, housing, and child care. Now, in Congress, my business card may change, but the job remains the same. I’m eager to get to work on solutions that make things easier for working families: cutting costs for essentials like healthcare, groceries, and housing, bringing more good-paying jobs to Michigan, and protecting reproductive rights, including access to abortion, contraception, and IVF. [_**Together, we achieved the biggest over-performance of any non-incumbent House candidate, proving the strength of this coalition. Now, this same team can help me make a real difference for Michigan families. Will you pitch in today to help us continue to deliver?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99472437/520010689/1443816105?refcode=email_122924_mindsett&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY5YTk5NS0yMGM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0B2-jBaV6UIr3mq-7dDQJbW3ty4fV5Qy09FwkcBlUM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99472438/520010690/1443816105?refcode=email_122924_mindset&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY5YTk5NS0yMGM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0B2-jBaV6UIr3mq-7dDQJbW3ty4fV5Qy09FwkcBlUM=)

clean_body: = Fighting for real change means always putting your community first. It means pushing forward even when the odds are stacked against you. It means working every single day to create opportunities that truly benefit others. That’s the approach I’ve taken my entire career — and the mindset I’m bringing with me to Congress. That mentality has helped me improve child care and education outcomes for children, revitalize communities, increase youth development programs, and level the playing field at Head Start and the Skillman Foundation. Then, in the Michigan State Senate, it helped me pass the largest tax cut for working families in our state’s history, help to repeal Michigan’s extreme abortion ban, and introduce plans to lower critical costs like prescription drugs, housing, and child care. Now, in Congress, my business card may change, but the job remains the same. I’m eager to get to work on solutions that make things easier for working families: cutting costs for essentials like healthcare, groceries, and housing, bringing more good-paying jobs to Michigan, and protecting reproductive rights, including access to abortion, contraception, and IVF. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Kristen | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8244%2E5257348%2Ett8Pkq)
**[$18.24.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5024?c0=dec2024_abs_em.2mr605&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241229_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8244%2E5257348%2Ett8Pkq)**
Derek, that is our average online contribution amount this year.
It’s a number I’m really proud of — and it’s a powerful amount.
Our work was fueled by people like you chipping in $5, $25, or maybe $50. Not big corporations or billionaires like Donald Trump's cohort of donors.
From the start of this movement for the U.S. Senate, I wanted to create the most powerful grassroots team that California has ever seen. Based on our victory and the millions of dollars we raised — not just for our campaign, but for Democrats across the country — I would say we achieved our goal.
But our work continues, even after the election.
We have a lot to do from the U.S. Senate, including holding Donald Trump and his Cabinet nominees to account. We also have our work cut out for us to flip control of the Senate and the House in 2026.
**But I know this team can take on any challenge because you have my back and will step up with a grassroots contribution when we need it. Which is why I’m asking:**
**[Derek, will you chip in $18.24, our average online contribution amount of 2024, before my final quarterly fundraising deadline of the year? This is the last opportunity of the year to show the strength of our movement.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5024?c0=dec2024_abs_em.2mr605&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241229_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8244%2E5257348%2Ett8Pkq)**

body:
Click to unlock 2 more Dem Senators >>
| **You know:** DC is missing representation in Congress due to its lack of statehood. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241229_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18334%2E878179%2E6th_oR) **You know:** If DC becomes a state, we’d be __almost guaranteed__ to gain 2 more Democratic Senators.

**And you know:** Control of the Senate usually comes down to just 1 or 2 seats — _DC statehood could _lock down_ a Democratic Senate majority for us, team!_

**[So we need to know if you support the fight for DC Statehood: Take your one-click poll ASAP! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241229_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=18334%2E878179%2E6th_oR)** | [DC SHOULD BE THE 51ST STATE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241229_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=18334%2E878179%2E6th_oR)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. | | It's the folks at Team Ruiz. The Congressman reached out to you yesterday — did you have a chance to read it? It’s not one to miss, so we’ve forwarded it below. Here’s the deal: Our final FEC-mandated fundraising deadline is right around the corner, and before we celebrate the new year, we need to reach our end-of-year $15,000 benchmark. This is more than a number — it’s what we need to enter 2025 with the resources we need to combat Project 2025, continue our voter outreach efforts, and lay the groundwork for success in the days to come. [So, will you give Dr. Ruiz’s message a read below and consider chipping in $10 during this final opportunity to show our strength ahead of our last FEC deadline of the year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99473120/520013082/936119956?amount=10&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_122924_1_2_EOY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUyZmY0ZTItMjVjNi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ytO0yrMkMigyQs2bLJ7BLvYCD-EsYpmoHrW5AehEhUk=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99473121/520013083/936119956?amount=10&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_122924_1_2_EOY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUyZmY0ZTItMjVjNi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ytO0yrMkMigyQs2bLJ7BLvYCD-EsYpmoHrW5AehEhUk=)**

_\---Forwarded Message from Dr. Raul Ruiz---_
As we wrap up 2024, I can’t help but reflect on all the good work we were able to accomplish together this year.
Be it championing expansions of Medicare for uninsured families or fighting to guarantee our veterans are getting the benefits they deserve, each day in Congress brings us a unique opportunity to advance legislation that puts us on the path to progress.
Since day one, that’s exactly what I’ve done — and I couldn’t be more grateful to have the chance to continue fighting for you in Congress.
But here’s the deal: Next year, we’ll be entering a Republican trifecta in Washington. In an era of uncertainty about what the future holds, it’s never been more important for us to stand united in defense of our values and belief in a better future for all.
My team has set an ambitious goal of raising $15,000 by the new year to give us the resources we need to keep up this fight, and right now, falling short isn’t an option.
[Having you by my side will make all the difference — and I’m counting on your support. Will you stand with me today by chipping in to my campaign, be it $10 or $50, to help us push forward when we need it most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99473124/520013084/936119956?amount=10&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_122924_1_2_EOY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUyZmY0ZTItMjVjNi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ytO0yrMkMigyQs2bLJ7BLvYCD-EsYpmoHrW5AehEhUk=)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.**

clean_body: Did you see the Congressman’s note to you yesterday? While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's the folks at Team Ruiz. The Congressman reached out to you yesterday — did you have a chance to read it? It’s not one to miss, so we’ve forwarded it below. Here’s the deal: Our final FEC-mandated fundraising deadline is right around the corner, and before we celebrate the new year, we need to reach our end-of-year $15,000 benchmark. This is more than a number — it’s what we need to enter 2025 with the resources we need to combat Project 2025, continue our voter outreach efforts, and lay the groundwork for success in the days to come. = | | = \---Forwarded Message from Dr. Raul Ruiz--- As we wrap up 2024, I can’t help but reflect on all the good work we were able to accomplish together this year. Be it championing expansions of Medicare for uninsured families or fighting to guarantee our veterans are getting the benefits they deserve, each day in Congress brings us a unique opportunity to advance legislation that puts us on the path to progress. Since day one, that’s exactly what I’ve done — and I couldn’t be more grateful to have the chance to continue fighting for you in Congress. But here’s the deal: Next year, we’ll be entering a Republican trifecta in Washington. In an era of uncertainty about what the future holds, it’s never been more important for us to stand united in defense of our values and belief in a better future for all. My team has set an ambitious goal of raising $15,000 by the new year to give us the resources we need to keep up this fight, and right now, falling short isn’t an option. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Only together can we secure a future we are all proud of. Thank you for your support, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. **WE KNOW** that it’s a blatant violation of the rule of law that Trump is threatening to jail his political adversaries...

**BUT WE KNOW** as he appoints his cronies to the Department of Justice, he just might get away with his authoritarian plan!

**SO WE KNOW** we need to make sure every single Democrat in this country is behind the January 6th Committee – _so we’re launching this urgent poll:_ | **[_25,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: How would you grade the January 6th Committee?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-j6-comm/?source=FFR_20241229_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22696%2E4449941%2EKaV0uf)** | [A - AMAZING! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-j6-comm/?source=FFR_20241229_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22696%2E4449941%2EKaV0uf)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Tina for Oregon
subject: Our end-of-year goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter — Here are three reasons why you should chip in $3 today ahead of Tuesday’s critical end-of-year deadline:
1. Oregon’s legislative session starts soon after the new year, and Tina is ramping up to ensure lawmakers continue delivering real results for Oregonians. She’ll need the help of this team to spread her message and rally support to get her proposed budget across the finish line.
2. Tina is laser-focused on advancing her priorities for Oregon, from addressing the housing crisis to raising early childhood literacy rates to improving our mental health and addiction systems. She’s not thinking about fundraising, and nor should she. **That means we have to worry about it for her — which is why we’re reaching out.**
3. Our last fundraising deadline of the year will set the tone for 2025 and the second half of the Governor’s term. If we fall short now, we’ll have to spend the coming months playing catch-up, setting us behind in a critical year for Tina.

[_**So Peter, have we convinced you? clean_body: | Peter — Here are three reasons why you should chip in $3 today ahead of Tuesday’s critical end-of-year deadline: 1. Oregon’s legislative session starts soon after the new year, and Tina is ramping up to ensure lawmakers continue delivering real results for Oregonians. She’ll need the help of this team to spread her message and rally support to get her proposed budget across the finish line. 2. Tina is laser-focused on advancing her priorities for Oregon, from addressing the housing crisis to raising early childhood literacy rates to improving our mental health and addiction systems. She’s not thinking about fundraising, and nor should she. That means we have to worry about it for her — which is why we’re reaching out. 3. Our last fundraising deadline of the year will set the tone for 2025 and the second half of the Governor’s term. If we fall short now, we’ll have to spend the coming months playing catch-up, setting us behind in a critical year for Tina. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Team Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: This could be the end.
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=db0a1900aab89b48e53af114c93b855332b69e1ca8c9933f13c9263f0b8a02601f56797cdf780a6bd472344403b4c77db30b43f5be935b42e0a85312ec993fa9 I would rather be doing anything other than writing this email to you right now. What I’m about to tell you pains me to write, but I can’t put this off any longer. It’s all over. This could be the end. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=db0a1900aab89b48e53af114c93b855332b69e1ca8c9933f13c9263f0b8a02601f56797cdf780a6bd472344403b4c77db30b43f5be935b42e0a85312ec993fa9 RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our final goal of 2024. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=db0a1900aab89b48e53af114c93b855332b69e1ca8c9933f13c9263f0b8a02601f56797cdf780a6bd472344403b4c77db30b43f5be935b42e0a85312ec993fa9 I could really use your support right here and now before the New Year. HERE’S WHY: 1. Ever since their MAJOR DEFEAT this year, the Democrats are more fired up than ever before to defeat our Republican agenda, destroy our conservative values, and stand against our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. 2. In order to try and defeat us, they’re pulling out all the stops. They’re making the calls to all the national Democrats and liberal fat cats. They’re fundraising and strategizing for how to TAKE DOWN our America First agenda once and for all. 3. Meanwhile, I’m way behind pace to reach my make-or-break fundraising goal before our FINAL deadline of 2024. We can’t afford to end the year and start out 2025 on this note! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=db0a1900aab89b48e53af114c93b855332b69e1ca8c9933f13c9263f0b8a02601f56797cdf780a6bd472344403b4c77db30b43f5be935b42e0a85312ec993fa9 RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT I know you’ve already done so much for this campaign, but if you can find it in your heart to pitch in ONCE MORE before our deadline, it would mean the world to me and go a long way in my fight to protect our America First priorities! I’m really hoping I can count on your help, Peter. No gift is too small right now. Anything you can give helps me inch closer to our make-or-break goal. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=db0a1900aab89b48e53af114c93b855332b69e1ca8c9933f13c9263f0b8a02601f56797cdf780a6bd472344403b4c77db30b43f5be935b42e0a85312ec993fa9 So please, help me get back on track before the year ends. And if you can’t give right now. Trust me, I understand. All I ask is for your continued prayers and support. Thank you, Peter, and Happy New Year! - Marsha Blackburn https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=db0a1900aab89b48e53af114c93b855332b69e1ca8c9933f13c9263f0b8a02601f56797cdf780a6bd472344403b4c77db30b43f5be935b42e0a85312ec993fa9 RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: [3 DAYS LEFT:] Stand up to Trump’s attacks on the environment before the end of the year.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE5MzI4NzIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDc2NDY5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — There are only a few days left in the year, and we still need
your help to reach our $25,000 year-end fundraising goal. Hitting this goal matters.In just a few weeks, Donald Trump will be back in the White House — and he’s
promising disastrousanti-environmental policies right away: rolling back pollution safeguards,
attacking clean energy, and authorizing a massive expansion of oil and gas
drilling to reward his fossil fuel cronies. The environmental movement needs to be ready to respond. We need your help to start the new year with enough resources to stand up to
Trump and Big Polluters, Peter. Please renew your LCV membership for 2025 today. It only takes $5. Each gift helps us fight back against Trump’s disastrous anti-environmental agenda >> https://links.messages.lcv. LEAGUE OF CONSERVATION VOTERS
YEAR END SUPPORTER STATUS

Supporter Name: Peter Willis
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Fundraising Goal: $25,000
DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT on TUESDAY, DECEMBER 31

Membership Status: RENEW NOW FOR JUST $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. We know that in the coming weeks and months Trump will seek to do serious damage
to the environment. During his campaign, he promised to be a dictator on day one
to benefit oil and gas companies. But just how bad it will be depends heavily on our movement. LCV has a plan to
disrupt Trump’s pro-polluter agenda and defend protections for our climate,
environment, and health. We can oppose fossil fuel projects. We can block bad
votes in Congress and hold anti-environment members accountable. We can mobilize
people to speak out and protest — and even win new progress in the states. But
it’s going to take all of us working together. Right now, we don’t have the resources we’ll need to protect people and the
planet in 2025. So, we’re asking: Renew your LCV membership for 2025 today. It only takes $5. Each and every gift helps us reach our goal — and supports our environment from MAGA Republicans’ attacks >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_ Thanks for everything you do, Peter — in 2024 and beyond! I’m grateful
to have you in our movement. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thanks for your support.

Washington, DC 20005

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Imagine our shock
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=957997ea61b1455f896916dd6186bfe6&_e=tO0RUEQ__ZtNxhmfKzhmAfsHNRoTTchGdgAFvLOzJgWt3Pnut8EbwpwQxRoW5i242PWRqAinR1NLkEyjlOI7xGYzFKi18L0GmPfEcK_w46YDTrGNk59nQNI7V7gb_vDkJH2DgOBD4ImeQ20E15qlT1mMVzr7G66n55JxAxJQbf5Ds2r7Hiop0EBNZIjozYoT9ODozJe5-JZ-DV4O835DAn8OIdQtGLSxMt6rX6c-OS5PkHRkCliIZ_UxKN4Zw70qV1CZL_bVT6PnsK2ipWDsJF-E0e-FgrPM4YEA1va5ScSk4f3F7L6r_BNsTvJeT213F6m1Jc-tweZhUprZmLcptMr6GG-JSJDkp700sORHOg6FiZC-qPFjdRmwHbnnwm0I)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=957997ea61b1455f896916dd6186bfe6&_e=tO0RUEQ__ZtNxhmfKzhmAfsHNRoTTchGdgAFvLOzJgWt3Pnut8EbwpwQxRoW5i242PWRqAinR1NLkEyjlOI7xGYzFKi18L0GmPfEcK_w46YDTrGNk59nQNI7V7gb_vDkJH2DgOBD4ImeQ20E15qlT1mMVzr7G66n55JxAxJQbf5Ds2r7Hiop0EBNZIjozYoT9ODozJe5-JZ-DV4O835DAn8OIdQtGLSxMt6rX6c-OS7P9XjWb3EqkSxGLSPWaeN_1Rn1Le3Xsy2pa2aS2vBZII_s80OLGC_UenvuOicqIuAUShhlWvNQEQTJNf9jVnIIeNf_ovdPS9oC1kJgcppcrDMEUcn9_Bxhoxrxq6AHcPZNdXpiol0zlViGAwFRYoHV)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=957997ea61b1455f896916dd6186bfe6&_e=tO0RUEQ__ZtNxhmfKzhmAfsHNRoTTchGdgAFvLOzJgWt3Pnut8EbwpwQxRoW5i242PWRqAinR1NLkEyjlOI7xGYzFKi18L0GmPfEcK_w46YDTrGNk59nQNI7V7gb_vDkJH2DgOBD4ImeQ20E15qlT1mMVzr7G66n55JxAxJQbf5Ds2r7Hiop0EBNZIjozYoT9ODozJe5-JZ-DV4O835DAn8OIdQtGLSxMt6rX6c-OS4SV60QGMrhc7iRfypZcKLK1lo3pY0N5aQa2yG8rQgK9HnGO5MtxHnFDO8xz9R-VYBhz7YwlcqDd84iiBbjVLdoKME7NgoMJYLuKF0iycmYyhnrT-cIRSBHePTyuk6Y6UBNuELy5HN-N4-zL0unbbt5)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=957997ea61b1455f896916dd6186bfe6&_e=tO0RUEQ__ZtNxhmfKzhmAfsHNRoTTchGdgAFvLOzJgWt3Pnut8EbwpwQxRoW5i242PWRqAinR1NLkEyjlOI7xGYzFKi18L0GmPfEcK_w46YDTrGNk59nQNI7V7gb_vDkJH2DgOBD4ImeQ20E15qlT1mMVzr7G66n55JxAxJQbf5Ds2r7Hiop0EBNZIjozYoT9ODozJe5-JZ-DV4O835DAn8OIdQtGLSxMt6rX6c-OS75_LulMSpA73mbN4jnoCArIolBBRDChtf9EcPL9X5gaJ0PgsvcfWiFWtiEbZSOw4-m0AWoCf23b-YUBBRIbzcdlMsyWxdwkB9FiifiI4PjLWsssrV_vbymDmQSWS0TjH8rGp5drz7U56iDT55oyEdu)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=957997ea61b1455f896916dd6186bfe6&_e=tO0RUEQ__ZtNxhmfKzhmAfsHNRoTTchGdgAFvLOzJgWt3Pnut8EbwpwQxRoW5i242PWRqAinR1NLkEyjlOI7xGYzFKi18L0GmPfEcK_w46YDTrGNk59nQNI7V7gb_vDkJH2DgOBD4ImeQ20E15qlT1mMVzr7G66n55JxAxJQbf5Ds2r7Hiop0EBNZIjozYoT9ODozJe5-JZ-DV4O835DAn8OIdQtGLSxMt6rX6c-OS7wNk5PedLSINMdKmMAVnWheMKkvznZy_NgWfpREw5XdYj_s67Q1t6v73g2dG-UojjBOBdAIlmcqFiWJXzG-xmQQtzv1dVz3bzg6WxZPvXW3WDZMNcfxfPUs4jbmUjnvjDZIPSEAwuT3CWYuoOnt5Db)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=957997ea61b1455f896916dd6186bfe6&_e=tO0RUEQ__ZtNxhmfKzhmAfsHNRoTTchGdgAFvLOzJgWt3Pnut8EbwpwQxRoW5i242PWRqAinR1NLkEyjlOI7xGYzFKi18L0GmPfEcK_w46YDTrGNk59nQNI7V7gb_vDkJH2DgOBD4ImeQ20E15qlT1mMVzr7G66n55JxAxJQbf5Ds2r7Hiop0EBNZIjozYoT9ODozJe5-JZ-DV4O835DAn8OIdQtGLSxMt6rX6c-OS5uclvhJY0viTdOsCOSqF0FhjqfalXzhYXkTyezsOIZ3bOMfZ7U898E1IGd9GyQu-xFCdR4Pgqu2fSTlQ3VUEvzpQjNtYB4BL0XgFW1wC1ehhcfpTd35jOaDYbnz_iUVlvCshNp1Kqp1s_68hR2vl_g)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. clean_body: Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Dear Fellow Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! subject: They're hoping we're dejected and defeated. We're not.
body:
I feel hopeful knowing EMILYs List is in the fight |

When I know I'm going to get good news and bad news together, I always want to hear the bad news first. So I'll start with this: **The 2024 election cycle was tough**. We did not see the results we wanted at the top of the ticket, and Democrats will be fighting hard in 2026 and 2028 to regain control in Congress. Our goal to elect women who will restore our rights is urgent.

Here's the good news: **This is what EMILYs List was built for**. This team has weathered tough losses before, and we’ve got what it takes to fight back against anti-choice extremism _everywhere_. I know the struggle for fundamental rights is demoralizing and exhausting. Republicans are _hoping_ the pro-choice majority is too dejected and too tired to fight back. But suffice it to say: _**we're not**_.

clean_body: I feel hopeful knowing EMILYs List is in the fight | = Hi Peter, When I know I'm going to get good news and bad news together, I always want to hear the bad news first. So I'll start with this: The 2024 election cycle was tough. We did not see the results we wanted at the top of the ticket, and Democrats will be fighting hard in 2026 and 2028 to regain control in Congress. Our goal to elect women who will restore our rights is urgent. Here's the good news: This is what EMILYs List was built for. This team has weathered tough losses before, and we’ve got what it takes to fight back against anti-choice extremism everywhere. I know the struggle for fundamental rights is demoralizing and exhausting. Republicans are hoping the pro-choice majority is too dejected and too tired to fight back. But suffice it to say: we're not. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Nobody in politics is working harder than EMILYs List to elect Democratic pro-choice women who can defend, reclaim, and EXPAND the right to choose. We can't do that work without your support, and this is your last chance to get on the list before the new year. Will you support EMILYs List with a donation before our End-of-Year deadline? = Thank you for taking a stand. See you in 2025, Ellen R. Malcolm Founder, EMILYs List = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . name: Team AOC
subject: Solidarity means showing up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Last Sunday, Alexandria joined striking Amazon Teamsters at the picket line in Queens, New York. These workers went on strike to pressure Amazon to come to the table to negotiate a fair contract.
Amazon workers are fighting for a living wage and safe working conditions while Jeff Bezos is dining with Donald Trump and Elon Musk in Mar-a-Lago.
Alexandria and Team AOC stand with the Amazon Teamsters who went on strike. **[Will you help amplify these workers’ messages by sharing this video on social media?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31512?t=1&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31512?t=2&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF)
Please also visit **[teamster.org/divisions/amazon-division](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31513?t=3&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF)** to learn more about the Amazon division of Teamsters and how you can support their bargaining efforts!
If we stand together and use our voices to demand better wages, working conditions, healthcare, and basic human decency, we will see change.
Collective action is how we build power in the working class. These workers deserve what they are fighting for and you do too. Together we can build a better future for all.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241229?refcode=em20241229-7822-P_OTH_CTR_LAB&t=4&refcode2=7822_2526796_h6uHzF&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241229-7822-P_OTH_CTR_LAB&t=5&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=7822%2E2526796%2Eh6uHzF)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

[_**That’s why we’re asking for your help to kick off the new year on the right foot. Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today to help us reach our $20,000 goal and lay the foundation for the fights ahead?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99474026/520016306/614831798?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOY_241229_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTlkM2M1OC0yYmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04hTilHr_F53_K1YdGC1AtddMtRbHhzsQgv_bRUTQS0=)

Your support will allow us to:
* Rebuild and strengthen our grassroots organizing efforts across Ohio
* Invest in voter outreach programs to engage more Ohioans in the years to come
* Support local Democrats who will fight for our values in every corner of the state

We’ve seen firsthand what happens when the GOP is left unchallenged – from attacks on voting rights and abortion to policies that hurt working families. That’s why this fight matters, and it’s why your support is so critical.

[_**Let’s not wait until it’s too late. Can we count on you to stand with us today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99474027/520016307/614831798?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOY_241229_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTlkM2M1OC0yYmM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04hTilHr_F53_K1YdGC1AtddMtRbHhzsQgv_bRUTQS0=)

With gratitude,

The Ohio Dems
