**[By Paul Ingrassia](https://substack.com/redirect/d156702d-c8eb-4065-8bbe-6db57bd118e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[John Eastman](https://substack.com/redirect/0cc319ad-e142-443d-b3fb-faec03fbd56f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the [Claremont Institute scholar](https://substack.com/redirect/77a0c2db-e485-41df-9109-874393c91e85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and conservative firebrand who stood by President Trump's side all throughout some of the darkest days in the aftermath of the 2020 presidential election when the republic was on the line, will have his story told for the first time on the silver screen come the new year. The documentary, titled _The Eastman Dilemma: Lawfare or Justice_ , is slated for a fitting January 6th, 2025, release date, the fourth anniversary of the January 6th demonstration ([but will premiere at Mar-a-Lago in a special event two days earlier](https://substack.com/redirect/d63ff9a8-3434-48ed-817d-0626bb1a214d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). The film marks the culmination of a years-long ordeal that has seen Eastman, once universally revered as a foremost authority in constitutional construction and history, targeted by one of the most ruthless and sustained lawfare campaigns against any attorney in American history. Eastman, alongside former US Assistant Attorney General Jeff Clark and Mayor Rudy Giuliani, were systematically maligned, censured, and even disbarred for simply arising to a timeless call of both client and their profession by providing legal representation.
Eastman's story is [harrowing](https://substack.com/redirect/510e145c-cb99-4d38-a5ae-d9ca2e264457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - and forebodes much darker times to come if we do not provide a radical course correction to the current state of affairs. That his representation of Donald Trump occurred at such a critical time in the nation's history whereby most of the political world - unlike now - turned their backs to him was sufficient reason to make a scapegoat out of Eastman and a few select aforementioned peers. The reason, of course, was self-evident: the system wanted to kowtow all future lawyers into submission - from not only never again representing Donald Trump. But from creating a chilling effect profession-wide so that no future attorney would ever dare to think about representing any conservative cause or movement aligned with the former and now president-elect's broader political mission whatever. The Left capitalized on this tragic state of affairs - and made life hell for Eastman - by exploiting Donald Trump at his weakest moment, in the immediate days and weeks after the stolen November 2020 election, and particularly after January 6th, when the 45th President was ignominiously ousted from the Swamp, many writing him off for good.
[Subscribe to Paul's Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/d156702d-c8eb-4065-8bbe-6db57bd118e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
While fate had something else in store for both Donald Trump and country, precipitating maybe the greatest political comeback in American history, that victory did not come without significant personal costs to the many who rested uncompromisingly on their conditions and faith during the wilderness years.
Eastman's was a standout case - especially for someone of his notoriety. Despite stellar credentials, he was forcibly exiled from the profession. Having graduated from one of the nation's finest law schools (University of Chicago) and clerked for Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas, Eastman made a career of his passion for law and love for the country and history. He started off by working at one of the country's most prestigious law firms, Kirkland & Ellis, specializing in constitutional litigation, before transitioning to teaching law full-time. As a professor, he enjoyed professorial stints at both Chapman University Fowler School of Law and the University of Colorado Boulder. He also was the founding-director for the Claremont Institute's Center for Constitutional Jurisprudence, a think-tank devoted to educating and championing an originalist and textualist interpretation of the Constitution, in conformance with its framers' intended and historic purpose.
By any measure, Eastman climbed the highest peaks of the legal profession - and then some. Top law school; Supreme Court clerkship; partner at big law; adviser to the President of the United States. But his career is made even more admirable by its trajectory: rather than coast as a partner raking in millions at a fancy firm, Eastman, following some of his great mentors - including Justice Thomas himself, found the path less taken of teaching more fulfilling and more noble. And boy did Americans benefit from that decision. At a time in which so many Americans do not know their history, particularly of the Revolutionary era out of which our Constitution was carved, Eastman devoted his energies to championing and illuminating this great tradition for our generation.
This decision reveals the noble side of Eastman's vocation: America's Constitution, the lynchpin for freedom the world over, is at grave risk of dying - in part because of our own ignorance, in part because far too many otherwise capable men abandoned their civic duties to make the necessary sacrifices to keep it alive. If not for men like Eastman, who put aside self-interested desires for the greater good, then the republic would not have withstood the test of time - and the torch of American freedom would have died out this generation.
#### **[To purchase tickets and learn more about the film, please visit eastmandilemma.com/maralago.](https://substack.com/redirect/bbf3a760-b3ea-4da8-9ddc-56b71ec91336?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
The last four years are a searing case study of what happens when the project of freedom is forsaken. Eastman was summoned to provide legal representation to his client: the President of the United States. Part of what made Eastman's legal advocacy so difficult - despite being vindicated in both the law and, as time would tell, history - was the fact that so few people, including the tribunals tasked with adjudicating these fundamental questions, are today familiar with the issues. What initially got Eastman in trouble was confusion over a fairly straightforward constitutional issue: namely, whether the President has the ability to request that his Vice President return fraudulent or legally doubtful slates of electors to their respective states for further inquiries.
That was it. This was not, as the media unwisely framed, the President beseeching his number two to "overturn" a presidential election. Nor was this the crazed theory of a madman lawyer seeking to make a name for himself by discrediting the results of a democratic election.
[More from Paul Ingrassia](https://substack.com/redirect/d156702d-c8eb-4065-8bbe-6db57bd118e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Instead, this was a lawyer providing representation to his client, as is the client's right - and the lawyer's duty - under the Constitution. Presidents, like any private citizen, have a Sixth Amendment right to zealous advocacy. Eastman, the lawyer and constitutional expert, had the right to offer his sound legal judgment on a hotly contested constitutional problem. A significant portion of the country - including not just Republicans, but many Independents and Democrats as well - have long believed America's elections fraudulent, particularly with the lack of universal Voter ID. These controversies reached a hot boil in the lead-up and immediate aftermath of the November 2020 election, the most controversial presidential race in modern history, if not all time, as laws were changed with impunity under the pretext of an unprecedented global pandemic, creating confusion and ripe opportunities for widespread cheating. In an electoral system like ours, where the outcome is decided by a few ten thousand votes in a deeply polarized nation distributed across three or four key swing states, the President's duty to ensure that our laws be faithfully executed, with reassurances to the public's confidence, becomes of chief importance.
This is naturally the case every election cycle. But was of paramount concern in 2020, a year of untold riots and norm-breaking rules changes to election law, which made the President's constitutional prerogative of outsized import. This was already apparent on the morning of January 6th, 2021, when hundreds of thousands of overwhelmingly peaceful demonstrators descended upon the Capitol to voice their outrage for how the 2020 race was carried out. By later that afternoon, when the mob became even more agitated and a small riot broke out, the need for reassurance - in a safe and orderly electoral process - reached maximum urgency. In hindsight, knowing how mentally debilitated a condition Joe Biden was in, it only reinforces the public perception - including those led to riot on January 6th - that the entire election result was an illegitimate sham, being pulled off by subversive agencies and actors within government and the press to thwart Donald Trump and the public support he so readily and easily commands. Four years later, in light of this most recent consequential and landslide election, it only further vindicates the widespread doubts about 2020 - doubts which persist, and will remain so as long as the ultimate verdict of January 6th remains in limbo. It also vindicates the theories of lawyers, like John Eastman, who insisted at the time in standing firmly behind the Constitution and its textual mandate, despite the titanic public pressures working against it.
Professionally and personally, Eastman experienced difficulties far beyond what any lawyer, let alone an expert competently performing his job, should ever have to face. Professionally, he was terminated from his university post, later to be [disbarred](https://substack.com/redirect/607bcb71-569b-41f6-b7ba-5e1137213047?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by a vindictive and cowardly California Bar. This caused familial hardships and strains on his personal relationships. The countless indignities rendered by the California Bar upon Eastman so clearly demonstrates that the profession has much to learn from the timeless example of John Adams who nevertheless provided legal counsel to those British soldiers who carried out the Boston massacre, a stark reminder of the mighty obligations imposed upon all lawyers in all times to remain living in a free society.
In being one of the few attorneys to meet those high duties - and perform a damn well job along the way - Eastman demonstrated not just his enviable knowledge of presidential powers and constitutional theory, but maybe even more crucially, was a profile in courage, for not just lawyers but all Americans, of meeting his civic and professional duty, when the rest of the world turned a blind eye. Rather than be punished for his efforts, Eastman - as champion par excellence of that most hallowed political cause - should be celebrated for his service to country. His unjust white martyrdom at the hands of an increasingly despotic state is reminiscent of Thomas More, Lord Chancellor of England under Henry VIII, who was beheaded - and, centuries later, beatified - for standing firmly behind his higher duties to God and the English Constitution, as the world turned a blind eye. Of course, Eastman has not had to pay with his life (though there were moments where he was put at serious risk of danger with his driveway being spiked by nefarious actors) the similarities between him and More ought not to be taken lightly.
Ours -- like More's England under a despotic king -- similarly is a time of creeping tyranny, where right has been overtaken by might - and the natural truths, including the ultimate divine ones, are oft overshadowed by the sinister forces of a counterfeit order - which presents a fake deity, fake constitution, and fake political regime. Now, more than ever, is proper discernment necessary - to determine the light of truth from the many deceptions in our midst. In the legal profession, especially, rare is the lawyer like John Eastman, who not only can tell the truth from lies, but as important, has the capability to answer the call to service, with real world impact, consistent with the truth.
Increasingly, the gifts and acumen needed to be an effective force for productive good in the world seems to be at a low point, especially among lawyers. The next Trump administration would be blessed to have not just one or two, but hundreds of diligent lawyers in the mold of John Eastman, Jeff Clark, Rudy Giuliani, and a handful of others, who stood by the President and remained loyal through trial and tribulation.
Eastman, as a shining example of loyalty and competence, is a reminder of just how far we have digressed from those expectations for our lawyers - and the work that is left undone, necessary to restore some semblance of fairness and justice to a profession that has forgotten that its chief purpose is ultimately to preserve constitutional government and the liberties of every single American citizen.
* * *
_Paul Ingrassia, a graduate of Fordham University and Cornell Law School, is an Attorney; Communications Director of the NCLU; a two-time Claremont Fellow, and is on the Board of Advisors of the NYYR Club and the Italian American Civil Rights League. He writes a widely read Substack that is regularly posted on Truth Social by President Trump.[Follow Paul on X](https://substack.com/redirect/6ea62789-0c10-4318-8274-30dd9318a91b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),_
[Paul Ingrassia's Substack](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulingrassia),_[Truth Social](https://substack.com/redirect/88aaa94e-c0b6-4d9d-924a-ebecb683688f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ,[Instagram,](https://substack.com/redirect/37f080b1-9578-4ba2-a505-9da8b03c9d9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and[Rumble.](https://substack.com/redirect/69988e15-a4e4-4712-a833-876eeeeb8990?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

[More from Paul](https://substack.com/redirect/d156702d-c8eb-4065-8bbe-6db57bd118e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Stand with Moms for America In 2025

Dear Friends and Supporters,

This year, we saw a remarkable chapter unfold in America’s story – a chapter written by moms across the nation who stepped up and
became the game changers in the 2024 elections. See Our Year In Review below for all the highlights of our 20th anniversary year!

In 2024, Moms for America led one of the most powerful grassroots efforts in the country, uniting moms from every state to stand
for their families and reclaim our culture. Together, we equipped thousands of moms with the tools and information to not only
vote their values with confidence but also inspire others to do the same. Their impact didn’t stop at the polls – they reignited
hope in neighborhoods, schools, and statehouses across America. From school boards to the halls of Congress, our influence was
undeniable.

As we come to the close of our 20th anniversary and move forward into the year ahead – Moms for America is poised for even greater
impact. Our programs are growing, our partnerships are strengthening, and our message is reaching millions. We know the road ahead
is challenging, but with each mom we empower, we are reminded that the future of America is worth every effort.

This year’s achievements belong to all of us who believe in the power of moms to shape the heart of our nation. Together, we are
building a legacy of liberty for generations to come. Thank you for standing with us, for supporting our mission, and for being
part of this movement to protect what we hold most dear.

In November, President Trump declared:
“Moms for America represents everything that I say . . .
it is an honor to have your support.”

Our Goals for 2025

* Expand Our Grassroots Movement: Imagine 1 million moms shaping policies and culture across the nation by 2028.

* Win Critical Legal Battles: Launch phone and email campaigns to secure President Trump's nominees.

* Lead in Education Reform: Place a trained School District Ambassador in each of America’s 13,000 school districts to ensure
families have a voice.

* Advocate for Policy: Engage our Kitchen Table Lobby, your gift powers our policy leadership at local, state, and Federal
levels.

* Empower New Citizens: Launch a bold new program to empower Lawful Permanent Residents (LPRs) to become educated, engaged, and
patriotic citizens who will preserve freedom for future generations.

* Expand Cottage Meetings: Expand our reach to moms all across America to build their knowledge about the principles of freedom
our country was founded upon so they can stand strong against the anti-American tide and raise the next generation of patriots.

* Launch Liberty Trips: We're taking families on patriotic trips across America, in preparation for America's 205th year-long
Birthday Celebration.

We must enter 2025 stronger than ever.

Please make your tax-deductible donation before midnight on December 31 and ensure we launch 2025 with the strength to protect our
families and freedoms.

clean_body: Moms for America is so grateful for your continued support and confidence in us and our mighty movement of moms! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] Stand with Moms for America In 2025 Dear Friends and Supporters, This year, we saw a remarkable chapter unfold in America’s story – a chapter written by moms across the nation who stepped up and became the game changers in the 2024 elections. See Our Year In Review below for all the highlights of our 20th anniversary year! In 2024, Moms for America led one of the most powerful grassroots efforts in the country, uniting moms from every state to stand for their families and reclaim our culture. Together, we equipped thousands of moms with the tools and information to not only vote their values with confidence but also inspire others to do the same. Their impact didn’t stop at the polls – they reignited hope in neighborhoods, schools, and statehouses across America. From school boards to the halls of Congress, our influence was undeniable. As we come to the close of our 20th anniversary and move forward into the year ahead – Moms for America is poised for even greater impact. Our programs are growing, our partnerships are strengthening, and our message is reaching millions. We know the road ahead is challenging, but with each mom we empower, we are reminded that the future of America is worth every effort. This year’s achievements belong to all of us who believe in the power of moms to shape the heart of our nation. Together, we are building a legacy of liberty for generations to come. Thank you for standing with us, for supporting our mission, and for being part of this movement to protect what we hold most dear. In November, President Trump declared: “Moms for America represents everything that I say . . . it is an honor to have your support.” [] [] 2024 Year in Review View the Flip Book [] Download the PDF [] [] [] View the 2024 Year In Review Highlight Video [] [] [] View the Mothers of Influence Awards Highlight Video [] [] [] View the Moms for America Endorsements Video [] [] [] Join us at the Patriot Stars Inaugural Gala [] Our Goals for 2025 Expand Our Grassroots Movement: Imagine 1 million moms shaping policies and culture across the nation by 2028. Win Critical Legal Battles: Launch phone and email campaigns to secure President Trump's nominees. Lead in Education Reform: Place a trained School District Ambassador in each of America’s 13,000 school districts to ensure families have a voice. Advocate for Policy: Engage our Kitchen Table Lobby, your gift powers our policy leadership at local, state, and Federal levels. Empower New Citizens: Launch a bold new program to empower Lawful Permanent Residents (LPRs) to become educated, engaged, and patriotic citizens who will preserve freedom for future generations. Expand Cottage Meetings: Expand our reach to moms all across America to build their knowledge about the principles of freedom our country was founded upon so they can stand strong against the anti-American tide and raise the next generation of patriots. * Launch Liberty Trips: We're taking families on patriotic trips across America, in preparation for America's 205th year-long Birthday Celebration. We must enter 2025 stronger than ever. Please make your tax-deductible donation before midnight on December 31 and ensure we launch 2025 with the strength to protect our families and freedoms. DONATE NOW [] Every dollar you give today fuels our mission to empower moms and safeguard the values we hold dear. We have a $500,000 matching fund from a generous donor. All donations through DECEMBER 31st are matched 100%. We are so grateful for your continued support and confidence in us and our mighty movement of moms! Together, we can ensure a brighter future for our children. DONATE NOW [] I want to personally thank you for your continued support. You make everything we do possible. I hope you had a very Merry Christmas surrounded with family and friends. We have a lot to look forward to in the new year. I hope to see you in D.C. at this historic inauguration. [] [] In Joy & Gratitude, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® P.S. The clock is ticking. Midnight on December 31 is your last chance to make a tax-deductible donation for 2024. Stand with us – click here to give today. [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2024 Moms for America, All rights reserved. name: Bethany Hamilton
subject: Even sharks are no match for God's love...
body:
I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. | | | But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back.
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=634b7ca86a79487591e8a3c501a0ca7f&_e=sdUKeSVIffCq6_9X_0czhIGtuKSTMtVJp3PwQo5hIz7R74Pbkl5teiO-E6G7GmsDHpCmfcxaiHe0RANsTsb_MnWzAfT8MnYnonfpLHr-fTkyys1kiOH_B6EbUfTjq7w6qj714jEwpW49tXP2c_OyhaAWrR50zLNvvHJIu6JdW6WE6MipPfcSEI79JgNLDLBrJ4we7gBljhFiTJCojyXb8Q8QYmw-yn0VN2BaBzVgr2l-tKQZAKs-KKCPelf2BZQBDuQBPsVQRypURF8b8vgESVho0Fb3XuuLSYlC_LyZOPbGbBf-WwZK-3YHq-Mmf3hm4GsuhhWeWmtPykvtrFjXOow8CDyVbaCF5F9yLrdhtaGL1lJFIfMBM24JXxy_R-4ro3hrBXnsTA6o-yHhob8FOg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend, I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again.But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| | Dear Friend,I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=634b7ca86a79487591e8a3c501a0ca7f&_e=sdUKeSVIffCq6_9X_0czhIGtuKSTMtVJp3PwQo5hIz7R74Pbkl5teiO-E6G7GmsDHpCmfcxaiHe0RANsTsb_MnWzAfT8MnYnonfpLHr-fTkyys1kiOH_B6EbUfTjq7w6qj714jEwpW49tXP2c_OyhaAWrR50zLNvvHJIu6JdW6WE6MipPfcSEI79JgNLDLBrJ4we7gBljhFiTJCojyXb8Q8QYmw-yn0VN2BaBzVgr2l-tKQZAKs-KKCPelf2BZQBBg3pB58_RXMbcW_AsJ_n7D1uYWrZNGjd4tzvVg04Dg2WMeCOKuqg5z_9Xb2uCGiijfq6HoXn2-sFiPyldFY6Ycpw2r7GdDLbaT11f4FTgo70BOJmYEyJ1CR5XKJ2hbg9YEaR5w384sWyYmuJQrfPnA%3D%3D)
---
| | It was partly due to my parents’ unconditional support and my love of the ocean. But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. And I want more children to hear that message because too many of them are being trained up in fear, _not_ _faith_. That's why I wrote a children's book called "Surfing Past Fear" with an amazing Christian publisher called **Brave Books**. [**_I hope you'll consider giving a gift of $100 or any amount you can afford to support Brave Books_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=634b7ca86a79487591e8a3c501a0ca7f&_e=sdUKeSVIffCq6_9X_0czhIGtuKSTMtVJp3PwQo5hIz7R74Pbkl5teiO-E6G7GmsDHpCmfcxaiHe0RANsTsb_MnWzAfT8MnYnonfpLHr-fTkyys1kiOH_B6EbUfTjq7w6qj714jEwpW49tXP2c_OyhaAWrR50zLNvvHJIu6JdW6WE6MipPfcSEI79JgNLDLBrJ4we7gBljhFiTJCojyXb8Q8QYmw-yn0VN2BaBzVgr2l-tKQZAKs-KKCPelf2BZQB6_rDknaLSougVusaJ30b8vXqZWM_PO3qjewwE8UToSBewXD2oHJDfYuEqpXuJIpwvNSDb05npJj_l_YpTGqJooBts89XiYJklXs2w8sKVQWcVL23PYRR6XD2e3okk-Td8QabYOMrSFLRTkwQvuoTnA%3D%3D) as they help parents raise strong, resilient, God-loving children. In courage,
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=634b7ca86a79487591e8a3c501a0ca7f&_e=sdUKeSVIffCq6_9X_0czhIGtuKSTMtVJp3PwQo5hIz7R74Pbkl5teiO-E6G7GmsDHpCmfcxaiHe0RANsTsb_MnWzAfT8MnYnonfpLHr-fTkyys1kiOH_B6EbUfTjq7w6qj714jEwpW49tXP2c_OyhaAWrR50zLNvvHJIu6JdW6WE6MipPfcSEI79JgNLDLBrJ4we7gBljhFiTJCojyXb8Q8QYmw-yn0VN2BaBzVgr2l-tKQZAKs-KKCPelf2BZQBUhJCELifEX_OwH6y1Rff4Ev4PtnzZ89mvtXdNC7H6FjxXscK0NkuPtJI8qIlz_MPmYRVEBN-WKhALtTjEilNp-gD3wSH5w2QfuoP1X-IJIiKCbqtlQh-9Joso35VOippTpa-qptYTQ4e2qjkpTCnlQ%3D%3D)
---
**Bethany Hamilton** Professional Surfer and Mother
---
|
---
| | P.S. I've set aside a small number of copies of "Surfing Past Fear" just for the friends of **Brave Books**. **[When you support their work today with your gift of $100 or more, it'll be my honor to send you one.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=634b7ca86a79487591e8a3c501a0ca7f&_e=sdUKeSVIffCq6_9X_0czhIGtuKSTMtVJp3PwQo5hIz7R74Pbkl5teiO-E6G7GmsDHpCmfcxaiHe0RANsTsb_MnWzAfT8MnYnonfpLHr-fTkyys1kiOH_B6EbUfTjq7w6qj714jEwpW49tXP2c_OyhaAWrR50zLNvvHJIu6JdW6WE6MipPfcSEI79JgNLDLBrJ4we7gBljhFiTJCojyXb8Q8QYmw-yn0VN2BaBzVgr2l-tKQZAKs-KKCPelf2BZQBuh86wMfGNxs-9WMWkHRmBi90Y1tCR0yF8gQvAoN641Q53AWExcCYX5bvC8TQLQTXpFH4VKP9zW40mKlMb8QkVodATmjvJlXBhEbf7Bz9_3Py3-yaSDT_IGWZet0PrjjuJlNeeA7eKQJdE5vpeiTCBA%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping America's children learn that God "has not given them a spirit of fear!" (2 Timothy 1:7) -- Bethany
---

subject: closing out 2024

body:
Running a statewide race in Virginia is going to be incredibly expensive, and we know that National Republican groups are going to spend unbelievable sums to keep the Governor’s seat in the hands of Republicans.

In order to hit our lofty fundraising goals and make sure we have the resources to win in November 2025, we need to hit our end-of-year fundraising goal. Running a statewide race in Virginia is going to be incredibly expensive, and we know that National Republican groups are going to spend unbelievable sums to keep the Governor’s seat in the hands of Republicans. = | = Abigail and I are going to check back in before the end of the year to discuss our progress toward our goal, and I am hopeful we’ll be on track with your support. Thank you, Whitney Finance Director * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

Everything Josh does is rooted in protecting our shared Jersey Values. As Co-Chair of the bipartisan Problem Solvers Caucus, he is willing to work with anyone to get stuff done for Jersey – **if it’s good for our state and doesn’t compromise our values.**

From making life in Jersey more affordable, to getting cleaner air, to fighting for commonsense gun safety, to ensuring safer communities, **he will always fight so the people here in Jersey continue to thrive.**

**[Team, we can’t do this without you. Will you stand with us today and chip in now to show your support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99474208/520016896/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20241229_FR_EOY_0_3MO_GottheimerHQ_NA_NA_1.4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDVmN2M3Mi0yZGM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TujQKfJFBtyJsp4J5qKlnXmI6T8675tExJ6fI4sPrl8=&emci=8c5f7c72-2dc6-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=8d5f7c72-2dc6-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=37438246)**

Hi Peter,

I will be sworn into Congress in just a few days. Before I officially take my seat, I need to hit one last important milestone: our End-of-Year fundraising goal.

This is a critical moment—our first FEC filing since winning the election. These numbers will show our grassroots strength and send a clear message that we’re ready to tackle the challenges ahead. Meeting this goal will ensure we start my first term strong, with the resources we need to hit the ground running.

If that hasn’t convinced you to donate there is something else you need to know. You can still take advantage of the Oregon Political Tax Credit. If you earn under $75,000 (or $150,000 if filing jointly), you can get a $50 (or $100) tax credit by donating to my campaign. **That means your $50 donation is fully refunded when you file your Oregon state taxes!**

This is a unique chance to strengthen our campaign at this crucial moment and at no cost to you. Your support will help us prepare for the work ahead—standing up to extremism, advancing evidence-based solutions, and ensuring Oregon families have a voice in Congress.

name: Steven Hartmann, Forward Party
subject: Looking Back, Moving Forward - Operations Team Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What we learned and where we're going in 2025.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_operations&n=1)
---
Sunday, December 29, 2024 | Peter -- Hi everyone, I’m Steven Hartmann from the Tech and Operations team at the Forward Party. Keeping our data organized and housed in one system is key to making our work as efficient and effective as possible. Whether we’re supporting local candidates or engaging with our supporters, streamlined tools help us stay on track and achieve our goals.

One of these critical tools is our Knowledge Base, or KBase — a centralized hub for published guidance, how-tos, and recorded training modules. The KBase ensures that our state and local leaders have quick access to the resources they need to succeed.

As we reflect on 2024 and prepare for what’s ahead, I want to thank you for taking the time to engage with the KBase and use our tools effectively. Your attention to these resources helps us stay organized and better equipped to deliver on our mission. **What Went Well** In 2024, the Forward Party leveraged key infrastructure tools to empower state and local leaders and expand our reach. Using NationBuilder, we managed over 24,000 event RSVPs, sent 2.2 million opened emails, and welcomed 119,000 new supporters to our movement. Our Kbase system provided essential resources, including published guidance, how-tos, and recorded training modules, to ensure our local leaders had the tools they needed to succeed. **Lessons Learned** As we move into 2025, we plan to refine our candidate recruitment processes and expand our Knowledge Base offerings with additional training modules and content, continuing our commitment to building from the ground up and providing practical support to leaders who share our vision for a more collaborative and solutions-oriented political system. [These are our thoughts from 2024, but we want to hear from you! Please head to this link and fill out your thoughts on lessons learned, the direction the party should head in, and projects we should tackle! We will read them all, and we will highlight our top 10, along with the people who submitted them, in early January as our New Years Resolutions.](https://home.forwardparty.com/2024_end_of_year_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_operations&n=2) **2025 Projects**
* Refine internal processes and match them up with the right tools
* Revamp the KBase and add in all of the new training modules
* Continue to manage our systems, website, and business operations

If you're still feeling the season of giving, consider donating to Forward this season! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_operations&n=3 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_operations&n=3)
---
Happy Holidays,
Steven Hartmann
[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_operations&n=4)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: We have the solution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122924_2&amount=25]
Team, we just need a minute of your time:
Here's the problem: Many people think that 2025 is an off-year and we can stop working for voting rights or thinking about our elections. But they're wrong. We still have elections across the country in 2025 to focus on, register voters for, and so much more.
Here's the other problem: We invested heavily in our work for 2024, so we need to rebuild our resources to give us the tools we need to increase participation in these elections, fight suppressive bills coming in state legislatures, register voters... the list goes on.
This is how we solve those problems: We set a massive end-of-year fundraising goal for December – $50,000. We're getting close, and if every voting rights supporter reading this chipped in $5, we'd cross the finish line in no time.
Team, Can we count on you to step up before the end of this year and pitch in? Whether it's $5, $15, $25, or more, every gift matters for the grassroots fight for voting rights >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122924_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122924_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122924_2&amount=25]

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122924_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122924_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122924_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122924_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. name: Dylan
subject: Together, we can win this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
It’s thanks to your support that we re-elected Gabe to Congress.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=bH9cm2CRITIyjM3ZXTYPW8jaEBwzwxEFRf5LhtRgki3%2Bo5uyeLRJFunZwNljQgqsZ%2F78nz8HIpjRtYBgRynsa%2Bef2TcQA34B9P3nbTl%2FD0JVBG7J%2B%2BtbzJHO%2FwIi6p7spR8U3dVVIGDAImRN2wCgSpkaQ%2Fuj%2BHcoIt37QvwYHAhCyxc3gsA32CJIn8AyB4xGBRLPjgcKyeOZqEEyqNrHp%2BuF5jUJ7tlEPBE3gcqKt7TyA2le%2BFRFG%2Bt8NnL%2BRnrp4yqfLZlij%2Fz9N3OJSLTvpIhOitcATOX8Sav9X78l%2FrNdAUbXozUvIEZO9fNOOd%2FUfItzPsSzYXVyVJXMe8WDW0ybvj7czRbm6JBVUeeTSu7UxFEbMmtVSEvOuuuigqdSIFL8MV3snGFnNs1bFGE6TWqqADW3mskweP1nEQ4mfm8%3D)
---
| |
---
Hey folks, it’s Dylan, Gabe’s campaign manager. In the spirit of the holidays, I just want to say thank you for all of your support this year! It’s thanks to your support — whether it was a $10 donation, a canvass shift or just telling a friend about Gabe — that we re-elected him to Congress, making Gabe Vasquez the first Democrat to serve NM-02 for consecutive terms in over 40 years. We now know that New Mexico will be a stronghold for democracy in the years to come. In NM-02 and statewide, we made huge wins, but we have a long, difficult road ahead of us as we gear up for another four years under Donald Trump. Together, I know we can win this fight and defend New Mexico, democracy, freedom and reproductive healthcare access in 2025 and beyond. But here’s the deal: In two days, we’re up against our final test of 2024. On Tuesday at midnight, we’re facing our last FEC-mandated fundraising deadline of the year, and we must show a strong front as we prepare for what’s to come in 2025 under a Republican trifecta. [We only have two days left to reach our final $15,000 fundraising goal before the new year, and it’s all hands on deck to get there. Will you send your support to Gabe now? Whether it’s $25, $10 or even just $1, your support means everything in this critical moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99475103/520019929/646161803?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_122924_1_3_EOY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWE2YzIxMy0zMWM2LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XdfmIveQRUZlSPrOIwwTCjOvvTO51JL953JftliDE_s=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: It’s thanks to your support that we re-elected Gabe to Congress. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey folks, it’s Dylan, Gabe’s campaign manager. In the spirit of the holidays, I just want to say thank you for all of your support this year! It’s thanks to your support — whether it was a $10 donation, a canvass shift or just telling a friend about Gabe — that we re-elected him to Congress, making Gabe Vasquez the first Democrat to serve NM-02 for consecutive terms in over 40 years. We now know that New Mexico will be a stronghold for democracy in the years to come. In NM-02 and statewide, we made huge wins, but we have a long, difficult road ahead of us as we gear up for another four years under Donald Trump. Together, I know we can win this fight and defend New Mexico, democracy, freedom and reproductive healthcare access in 2025 and beyond. But here’s the deal: In two days, we’re up against our final test of 2024. On Tuesday at midnight, we’re facing our last FEC-mandated fundraising deadline of the year, and we must show a strong front as we prepare for what’s to come in 2025 under a Republican trifecta. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Dylan | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Tobias Read
subject: Voting & reproductive rights will be at risk in 2025
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=241229em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=241229em]
In just a few days, we will turn the page to 2025 and face an uncertain future.
Donald Trump and anti-democracy, anti-women extremists have promised to do everything in their power to subvert not only voting rights but reproductive rights, too — which means our fight to protect them has never been more critical.
I’ve been working day and night to prepare for next year, and so has Planned Parenthood Action Oregon [https://www.plannedparenthoodaction.org/planned-parenthood-action-oregon] [https://www.plannedparenthoodaction.org/planned-parenthood-action-oregon] (PP Action Oregon), an advocacy organization that works to advance access to sexual health care and defend reproductive rights in Oregon.
The other side is powerful and well-organized; without you, we’d be powerless to stop them.
I still believe that people who support democracy, women’s autonomy, and civil liberties outnumber those who don’t. If you’re reading this, I know you do, too.
To prove it, I need your support. Please help us reach our goal with a gift of $10 or more today. We'll proudly donate 50% of your gift to support PP Action Oregon's crucial work across the state. Your generosity will have a double impact! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=241229em] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=241229em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=241229em]
Thank you so much for your help.
Tobias Read
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf]

For years, corrupt Democrat Attorney General Letitia James has had only one priority - and it certainly isn 't protecting law-abiding citizens like YOU... No, her only priority has been an endless, taxpayer-funded WITCH HUNT against President Trump! But the people just made their voices heard loud and clear. President Trump just received a historic SURGE of support in New York in his landslide victory. And now, after sending President Trump back to the White House, those very same voters like YOU are ready to send Tish James packing once and for all. As the Republican candidate who 's run the most competitive statewide race in New York since Republicans held the governor's office, I know we can and we WILL win. After November 2024, no one can deny the tides are changing. "**W** _**e kept our country at peace. We never went to war. We never dropped a bomb. We never fired a bullet. But still we achieved our international goals**_."
**-- President Jimmy Carter (1924-2024)**
* * *
President Jimmy Carter has passed away at the age of 100. His legacy is one of unrelenting commitment to human rights. While many will rightly focus on his legacy on human rights broadly, or how he prevented a nuclear meltdown while in the Naval Academy, or his legendary work with Habitat for Humanity after his Presidency--I want to focus on one critical human rights issue in particular that resonates with current world affairs--his stance on Israel and Palestine. And while no President is perfect, President Carter's interview linked below exemplifies why he is so beloved, and why history will remember him so generously. **Let 's Address This.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ec57f88-fce9-4a92-adae-1610e322cc79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Carter upon graduation from the Naval Academy in 1946. [Credit: A.A. Bradley/AP]
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..w-RvMBj9CCD_4wqYHaKD_DV_RLCn-wG45eJdrRtiSos?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153775334)
In 2007 President Carter sat down with Democracy Now! to discuss what motivated him to write, "_Palestine: Peace Not Apartheid_." In this book, President Carter cogently argues that the main obstacle to peace in Israel and Palestine is in fact the hundreds of thousands of illegal settlements that Israel continues to build, all with U.S. backing and support. As you watch the short clip below, note that President Carter warns how "powerful forces" remove any member of Congress who speaks out against this unjust policy. Then note how those "powerful forces" that he names have only since grown in power and influence to the detriment of U.S. democracy and world peace.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/11ce1128-ef05-4343-aa96-9589ee6b8ba5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Contrast President Carter's clarity and courageous voice with the cowardice and complicit nature of every President since, including their appeasement of the Israeli government's settlement expansion, land annexation, and apartheid enforcement. And far beyond lip service, President Carter continued to walk the walk on human rights well into his final chapter of life. At the ripe age of 86 he visited Sheikh Jarrah in East Jerusalem to condemn the Israeli government's forced evictions of Palestinian civilians.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cc99ef5c-908e-4948-9d67-9b86b8c5e901?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At the rally [President Carter declared loudly](https://substack.com/redirect/891d8011-8d96-404d-a1ec-0c2aa07e9a6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> On behalf of The Elders, we have come here to give thanks and congratulations to those Israelis and Palestinians and Christians, all of whom are trying to resolve this injustice peacefully and with demonstrations of commitment to justice and to equality and to fair treatment.
The "injustice" to which President Carter referred, was the Israeli government forcibly evicting three Palestinian families in the year prior.
In 2002 President Carter won the [Nobel Peace Prize](https://substack.com/redirect/52b5cf52-66ae-4914-962f-7c24c5156a2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "_for his decades of untiring effort to find peaceful solutions to international conflicts, to advance democracy and human rights, and to promote economic and social development_." Imagine how much better the world would be if we had elected political leaders today who acted with his conviction and compassion? We certainly would not be witnessing what every major human rights organization globally calls a genocide inflicted upon the Palestinian people. Instead, we just might have made meaningful progress to achieve true justice and lasting peace.
Now, as President Carter departs, we reflect on his wisdom and his compassion for the marginalized and maligned, and can only hope, pray, and work to our best, to ensure future leadership follows in his path--one of unrelenting commitment to justice and human rights. Rest in peace, President Carter.

President Carter's legacy is one of human rights and justice, and he leaves behind an example elected leaders should observe and follow | | | Dec 29 | | | | | | | | | | | | "W e kept our country at peace. We never went to war. We never dropped a bomb. We never fired a bullet. But still we achieved our international goals." -- President Jimmy Carter (1924-2024) President Jimmy Carter has passed away at the age of 100. His legacy is one of unrelenting commitment to human rights. While many will rightly focus on his legacy on human rights broadly, or how he prevented a nuclear meltdown while in the Naval Academy, or his legendary work with Habitat for Humanity after his Presidency--I want to focus on one critical human rights issue in particular that resonates with current world affairs--his stance on Israel and Palestine. And while no President is perfect, President Carter's interview linked below exemplifies why he is so beloved, and why history will remember him so generously. Let 's Address This. | | ---|---|--- President Carter upon graduation from the Naval Academy in 1946. [Credit: A.A. Bradley/AP] Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. In 2007 President Carter sat down with Democracy Now! to discuss what motivated him to write, "Palestine: Peace Not Apartheid." In this book, President Carter cogently argues that the main obstacle to peace in Israel and Palestine is in fact the hundreds of thousands of illegal settlements that Israel continues to build, all with U.S. backing and support. As you watch the short clip below, note that President Carter warns how "powerful forces" remove any member of Congress who speaks out against this unjust policy. Then note how those "powerful forces" that he names have only since grown in power and influence to the detriment of U.S. democracy and world peace. Contrast President Carter's clarity and courageous voice with the cowardice and complicit nature of every President since, including their appeasement of the Israeli government's settlement expansion, land annexation, and apartheid enforcement. And far beyond lip service, President Carter continued to walk the walk on human rights well into his final chapter of life. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I’m running for governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots
body:
Peter, we’ve been through a lot these last couple years. There have been urgent crises in this country, across the world, and here in New Jersey.
As a graduate of the U.S. Naval Academy and a former helicopter aircraft commander, I learned early on that in a crisis, there are only three options: **you can either lead, follow, or get out of the way.**
**[I know which one I pick — and that’s why I’m thrilled to share that I am officially running for Governor of New Jersey. Peter, will you split a contribution between me and Heartland Patriots to become a Founding Donor of my campaign for New Jersey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84670?refcode=em20241229-8701&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8701%2E614464%2EGJmVEw)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84671?refcode=em20241229-8701&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8701%2E614464%2EGJmVEw) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84671?refcode=em20241229-8701&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8701%2E614464%2EGJmVEw) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84671?refcode=em20241229-8701&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8701%2E614464%2EGJmVEw) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84671?refcode=em20241229-8701&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8701%2E614464%2EGJmVEw) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84671?refcode=em20241229-8701&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8701%2E614464%2EGJmVEw) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84671?refcode=em20241229-8701&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8701%2E614464%2EGJmVEw) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84670?refcode=em20241229-8701&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8701%2E614464%2EGJmVEw)
---
In New Jersey, we don’t whine. **We work.**
We’re inventors, innovators, and builders. We work with our minds — and our hands.
So let’s be the state that builds more housing. The state that fixes the economy. And let’s make life more affordable for hard-working New Jerseyans — from health care, to groceries, to child care.
In Congress, I’ve fought every day to address these challenges. They aren’t new, and I’m ready to keep confronting them head-on.
**But we won’t stop there.**
This is the state, more than any other, that guaranteed our freedom as we fought for our nation’s independence. Today, we can also be the state that sets the gold standard for protecting rights and freedoms we know will be under attack from Donald Trump’s Washington – beginning with abortion rights.
Because in New Jersey, we love our country. We’re proud of our state. We value our freedoms. **And we’ll defend them with everything we’ve got.**
In the Navy, I was on a mission to protect our country. Now, I’m announcing my candidacy for governor on a mission to get things done for New Jersey.
**[Peter, I’m asking you to join us. Will you help us make the beginning of our campaign as strong as possible by splitting a contribution of any amount?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84670?refcode=em20241229-8701&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8701%2E614464%2EGJmVEw)**

name: OKGOP
subject: Amazing HUGE victories we had in 2024?!? Get ready 2025!
body:
| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_amazing_huge_victories_we_ha&n=1)
---
Peter -- As we close out 2024, we wanted to think back to the huge successes we had this year. Obviously getting President Trump re-elected was an enormous victory that changed the direction of our nation. And not just a slight change, this was a monumental change that will have a generational impact. Republicans took back the US Senate & kept control of the US House of Representatives, meaning we are going into 2025 with the Senate, House, AND White House. The America First agenda is primed to make our country great again starting in January. Once again all 77 counties voted for President Trump. Not just once again meaning a second time, but once again for a THIRD time IN A ROW! That’s a huge accomplishment. Oklahoma remains deep Red. This is Republican country! We had our special Presidential conventions this year. With District Conventions, State Convention, & culminating with the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee. President Trump won ALL of Oklahoma’s delegate votes at the National convention thanks to the great slate of America First Trump supporters created by our Executive Committee & elected at our State Convention. We also elected our Presidential Electors & Alternate Electors at the various conventions. And on December 17th they met at the Governor’s office to submit Oklahoma’s 7 electoral college votes on behalf of Donald J. Trump. At the State level we had some huge victories as well. Not only did we keep our super majority in the Oklahoma State House & State Senate, we took aim at something that had never been done before: judicial elections. Oklahoma has never voted out a judge under the current system established in 1963. A system which was put in place, by the way, because corrupt Democrat judges (but I repeat myself) took tens of thousands of dollars in bribes to determine the outcome of cases before them. This new system has still benefited the Democrats greatly as they’ve maintained control of our courts in Oklahoma. And with three democrats judges up on the November ballot, we decided to do what had never been done before: beat a judge at the ballot box. And in a historic fashion for the FIRST TIME in Oklahoma history, we voted a judge off the bench! And not just any judge, a leftist judge who had been serving on the Oklahoma Supreme Court for longer than Nancy Pelosi has been in Congress!!! We’re so thankful to all those who donated to help us in the judicial plan, those who spread the word to vote no, & the organizations who partnered with us. Together we made history! It’s been an honor to serve as State Chairman for the OKGOP. There have been numerous battles, with more still to come. But the price of liberty is eternal vigilance. Thank you for those who have stood with us in the fight & for those who will continue to do so in the battles still to come. For the People,

Nathan Dahm
OKGOP Chairman
[OKGOP.com](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_amazing_huge_victories_we_ha&n=2) P.S. You’ve already received emails from our team about the next battle before us: the leftist plan to allow Democrats to vote in Republican Primaries. Take a moment to [sign this petition to say NO to this destructive plan](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YsX77jA2CoiOC0kiRLv8R6xazJihEvWraL_OhR-oDcDesAvBdmRUgC2hBZOgiDYULXrU-VNhMktvigk6VpXHSQ&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_amazing_huge_victories_we_ha&n=3)! P.P.S. One way you can support the party is with our Minuteman program. Become a monthly member by [clicking here to join today](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YsX77jA2CoiOC0kiRLv8R6xazJihEvWraL_OhR-oDcAQx6YXJqaqN5-NtFYYCIelIRyc8tbH1gvQ91lUSsicyYSpMw8C12cTeLDDuYEyTks&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_amazing_huge_victories_we_ha&n=4).
[](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YsX77jA2CoiOC0kiRLv8R6xazJihEvWraL_OhR-oDcAQx6YXJqaqN5-NtFYYCIelIRyc8tbH1gvQ91lUSsicyYSpMw8C12cTeLDDuYEyTks&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_amazing_huge_victories_we_ha&n=5)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_amazing_huge_victories_we_ha&n=6).
You can also keep up with OKGOP on [Twitter](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=JcrYNQ7dhdufXPgOgJxNGHSsRONv6mnq7ly6aBOUvGVprSj7jfHNOpP70kR_1QLA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_amazing_huge_victories_we_ha&n=7) or [Facebook](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=UQNagEd-DqbIXa37T8ODid9mG9NGbq3z9te4_riKc6EaGmrOrRzKc2wAaVTFbzRY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_amazing_huge_victories_we_ha&n=8).

body:

name: Team Keith
subject: Two days to show our strength
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

With just two days remaining until our first—and only—public fundraising deadline of the year, we’re still $12,281 short of our end-of-year budget target.

Donald Trump is preparing for his return to the White House, and all eyes are on progressive movements like ours to see how we respond. We need to show MAGA extremists, the media, and political pundits that we’re not backing down!

Meeting our fundraising goals is one of the clearest ways to demonstrate our strength. People will scrutinize our 2024 fundraising numbers when they’re made public for the first time after the end-of-year deadline. It’s our job to ensure those numbers prove this grassroots team is united and ready to fight for our values.

To leave no doubt that this movement is prepared to do our part in 2025 and beyond, we absolutely must hit our $50,000 end-of-year target.

Remember: you’re eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, so you can donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and get a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Peter, will you make a fully refundable $75 contribution right now to show the strength of our grassroots movement and ensure we’re ready for the challenges ahead?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241229ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241229ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241229ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241229ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241229ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241229ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

You can use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241229ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
Keith Ellison for Attorney General
PO Box 17224
Minneapolis, MN 55417
United States

name: Dave Pinto
subject: Looking ahead
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=122924PM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=122924PM]
Hi friend,
It’s hard to believe we’re already at the end of 2024. The election didn’t go the way we wanted, but I’m grateful for all your help.
Both here and across the country, Republicans are going to be energized by Donald Trump. They’ll try to pass dangerous laws that divide Minnesotans — not lift them up. That’s why our House DFL team is already looking ahead to 2026. And that work begins now. Friend, will you please contribute $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you are able to help us win the Minnesota House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=122924PM]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=122924PM] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=122924PM] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=122924PM] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=122924PM] Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane_other=true&refcode=122924PM]Thank you, friend. I’m so grateful for all your support in 2024 and in the future. Let’s make a Minnesota that works better for everyone.
Representative Dave Pinto
Treasurer & Finance Chair
Minnesota House DFL

name: Jimmy Patronis
subject: I’m running for Congress in Florida’s Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIMMY PATRONIS, INC
body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2f143313abd14c3681ab4c434a10164e&_e=XMlx0Revf757Sr3WF-1EczEqlCvmIRrImPSrcl-W6TBfCzTBpZDroPghVNEXw1ywHpGk2n1CXlI8iR9Gfkb6QAGrhH1QXofcfbbIbLAXrQaPG9g_xYwrz8gVBWmpoe3mSKCK0-auLdEuGmg6zR_emjF4s9CvL6cpdeVYFrumcMm6SbuxL6wXw1K07JaxQo6RsQItg2L75cmCQa-5cwtxFQDvdj4Is_JQPjfShn3YsH7uMRTPSdXytA2vJkC9FT4EnJnU-z23nOtiKzsZ5t4nyTxzwYFK6X0iVHqTq-rkkYa9X6hdxGARnmxOmbZYppkccDCAIPm7VO4XWtaQM1vVy0NjXDJV7f3bZllucLeCDxP6s8iJ7F92j4el96uA41NJ)
---
| | Peter, my name is Jimmy Patronis.
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2f143313abd14c3681ab4c434a10164e&_e=XMlx0Revf757Sr3WF-1EczEqlCvmIRrImPSrcl-W6TARpzlha8oRmIi4NuonbgmU1IteAJvdeYdCley18vjSpkTlODwhobC4Y0cxtbnFXztmyS62ED0OhEAs75SMvym2j5ocWOKfzY0TJ4JW5GbAJifx_8Gq1BK_nEHMRLdPGodcc5jh2mE3FwI-CdKOdg5iXzpQGGYkdV1ZpRn9V1WdHXHcgCPKfyDZt85wliPaJTEc3pHmnSe1LCx7qaR4VmhDyTvb071NEek87SOekyTvtg%3D%3D)
---
I served as Florida’s Chief Financial Officer with Ron DeSantis, and I was proud to be a part of the team that helped make our state the strongest in America. **With our House Majority razor-thin, we need to make sure Matt Gaetz’s replacement is a fierce ally of President Trump and will vote to pass his MAGA agenda. As a day one supporter of President Trump, I have decided to resign from my statewide office to run for Florida's 1st Congressional District and be a steadfast conservative voice for this country.** **[Democrats are seeing this Special Election as an opportunity to tighten the majority and ruin Trump’s plans to restore America. That’s why I need you on my team, and why I need you to fuel this fight.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2f143313abd14c3681ab4c434a10164e&_e=XMlx0Revf757Sr3WF-1EczEqlCvmIRrImPSrcl-W6TBfCzTBpZDroPghVNEXw1ywHpGk2n1CXlI8iR9Gfkb6QAGrhH1QXofcfbbIbLAXrQaPG9g_xYwrz8gVBWmpoe3mSKCK0-auLdEuGmg6zR_emjF4s9CvL6cpdeVYFrumcMm6SbuxL6wXw1K07JaxQo6RsQItg2L75cmCQa-5cwtxFV4cgqfHToJWMugZY0St5NhO017PtqL2ugiOVORt1qlplCRnaLSDPPKAWRaI5vhsBeEa96j8vLCFAnIoViac2B-6mzNWGnlrDZS1Z7c7D1SoqZt1Q7qxUfUUDq4nqNqn0ZtCUopzR_2gVy9SUhf5VDRn8CcZUa-fjF04Cp7SqkEk)**
---
[**HELP SEND JIMMY TO CONGRESS**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2f143313abd14c3681ab4c434a10164e&_e=XMlx0Revf757Sr3WF-1EczEqlCvmIRrImPSrcl-W6TBfCzTBpZDroPghVNEXw1ywHpGk2n1CXlI8iR9Gfkb6QAGrhH1QXofcfbbIbLAXrQaPG9g_xYwrz8gVBWmpoe3mSKCK0-auLdEuGmg6zR_emjF4s9CvL6cpdeVYFrumcMm6SbuxL6wXw1K07JaxQo6RsQItg2L75cmCQa-5cwtxFWucFjJMoR4vSVAr8lE_H-JG-4nDhOf6i0D2lLr2QoQNLkegMFcI9F34_xwZrSWxvpaVrL4pDWPP2tzl3eg3bkdMBynEwDn6qB_ey37fCDAi6J8-6pA3pJn9WqaTLnWqsi87rpSgyKWSItETwHkIKrEB_aBGEopcsbBgkHC-c_Y3)
---
President Trump trusts me to enact his America FIRST agenda in Congress because he knows I’m 100% MAGA. That’s why President Trump FULLY endorsed me in this race.

We must get our message to voters, and if you’re a proud Trump voter, I need you to step up and make sure we hold onto this seat. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, my name is Jimmy Patronis. I served as Florida’s Chief Financial Officer with Ron DeSantis, and I was proud to be a part of the team that helped make our state the strongest in America. With our House Majority razor-thin, we need to make sure Matt Gaetz’s replacement is a fierce ally of President Trump and will vote to pass his MAGA agenda. As a day one supporter of President Trump, I have decided to resign from my statewide office to run for Florida's 1st Congressional District and be a steadfast conservative voice for this country. President Trump trusts me to enact his America FIRST agenda in Congress because he knows I’m 100% MAGA. That’s why President Trump FULLY endorsed me in this race. We must get our message to voters, and if you’re a proud Trump voter, I need you to step up and make sure we hold onto this seat. Thank you, Jimmy Patronis | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIMMY PATRONIS, INC. | |

| Peter,

With just 2 days left until the end of the year, Team Emerge is actively interviewing bold Democratic women for the class of 2025.

We’re seeing an immense uptick in women who want to run for office. Even though this has been the toughest election year, this group of Democratic women is the most ambitious and inspiring group, sharing their clear vision to fight back against the Trump administration’s bad policy and represent their communities up and down the ballot. Our new group of leaders includes single moms, union members, and incumbents, all ready to lead the future.

This is why _**YOU**_ are a crucial part of our movement —your support will determine how many Democratic women we can recruit and train to be on the ballot in 2025, 2026, and beyond. _**The stronger we finish this year, the more resources we can invest in our training programs across the country.**_

**Even better, a generous donor will match your contribution — dollar for dollar — up to $50,000 only until December 31st!** Your contribution will go _**twice**_ as far in ensuring Democratic women are ready to win critical races and protect our freedoms.

Our new group of leaders includes single moms, union members, and incumbents, all ready to lead the future. This is why YOU are a crucial part of our movement —your support will determine how many Democratic women we can recruit and train to be on the ballot in 2025, 2026, and beyond. The stronger we finish this year, the more resources we can invest in our training programs across the country. Even better, a generous donor will match your contribution — dollar for dollar — up to $50,000 only until December 31st! Your contribution will go twice as far in ensuring Democratic women are ready to win critical races and protect our freedoms. = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s get across the finish line strong, Jamie Lynn Maniscalco Deputy Training Director, Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States

From the start, Leaders We Deserve has been powered by grassroots supporters, people just like you. It’s only because of this team that we’ve accomplished as much as we have in such a short time, already electing seven young progressives.

We’ve only got a couple days left in 2024 now – and we’re racing to meet our $50,000 end-of-year fundraising goal before we close the books on the year.
